quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Catch yourself in a simple thought and try to experience the beginnings of that action. You will be led into action indeed in a completely new way. Then try to experience this simple action as it affects others, not only emotionally and physically in terms of the changes it elicits from their complicated structures, but also the new actions it requires of them.
quotes.translation: 捕捉一个简单的念头，并试着体验那个行动的起始点。你将以一种全新的方式被带入行动之中。接着试着体验这个简单行动如何影响他人——不仅是在情绪和身体层面，看它从他们复杂的结构中引发的变化，还包括它要求他们采取的新行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: What you have here is an attempt to objectify, or stand apart from action in such a refusal. This is not the fault of the subconscious, but a fault of the ego, which refuses to assimilate or accept a given action. As you know, it is the ego who exists as a result of such objectivity. All the qualities that make up the ego are objectified to that degree, but they are collected about the ego with the ego as center. When the ego however refuses to accept an emotion as a part of itself, it tries one of two actions.
quotes.translation: 在此，你试图通过这种拒绝来客观化行动，或与行动保持距离。这不是潜意识的过错，而是自我的过错——它拒绝同化或接受某个既定的行动。如你所知，自我正是因这种客观性而存在。构成自我的所有特质都客观化到那个程度，但它们以自我为中心聚集。然而，当自我拒绝接受某个情绪作为自身的一部分时，它会尝试两种行动之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I was going to speak this evening rather in depth concerning action within action, as there is much to be said here that will show you how actual dimensions of action are formed. However, this will be a brief session. We have much time available to us, and need not worry over an occasional missed or short session, as long as our overall pattern is maintained.
quotes.translation: 我今晚原本打算深入探讨行动中的行动，因为这里有许多可说的，能向你们展示行动的实际维度是如何形成的。不过，这将是一次简短的课。我们拥有充裕的时间，只要整体模式得以维持，偶尔错过或缩短一节课也无需担忧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For, because you perceive reality in a limited fashion only, this in no way affects the basic nature of reality itself. The ego attempts to stand apart from action, to view action as the result of ego. However, again, the ego's attempt to stand apart from action in no way changes the basic nature of action itself, and the ego merely limits its own perception.
quotes.translation: 因为，你仅以有限的方式感知实相，但这丝毫不会影响实相本身的基本性质。自我试图与行动保持距离，将行动视为自我的结果。然而，再次强调，自我试图与行动保持距离的做法丝毫不会改变行动本身的基本性质，而自我只是限制了自己的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Each thought or emotion exists then as electric action within the mind. The action is transformed and translated, and is sent to the brain where its effects directly are felt, and the brain then initiates reactions. Thoughts and emotions then, being independent however, are not bounded by or held within the physical body. The physical barriers of skin, for example, the physical limitations of that structure, do not exist and are not recognized by thoughts or emotions. They recognize only electrical systems.
quotes.translation: 每一个思想或情感，随后作为心灵内的电性行动而存在。这行动被转化和转译，并被传送到大脑，其影响直接被感受到，然后大脑启动反应。然而，思想和情感是独立的，不受物理身体的束缚或限制。例如，皮肤的物理屏障，以及该结构的物理限制，对思想和情感而言并不存在，也不被它们所认知。它们只认知电性系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This, and all such effects, represent one of the most basic ways in which one action causes another action to change. These definite fields operate as channels for inner communications. They may be formed instantly, sweeping out into other directions. They open through attraction. This attraction may originate as an emotional one, but the emotional feeling has its own electromagnetism, and the attraction is in direct proportion to the force of the emotion itself, or to the charge that the emotion may carry.
quotes.translation: 这一点，以及所有此类效应，代表了一种行动导致另一种行动改变的最基本方式之一。这些明确的场域作为内在沟通的通道运作。它们可能瞬间形成，并向外扩展到其他方向。它们通过吸引力开启。这种吸引力可能源于情感，但情感感受本身具有其自身的电磁性，而吸引力与情感本身的力量，或情感可能携带的电荷，成正比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This material is leading up to some future discussions, and the nature of action will be most important. Action is as valid whether the act is conscious and voluntary, or whether it occurs within a dream or within a thought. It is as much a reality either way. Again, it is not an outside force. It arises from within the inner vitality of which all camouflage is composed. To some degree it is a result of inner vitality's attempt to completely express itself in materializations, and its inability to do so.
quotes.translation: 这些材料是为未来的某些讨论做铺垫，而行动的本质将至关重要。无论行动是有意识且自愿的，还是发生在梦境或思想中，它都同样真实有效。它并非外在力量，而是源于构成所有伪装的内在活力。在某种程度上，它是内在活力试图在物质化中完全表达自身却未能如愿的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Therefore, consciousness-of-self can appear with or without the existence of an ego. Consciousness-of-self is an attribute then of all physical species, regardless of their classification. Personality, human personality, is simply the name given to this class of self, as applied and seen within human beings. Personality changes and acts upon all other action. Personality, then, can be seen to operate as a field of action in identity; but identity that is conscious of its relation to action as a whole.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我意识可以在有或没有自我存在的情况下显现。自我意识是所有物质物种的属性，无论其分类如何。人格，人类人格，只是赋予这类自我的名称，应用于人类身上并为人所见。人格会变化并作用于所有其他行动。因此，人格可以被视为身份中行动的一个场域；但这是意识到自身与整体行动关系的身份。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This interrelationship is not in terms of cause and effect, as this law is a distortive misinterpretation of actuality. The interrelationship between all units or systems has nothing to do with continuity in your terms. The systems or units are basically simultaneous actions. As participants within one system of action, you are to a large extent limited by the very participation that gives you reality within the action system.
quotes.translation: 这种相互关系并非因果律所能解释，因为因果律是对实相的一种扭曲误解。所有单位或系统之间的相互关系与你们所谓的连续性无关。这些系统或单位本质上是同时发生的行动。作为某一行动系统的参与者，你们在很大程度上受到这种参与的限制——正是这种参与赋予了你们在行动系统中的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: An illness can be rejected by the personality. The habit of illness can be rejected. Illness is sometimes in the overall, however, beneficial. A given illness, that is, may be beneficial. When action is allowed to flow freely, then neurotic rejections of action will not occur; and it is neurotic rejections of action that often cause unnecessary illnesses.
quotes.translation: 疾病可以被人格拒绝。疾病的习惯也可以被拒绝。然而，疾病有时在整体上是有益的。也就是说，某种特定的疾病可能是有益的。当行动得以自由流动时，就不会发生对行动的神经过敏性拒绝；而正是这种对行动的神经过敏性拒绝，常常导致不必要的疾病。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. It is not likely that I will be heard by anyone for some time in the way that Philip heard me speak. Again, the condition simply happened to be favorable. I have told you that all action is psychic action, but the terms used make little difference. All action does have an electromagnetic reality, which is usually not perceived by the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 现在。在相当长一段时间内，不太可能有人像菲利普听到我说话那样听到我的声音。再说一次，这只是条件恰好有利。我曾告诉过你们，所有行动都是心灵行动，但所用的术语并无多大区别。所有行动确实具有电磁实相，这通常不被肉体感官所感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Action （you may if you prefer use the term vitality; I prefer the term action） action continually attempts to express itself in endless formations. It therefore materializes itself in various forms. I term these forms camouflage. Within your system the camouflage is physical matter. It is impossible for action to completely express itself in any medium.
quotes.translation: 行动（如果你们愿意，可以使用“活力”这个术语；我更喜欢“行动”这个术语）行动持续不断地试图在无尽的形态中表达自己。因此，它将自己物质化为各种形式。我将这些形式称为伪装。在你们的系统中，伪装就是物质。行动不可能在任何媒介中完全表达自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Identity then, is action's effect upon itself. Without identities action would be meaningless, for there would be nothing upon which action could act. Action must, therefore, of its very nature, of itself and from its own workings, create identities. Again, action and identity cannot be separated. This applies from the most simple to the most complex.
quotes.translation: 那么，身份认同是行动作用于自身的结果。没有身份认同，行动将毫无意义，因为就没有任何东西可供行动作用。因此，行动就其本质而言，必然从自身及其运作中创造出身份认同。再次强调，行动与身份认同不可分割。这适用于从最简单到最复杂的一切事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Action is basically electrical, but within your field only the most obvious forms of electrical action have been perceived. In this one respect your technology has let you down, but the electrical manifestations of which I speak could not even be searched for, or anticipated within your physical field, until the reality of man's psychic nature began to make itself known. And it is only now beginning to become apparent.
quotes.translation: 行动本质上是电性的，但在你们的场域中，只有最显而易见的电性形式被感知到。仅就这一点而言，你们的技术辜负了你们，但我所说的电性显化，在人类心灵本质的现实开始彰显自身之前，甚至无法在你们的物质场域中被探寻或预期。而它现在才刚刚开始变得明显。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If an action seems to be capable of motion, you say the action is alive. When your outer senses no longer perceive motion you call the action a dead one. In all cases however, action continues.
quotes.translation: 如果一个行动似乎能够运动，你们就说这个行动是活的。当你们的外在感官不再感知到运动时，你们就称这个行动为死的。然而在所有情况下，行动仍在继续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The dimensions of action itself have nothing to do, basically, with your conception of time. Instead the dimensions of action have to do with intensities; not only the intensities of the electromagnetic components that compose them, but with intensities as they are translated into psychological terms. Therefore the psychological experience of a particular event or action has little to do with clock time.
quotes.translation: 行动本身的维度，基本上与你们的时间概念无关。相反，行动的维度与强度有关；不仅涉及构成它们的电磁成分的强度，还涉及这些强度被转化为心理术语时的强度。因此，特定事件或行动的心理体验与时钟时间几乎无关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Action, you may say, is carried away by itself. Reality possibilities are endless. You are familiar with very small portions of reality. Your perception characteristics at this time dictate and limit the aspects of action that you can perceive. You can, however, focus very clearly on other aspects. And particular types of consciousness and identities are merely the result of action's formation into perception patterns with which it can focus upon certain aspects of itself.
quotes.translation: 行动，你可以说，被自身所携带。现实的可能性是无穷无尽的。你们只熟悉现实的一小部分。你们此时的感知特性决定了并限制了你们能感知到的行动方面。然而，你们可以非常清晰地聚焦于其他方面。而特定类型的意识与身份，仅仅是行动形成感知模式的结果，通过这些模式，行动可以聚焦于自身的某些方面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Action and consciousness are forever bound together, and we discussed the structure of the personality from this viewpoint. Action is perceived within your system electromagnetically, in terms of intensities. The personality as you know it is merely the result of action as you perceive it in certain groupings at any given time.
quotes.translation: 行动与意识永远紧密相连，我们从这一视角讨论了人格的结构。在你们的系统中，行动以电磁方式被感知，表现为强度。你们所知道的人格，仅仅是行动在特定时间以特定组合被你们感知的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Action within your field may appear to be affected by your time, but only that part of action which is physically materialized will be so affected. Action may appear to be at rest, but is never at rest, or stationary, or permanent. Action may appear to have a beginning and an ending but this is, again, an error of perception.
quotes.translation: 你们场域内的行动看似受时间影响，但只有物质化的那部分行动才会如此受影响。行动看似静止，实则从未停歇、固定或恒常。行动看似有始有终，但这仍是感知上的谬误。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is indeed no hard and fast rule to tell you which actions are basically impeding actions, and which are not. For what may appear an impeding action may indeed turn out to be the burst of a new and constructive direction, which may eventually represent a new and stronger pattern of identity and integrity, that will completely refresh the original unit and add to its vitality and strength.
quotes.translation: 确实没有绝对法则能告诉你哪些行动本质上是阻碍性的。因为看似阻碍的行动，可能恰恰是崭新建设性方向的迸发，最终可能形成更强大的身份与完整性模式，彻底更新原始单元并增强其活力与力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: It does not fear destruction however, as the ego does. It still fights for survival, of course; but the consciousness of plant life involves a consciousness of self as it operates within action. It sees or feels itself as a part of continuing action, and because of this inner atomic knowledge it does not fear destruction, basically, knowing that it will be changed into other kinds of action.
quotes.translation: 然而它不像自我那样惧怕毁灭。它当然仍为生存而战；但植物生命的意识包含在行动中运作的自我意识。它视自身为持续行动的一部分，基于这种内在的原子知识，它本质上不畏惧毁灭，深知自身将转化为其他形式的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is most important, again, to realize that action does not move in a straight line. Action may have mass. It may not have mass in other instances. Action will never have one effect only. This is a rather important point. Whenever an action seems to have but one effect, then there is a lack in perceptive abilities.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，理解行动并非直线运动至关重要。行动可能具有质量，也可能在某些情况下没有质量。行动绝不会只产生单一效果，这是相当重要的观点。每当某个行动看似只有单一效果时，就说明感知能力存在缺失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Often the insecticide kills more than the mosquito, and its effects can be far-reaching, and possibly have disastrous consequences. However, to consider impulses as chaotic, meaningless -- or worse, detrimental to an ordered life -- represents a very dangerous attitude indeed; an attempt that causes many of your other problems, an attempt that does often distort the nature of impulses. Each person is fired by the desire to act, and to act beneficially, altruistically (intently), to practically put his stamp, or her stamp, upon the world. When such natural impulses toward action are constantly denied over a period of time, when they are distrusted, when an individual feels in battle with his or her own impulses and shuts down the doors toward probable actions, then that intensity can explode into whatever avenue of escape is still left open.
quotes.translation: 杀虫剂杀死的往往不止是蚊子，其影响可能深远，甚至可能造成灾难性后果。然而，将冲动视为混乱、无意义——更糟的是，视为有序生活的阻碍——这确实代表着一种非常危险的态度；这种态度会导致你们许多其他问题，并且常常扭曲冲动的本质。每个人都受到渴望行动的驱使，渴望以有益、利他（专注地）的方式行动，渴望在世界上留下自己的印记。当这种自然的行动冲动在相当长时期内持续被否定、被怀疑，当个人感觉与自己内在冲动处于交战状态，并关闭通往可能行动的大门时，那股强度就会爆发，涌入任何仍然敞开的逃避通道。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (In the opening notes for Session 852 I wrote that starting with the 846th session for April 4, "Seth has been dictating material for Mass Events on Wednesday evenings only." Eight weeks later he's still following that arrangement, that "unspoken agreement" among the three of us. Even last Thursday night's session was displaced from the evening before. I took it upon myself to present material from two Monday night sessions -- 853 and 855.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Man is himself a particular system or unit of action within other systems of action, and he is himself composed of other units of action. This unity and interdependence is in itself responsible for that interplay of mental and psychic action which results in the individual consciousness, that is, with the ego.
quotes.translation: 人类自身就是其他行动系统内的特定系统或行动单元，同时自身也由其他行动单元构成。这种统一性与相互依存性，正是导致心智与心灵行动相互作用的根本原因，这种相互作用最终形成了个体意识，即自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is in itself, you see, a form of value fulfillment, since you are perceiving one simultaneous action as if it were a series of separate actions. You are delving into one action, and within it continually creating action within action. This is however, or this can be, while fulfilling, also limiting.
quotes.translation: 这本身就是一种价值完成的形式，你看，因为你正在将一个同时性的行动感知为一系列分离的行动。你正在深入探索一个行动，并在其中持续创造行动中的行动。然而，这虽然可以是圆满的，同时也具有局限性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Since it is itself action, such an attempt is basically doomed to failure. Yet the very attempt causes the formation of the ego. Once this apparent separate ego is formed, and once a fair amount of stability is maintained, and a new identity arrived at, the initial desire and energy will maintain the ego in its position during its existence in any field. Since this existence of separate identity is assured, attempts should then be made so that the ego can better participate in its realization of action, and the emotional life is very important in this respect.
quotes.translation: 由于它本身就是行动，这样的尝试基本上注定失败。然而，正是这种尝试导致了自我的形成。一旦这个看似独立的自我形成，并维持了相当程度的稳定性，且获得了新的身份认同，最初的渴望与能量就会在其存在于任何领域的期间内，维持自我的位置。既然这种独立身份的存在已获得保证，就应当做出尝试，让自我能够更好地参与其对行动的认知，而情感生活在这方面非常重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are many implications here, and now perhaps you can understand why I gave you the information on the nature of action before I introduced you to the inverted time system. For action is action whether or not you perceive it, and probable events are events whether or not you perceive them as such.
quotes.translation: 这其中有许多含义，现在或许你能理解，为何我在向你介绍倒置时间系统之前，先给了你关于行动本质的信息。因为无论你是否感知到它，行动就是行动；无论你是否将其视为可能事件，可能事件就是事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that the personality must be completely swept away by an emotion, though this is what such an ego fears. Emotion replenishes even the ego. Emotions demand resiliency, and resiliency is both the result of spontaneity, inner assurance, and discipline. All this is action, for the personality itself is composed of action, and is constantly changing. This is action, therefore, delighting in the expression and form of itself.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着人格必须被某种情绪完全席卷，尽管这正是自我所恐惧的。情绪甚至能滋养自我。情绪要求韧性，而韧性既是自发性、内在确信与自律的结果。这一切都是行动，因为人格本身由行动构成，且不断变化。因此，行动在自身的表达与形式中欢欣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Sometimes you are deliciously frightened by a horror program, for example. You may feel compelled to see how it comes out, and find yourself unable to go to bed until the horrendous situation is resolved. All the time you know that salvation is nearby: You can always switch off the program. If someone watching a gory midnight special suddenly screams or shouts or leaps up from the chair, how comical this seems, because the action is appropriate not to the "real" situation, but geared instead to a pseudodrama. The yelling and screaming will have absolutely no effect upon the program's actors, and will alter the drama not one whit. The appropriate action would be to turn the station off.
quotes.translation: 例如，有时你会被恐怖节目吓得津津有味。你可能觉得非看结局不可，直到那骇人情境得到解决才肯上床。你始终知道救赎近在咫尺：你随时可以关掉节目。若有人观看血腥午夜特辑时突然尖叫、呼喊或从椅子上跳起，这显得多么滑稽，因为这种行动并不符合"真实"情境，而是针对伪戏剧的反应。那喊叫与尖叫对节目演员毫无影响，也丝毫改变不了剧情。恰当的行动应是关掉频道。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As we have to some extent mentioned earlier, here we have travel through probable actions, where each conceivable action is experienced. The self allows itself to change while retaining knowledge that it is the self who changes. It develops through the changes. Time can only be measured through experience. It is obvious that other gestalt personalities experience more in an equivalent amount of your time, but this is not the point.
quotes.translation: 正如我们先前略有提及的，在此我们穿越可能行动，其中每种可设想的行动都被体验。自我在改变中允许自身变化，同时保有"是自我在改变"的认知。它通过改变而发展。时间只能通过体验来衡量。显然，其他完形人格在你们同等时间量中体验更多，但这并非重点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: On one hand, basically, the self is limitless, both electromagnetically and because of the nature of action, which affects all other action. The self does not however proceed along straight lines, from a birth to a death. This is only the self that the ego perceives. Action cannot remain inactive or motionless, though the motion may not always be apparent.
quotes.translation: 一方面，自性基本上是无界限的，这既源于电磁特性，也源于行动的本质——行动会影响所有其他行动。然而，自性并非沿着直线从出生走向死亡，那只是自我所感知的自性。行动无法保持静止或不动，尽管其运动未必总是显而易见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This is an excellent example of the way in which natural hypnotism can act to affect your system adversely. In a manner of speaking, repetitious actions intimately involve beliefs at the "magical" level. The behavior usually represents efforts to ward off "evil" that the individual feels is imminent. While it is easy then to understand the nature of exterior actions of repetitive quality, it is far more difficult to see many physical symptoms in the same light -- but here also whole groups of recurring reactions to certain stimuli are involved. Behind them there is often the same kind of compulsion. In their own way symptoms frequently operate, actually, as repetitive neurological ritual, meant to protect the sufferer from something else that he fears even more.
quotes.translation: 这是自然催眠如何对你们的系统产生负面影响的绝佳例证。可以说，重复性行动在"魔法"层面与信念紧密相连。这类行为通常代表个体试图抵御自认为迫在眉睫的"邪恶"。虽然理解外在重复性行动的本质相对容易，但以同样视角看待许多身体症状却困难得多——然而这里同样涉及对特定刺激的整套重复反应模式。这些反应背后往往存在同类型的强迫性冲动。实际上，症状常以自身方式运作，如同重复性的神经仪式，旨在保护患者免于面对更令其恐惧的事物。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your conscious mind tells you where you are in time and space, and directs your activity in a world of human action. That world has its own kind of rich complication, that is as unknown to the animals as is much of their acute realization unknown to you. Because you have a conscious mind, then, other portions of your being rely upon it to give them an adequate picture of your situation, and to give the conscious orders for action. These orders will then be carried out. To do this, you must use that mind as completely as possible. The picture of reality in time and space that you give to your cells must be accurate. They must act on a minute-to-minute, second-to-second, microsecond-to-microsecond basis, even though their own orientation is not familiar with your time concept.
quotes.translation: 你们的意识心会告知你在时空中的位置，并引导你在人类行动世界中的活动。这个世界有其独特的复杂层次，这种复杂性对动物而言如同它们敏锐的感知对你们而言一样不可知。正因拥有意识心，你们存在的其他部分便依赖它来提供对自身处境的充分认知，并下达行动指令。这些指令随后将被执行。为此，你必须尽可能充分地运用意识心。你传递给细胞的时空现实图景必须精确无误。它们必须基于分秒乃至微秒的尺度运作，尽管其自身取向并不熟悉你们的时间概念。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 691
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: It is easy for you to see how the cells of the body form it -- that is, you understand at least the cooperative nature of the cell's activities. An alteration on the part of one cell immediately causes changes in the others, and brings about a difference in body behavior. It is somewhat more difficult for you to understand the ways in which your own actions and those of others combine to bring about world events. On the one hand, each of my readers is but one individual alive on the planet at any given "time." It may seem that the individual has little power. On the other hand, each individual alive is a necessary one. It is true to say that the world begins and ends with each person. That is, each of your actions is so important, contributing to the experience of others whom you do not know, that each individual is like a center about which the world revolves.
quotes.translation: 你们很容易看出身体的细胞如何构成身体——也就是说，你们至少了解细胞活动的合作本质。一个细胞的改变会立即引起其他细胞的变化，并导致身体行为的差异。而你们要理解自己的行动与他人的行动如何共同促成世界事件，则要困难得多。一方面，在任何一个特定的"时间"，我的每位读者都只是地球上活着的一个人。个人似乎力量微薄。另一方面，每个活着的人都是不可或缺的。说世界始于每个人、终于每个人，这是千真万确的。也就是说，你们的每一个行动都如此重要，影响着你们素不相识之人的体验，以至于每个人都像一个世界围绕其旋转的中心。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In this particular context however the dream world will be considered in its relationship to the personality. In many ways the dream universe does operate within this context, and is part of the personality framework. As the personality is changed by any experience or any action, so it is changed by its own dreams. Here again we see how energy or action operates within itself. We can even trace the actions and interactions.
quotes.translation: 不过在这个特定语境下，我们将探讨梦境世界与人格的关系。在许多方面，梦宇宙确实在这个语境中运作，并且是人格框架的一部分。正如人格会因任何经验或行动而改变，它也会因自己的梦境而改变。在此我们再次看到能量或行动如何在自身内部运作。我们甚至可以追踪这些行动与互动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: "Again as with master events, we're dealing with a different framework of action entirely, where the Mona Lisa is 'more real' than the physical properties that compose it. This is not to deny the validity of its [materials]. But to discuss Seth and his ideas primarily from the true-or-false framework is the same thing as considering the Mona Lisa only from the validity of the physical properties of its paint and panel: very very limiting.... I don't have to 'live up' to anything. I don't have to 'make the material work,' or prove through my actions that it does, because it proves itself in the way that creativity does, by being beyond levels of true-false references. Otherwise I'm at cross-purposes with myself."
quotes.translation: "再次强调，就像主要事件一样，我们处理的是完全不同的行动框架，在这个框架中，蒙娜丽莎比构成它的物理属性'更真实'。这并非否定其[材料]的有效性。但主要从真假框架来讨论赛斯及其理念，就如同只从颜料和画板的物理属性有效性来审视蒙娜丽莎：非常非常局限……我不必'符合'任何标准。我不必'让材料奏效'，或通过我的行动证明它有效，因为它以创造力的方式自我证明——超越真假参照的层次。否则，我就是在与自己作对。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: One of those periods of delay in Jane's delivering the sessions for Mass Events lasted for 42 weeks, or 9½ months; in that book see the opening notes for Session 831, in Chapter 5. This hiatus in Chapter 9 of Dreams lasted for eight months, between sessions 928 and 931.

quotes.text: To some extent it also acts like a director of experience and action. It is not actually composed of the past egos, but of those dominant aspects of the various personalities. The inner ego, as action, thrusts in an inward direction; that is, back toward the originating impulse. The outside ego thrusts outward. They are two faces, therefore, and form one of many spheres of action, one pulling inward and one outward.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，它也像经验与行动的导演。它实际上并非由过去的自我组成，而是由各个不同人格的主导面向构成。内在自我作为行动，向内推进；也就是说，朝向原初的冲动。外在自我则向外推进。因此，它们是两张面孔，构成众多行动球体之一，一张向内拉，一张向外推。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As a rule you have enough difficulty dealing with the day's occurrences, much less next week's, and so in the sequence of events the reality of probable actions is usually hidden from your view. (Pause.) This more complex reality is an ever-existing property of your personal creaturehood. Beside this, in your terms you exist as a creature more than once. In each of your "reincarnational" existences you are faced with the same relationship with probabilities. In each case, also, the nature of the conscious mind sets up its own territory-of-identity (with hyphens) that it regards as its own. This provides a clear focus in which "present" action can be considered. These incarnations are all simultaneous.
quotes.translation: 通常来说，你连应付当天发生的事都够困难了，更别提下周的事。因此在事件序列中，可能行动的真实性通常隐藏在你的视野之外。（停顿）这个更复杂的实相是你个人存有中永远存在的属性。除此之外，用你的话说，你作为一个存有不止存在一次。在你每一次"转世"存在中，你都面临着与可能性相同的关联。在每种情况下，意识心的本质也建立起它视为己有的身份领域（带连字符）。这提供了一个清晰的焦点，让"当下"的行动得以被审视。这些转世都是同时发生的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The inner senses allow you to follow some of these actions into other realities. The moment point on the one hand is of course a minute division of action. On the other hand it is an entrance into unknown possibilities and new dimensions. As you probe into any given moment point, you automatically become a part of it and change it accordingly as it makes its impressions upon you. These interchanging's occur on many levels: psychologically, chemically, electromagnetically, psychically. There are subtle variations, as you know, in your known self from one instant to another as you affect your physical environment and form it, and as it in turn forms you. And this is just on the physical level.
quotes.translation: 内在感官让你能够跟随某些行动进入其他实相。瞬间点一方面当然是行动的一个微小划分，另一方面却是进入未知可能性与新维度的入口。当你探索任何特定瞬间点时，你自动成为它的一部分，并在它对你产生印象时相应地改变它。这些互换发生在许多层面：心理层面、化学层面、电磁层面、心灵层面。如你所知，在你已知的自我中，从一瞬到另一瞬存在着微妙的变异，因为你影响并塑造你的物质环境，而环境也反过来塑造你。而这还只是在物质层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Hitler preached on the great value of social action as opposed to individual action. He turned children into informers against their own parents. He behaved nationalistically, as any minor cult leader does in a smaller context. The Jews believed in martyrdom. (Pause.) Germany became the new Egypt, in which their people were set upon. I do not want to oversimplify here, and certainly I am nowhere justifying the cruelties the Jews encountered in Germany. You do each create your own reality, however (intently), and en masse you create the realities of your nationalities and your countries -- so at that time the Germans saw themselves as victors, and the Jews saw themselves as victims.
quotes.translation: 希特勒鼓吹社会行动的巨大价值，反对个人行动。他让孩子们成为告发自己父母的告密者。他表现出民族主义的行为，就像任何小团体领袖在较小范围内所做的那样。犹太人信奉殉道。（停顿。）德国成了新的埃及，在那里他们的人民受到迫害。我不想在这里过度简化，当然我也绝不是要为犹太人在德国遭受的残酷对待辩护。然而，你们每个人都创造了自己的实相（专注地），并且集体创造了你们民族和国家的实相——所以当时德国人视自己为胜利者，而犹太人视自己为受害者。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 852, MAY 9, 1979
9:39 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: A thought is an action. A dream is as much an action as a breath is an action. Although we speak in terms of separation, all reality is a part of action. When we divide action in order to discuss it, we in no way change the reality of action, nor alter its nature.
quotes.translation: 思想是一种行动。梦是一种行动，就像呼吸是一种行动一样。尽管我们以分离的方式谈论，但所有实相都是行动的一部分。当我们为了讨论而划分行动时，我们绝不会改变行动的真实性，也不会改变其本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, regarding again the nature of action, I would like to discuss action in relation to the dream reality, for you are intimately familiar with action in dreams, and your practical experience will enable you to understand the true nature of action more clearly.
quotes.translation: 现在，再次关于行动的本质，我想讨论行动与梦实相的关系，因为你们对梦中的行动非常熟悉，你们的实际经验将使你们更清楚地理解行动的真实本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The body maintains its vitality not only through the physical motion and agility that you perceive, but by microscopic agility, and actions within microseconds, that you do not perceive. There is as much motion, stimulation, and reaction in the interior bodily environment as the body meets through its encounters with the exterior environment. The body must now and then "flush its systems out," run through its repertoire, raise its temperature (pause), activate its hormonal actions more strongly. In such ways it keeps its system of immunities clear. That system operates always. To some extent, it is a way that the body distinguishes between self and nonself.
quotes.translation: 身体不仅通过你感知到的身体动作和敏捷性来维持活力，还通过你无法感知的微观敏捷性和微秒级内的行动来维持。身体内部环境中的运动、刺激和反应，与身体通过外部环境遭遇所获得的同样多。身体必须不时地"冲洗其系统"，演练其全部技能，提高其温度（停顿），更强烈地激活其激素活动。通过这种方式，它保持其免疫系统的清晰。该系统始终在运作。在某种程度上，这是身体区分自我与非我的一种方式。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In the beginning of this recovery they were used to maintain the status quo, and prevent any further worsening of symptoms. This meant that a complete stop was made in all destructive issues. Such an action requires enormous energy alone, for it is the stoppage of a process which is in itself action. This state was maintained steadily, and held, and then the recovery process begun. In this case this represented an entire, almost complete, transformation of the circulating system, and a change of chemical interactions. The mental condition you see has not deteriorated since its improvement. The whole outlook of the psychic self has changed for the better.
quotes.translation: 在康复初期，这些被用来维持现状，并防止症状进一步恶化。这意味着所有破坏性过程完全停止。这样的行动本身就需要巨大的能量，因为它是阻止一个本身即为行动的过程。这种状态被稳定地维持并保持，然后康复过程开始。在这种情况下，这代表了循环系统的几乎完全转变，以及化学相互作用的改变。你看到的精神状况自改善以来并未恶化。心灵自我的整体前景已向更好的方向转变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Within what you call one moment, many such perceptions flash through to affect any given individual. However there is within your system a lapse before the organism can effectively organize these perceptions. My idea of a moment point is only an approximation of your physical moment. I am trying to make it plain here that the range of action is what is important. A moment point is a range of action.
quotes.translation: 在你所谓的一个瞬间内，许多这样的感知闪过，影响任何特定的个体。然而，在你的系统内，有机体在有效组织这些感知之前存在一个延迟。我对"瞬间点"的概念只是对你物理瞬间的一种近似。我在这里试图说明的是，行动的范围才是重要的。一个"瞬间点"就是一个行动的范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Even a quick and automatic rejection or withdrawal from such stimulus is in itself a way by which consciousness knows itself. The ego may attempt to ignore or escape from such experiences, but the basic nature of action itself is the knowing of itself in all aspects; and in a basic manner, in a very basic and deep manner, action does not differentiate between pleasant, painful or enjoyable actions.
quotes.translation: 即使是迅速而自动地拒绝或回避这类刺激，其本身也是意识认识自身的一种方式。自我或许试图忽视或逃避这类经验，但行动的基本本质就是在所有面向中认识自身；而在根本层面上，在非常根本且深层的层面上，行动并不区分愉悦、痛苦或令人享受的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We find once again a basic reality, that of the personality, which is accepted and recognized within the physical field, even while it does not appear there as a definite physical unit. It can indeed be examined but the examination itself, being action, changes it. For the personality, true to the roles of action, will seize upon the new action and form of it new realities and unities with itself.
quotes.translation: 我们再次发现一个基本实相——人格的实相。它在物质场域中被接受和认知，尽管它并未以明确的物质单位出现在那里。它确实可以被检视，但检视本身作为行动，会改变它。因为人格遵循行动的本性，会抓住新的行动，并从中形成新的实相与自身的统一体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The subconscious, and in fact all portions of the self with the exception of the ego, are capable of assimilating a wider area, so to speak, of action. Therefore to these other portions of the self, time has a much different essence than it has for the ego. The ego is indeed many things. It can be defined in relationship to many other aspects of reality. In relationship to action, and moment points, the ego is indeed that portion of the self which stands at the apex of the moment point, and is limited by the moment point. The ego is in this context the portion of the self which is utterly focused upon, and imprisoned by, the moment point.
quotes.translation: 潜意识——事实上，除自我之外的所有自身部分——可以说能够吸收更广阔的行动领域。因此对这些自身部分而言，时间具有与自我截然不同的本质。自我确实具有多重面向。它可以参照实相的其他许多面向来定义。就行动与片刻点而言，自我正是那个立于片刻点顶端、受片刻点限制的自身部分。在此脉络下，自我是完全聚焦于片刻点、并被片刻点囚禁的自身部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Action cannot be dammed up, for it becomes explosive. There are many balances to be maintained. The dream world of which we have spoken so often is also action, and as such it affects all other action. It is not apart from your so- called physical universe, for the dream universe, through its connection with the inner self, also helps to construct physical matter--and this is no trifling matter.
quotes.translation: 行动不能被堵塞，否则它会变得具有爆炸性。有许多平衡需要维持。我们经常提到的梦境世界也是行动，因此它会影响所有其他行动。它并非脱离你们所谓的物质宇宙，因为梦境宇宙通过其与内在自我的连接，也帮助构建物质实体——而这绝非小事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Here now once more, let me repeat that thoughts are definite electromagnetic realities. Therefore, being actions, they affect all other actions, and if I repeat this in session after session, I do so, so that it will never be forgotten. Therefore these secondary conditions are strengthened through the very act, or misact of thinking that they are primary rather than secondary elements in action.
quotes.translation: 在此再次让我重申，思想是明确的电磁实相。因此，作为行动，它们会影响所有其他行动。如果我一次又一次地在课程中重复这一点，我这样做是为了让它永远不会被遗忘。因此，这些次要条件通过认为它们是行动中的主要而非次要元素的行为或错误行为而被强化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Theoretically, certain dreams can give you a lifetime's experience to draw upon, though the dream itself can take less than an hour in your time. In a way, dreams are the invisible thickness of your normal consciousness. They involve both portions of the brain. Many dreams do activate the brain in a ghostly fashion, sparking responses that are not practically pertinent in ordinary terms. That is, they do not require direct action but serve as anticipators of action, reminders to the brain to initiate certain actions in its future.
quotes.translation: 理论上，某些梦境可以给你提供一生的经验来汲取，尽管在你们的时间中，梦境本身可能不到一小时。从某种意义上说，梦境是你们正常意识的隐形厚度。它们涉及大脑的两个部分。许多梦境确实以幽灵般的方式激活大脑，引发在通常意义上并不实际相关的反应。也就是说，它们不需要直接行动，而是作为行动的预兆，提醒大脑在未来启动某些行动。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: The apparent dimensions within action is caused by the separation of which we spoke, when action attempts to step aside from itself. Dreams are as much action as the movement of a muscle, and the movement of a muscle is indeed as sleeplike as any dream.
quotes.translation: 行动中的明显维度源于我们曾提及的分离——当行动试图脱离自身时。梦境与肌肉运动同属行动，而肌肉的运动确实与任何梦境一样具有沉睡特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: On the part of any human personality, therefore, it is extremely important that methods be learned to let action follow its normal directive bent within the personality, therefore avoiding these abortive offshoots that impede main directives and purposes of the unit as a whole. The integration of the whole personality as a psychological unit, and as an effective psychic gestalt, is obviously dependent upon the free and unimpeded flow of action. Any impediments here can be most threatening to the integrity of the personality itself, for one aspect of the personality would benefit at the expense of other aspects.
quotes.translation: 因此对任何人格而言，学习让行动在人格内部遵循其自然导向至关重要，从而避免这些阻碍整体单元主要导向与目的的畸形分支。将整个人格整合为心理单元及有效的心灵完形，显然取决于行动的自由无碍流动。此处任何阻碍都可能对人格完整性构成最大威胁，因为人格的某个面向会以牺牲其他面向为代价而获益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: When we have gone into the nature of action still much more thoroughly, then you will be able to use such knowledge for quite practical purposes, and to your advantage. For as you know, you do not perceive all aspects of action by any means, and it can indeed to some extent be up to you to choose those aspects of action with which you will be concerned, and those which you would ignore.
quotes.translation: 待我们更深入探究行动的本质后，你们便能将此类知识运用于相当实际的用途并获益。如你所知，你绝未感知到行动的所有面向，事实上在某种程度上，你可以自行选择关注哪些行动面向，忽略哪些面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He has been reading various sections of the material, including portions having to do with the ego, personality and action, and you see attempted to set himself aside from the action in which his whole personality was intimately involved. As impossible [to do] as the ego's general attempt to insist upon some sort of permanent, unchanging, stable identity, since it is composed of action.
quotes.translation: 他一直在阅读资料的各个章节，包括涉及自我、人格与行动的部分，你看，他试图将自己置身于行动之外，而他的整个人格却与这行动紧密相连。这就像自我一般试图坚持某种永恒不变、稳定不变的认同感一样不可能，因为自我本身即由行动构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Underneath this recognized order of events, however, there is actually a vast field of ever-occurring action. These fields of probabilities are action sources for your reality; but your world-action is also a source for these other probabilities.
quotes.translation: 然而，在这被认知的事件秩序之下，实际上存在着一片不断发生的行动的广阔领域。这些可能性领域是你实相的行动源头；而你的世界行动也是这些其他可能性的源头。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 694
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: （It might be interesting to note here that Seth began talking about action in the 13th session, January 6, 1964: "Love and hate, for example, are action, ''and "In your plane, action is the main word of importance, "etc. See Volume 1, page 71.
quotes.translation: （这里或许值得注意，赛斯在1964年1月6日的第13节中便开始谈论行动："例如，爱与恨就是行动"，以及"在你们的层面，行动是最重要的关键词"等。参见第一卷，第71页。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is no particular boundary to the circle. It widens outward indefinitely. Now. In the dream universe, in all systems of such nature, development is achieved not by traveling your single line, but by delving into that point that you call a moment. The physical laws simply do not apply here, within such a value fulfillment system. Basically your own physical universe is at the apex of such a system itself, and it is only because of the purpose and nature of the particular apex that experience appears, from my viewpoint, to be so slowed down. The particular point, in one manner, is being pursued by you in such a slow fashion that it appears to be a series of happenings strung out in a thread of continuity. You experience action as one happening after another, not because of the nature of action itself but because of the nature of your own structure and perception.
quotes.translation: 这个圆没有特定的边界，它无限地向外扩展。现在，在梦的宇宙中，在所有这类性质的系统里，发展并非通过沿着你那条单一的线旅行来实现，而是通过深入那个你称之为“瞬间”的点来达成。物理法则在此并不适用，在这样的价值完成系统内。基本上，你们自己的物质宇宙本身就是这样一个系统的顶点，只是因为该特定顶点的目的和性质，使得经验在我看来如此缓慢。从某种方式来说，你们正以如此缓慢的方式追逐那个特定的点，以至于它看起来像是一连串事件串成一条连续性的线。你们体验行动为一个接一个的事件，并非因为行动本身的性质，而是因为你们自身结构和感知的性质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: New paragraph: Despite all "realistic" pragmatic tales to the contrary, the natural state of life itself is one of joy, acquiescence with itself -- a state in which action is effective, and the power to act is a natural right. You would see this quite clearly with plants, animals, and all other life if you were not so blinded by beliefs to the contrary. You would feel it in the activity of your bodies, in which the vital individual affirmation of your cells brings about the mass, immensely complicated achievement of your physical being. That activity naturally promotes health and vitality.
quotes.translation: 新段落：尽管所有“现实”的实用主义故事都与此相反，但生命本身的自然状态是喜悦、与自身和谐一致——在这种状态中，行动是有效的，而行动的力量是一种自然权利。如果你们没有被相反的信念所蒙蔽，你们会非常清楚地看到植物、动物和所有其他生命中的这一点。你们会在自己身体的活动感受到它，在其中，你们细胞的重要个体肯定带来了你们物质存在的庞大、极其复杂的成就。这种活动自然促进健康和活力。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 802, APRIL 25, 1977
9:47 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Now: Again, master events are those that most significantly affect your system of reality, even though the original action was not physical but took place in the inner dimension. Most events appear both in time and out of it, their action distributed between an inner and outer field of expression. Usually you are aware only of events' exterior cores. The inner processes escape you.
quotes.translation: 现在：再次强调，主要事件是那些最显著影响你们现实系统的事件，即使原始行动并非物质性的，而是发生在内在维度中。大多数事件既出现在时间之内，也出现在时间之外，它们的行动分布在一个内在和外在的表达场域之间。通常你们只意识到事件的外在核心，内在过程则逃过你们的注意。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: What you call suggestion, to return to our present subject matter, is but a projection into the physical universe of data that operates constantly, as a basis for, and within, action. It is basically a psychic manifestation that gives direction to action, and to the various manifestations which action may take.
quotes.translation: 所谓暗示，回到我们当前的主题，不过是持续运作的数据投射到物质宇宙中，作为行动的基础与内在组成部分。它本质上是一种心灵显化，为行动及其可能采取的各种显化形式提供方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: For the benefit of our visitor, let me say that action is the vitality of the universe from which all realties spring. This will make our discussion simpler. Again, no action may be withdrawn. Nothing is motionless. Therefore, when our visitor hesitates between his two doors, he is not motionless, but uses as much energy in indecision as should be expended in purposeful direction.
quotes.translation: 为方便我们的访客理解，容我说明：行动是宇宙的生命力，一切实相皆由此生发。这将使我们的讨论更为简明。再次强调，没有行动可以被撤回。万物皆非静止。因此当访客在两扇门之间犹豫不决时，他并非静止不动，而是在优柔寡断中消耗着本应用于明确方向上的同等能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Action and counteraction, operating through chemical enzymes, enable purposeful activity in which no motion is haphazard. The smallest imaginable particle gives evidence of that basic unity of energy adopting form, materializing the camouflage pattern necessary for efficient manipulation within your universe, that is composed of diverse but interwoven fields of apparent, semi-apparent, or unapparent activities and correlations. That is, many valid actions within your own universe do not, as you know, have solidity, and yet appear within and operate through the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 行动与反作用通过化学酶运作，使有目的的活动得以实现，其中没有任何运动是随机的。最微小的粒子都彰显着能量采取形态的基本统一性，将你们宇宙中高效运作所需的伪装模式物质化——这个宇宙由不同却相互交织的场域构成，包含显性、半显性或隐性的活动与关联。也就是说，你们宇宙中许多有效的行动，如你们所知，并不具有实体性，却仍显现在物质宇宙中并通过其运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your dancing represented the first move away from what those images meant, and violent action was the best thing under the circumstances. Because your personalities were momentarily disconnected from their usual physical and psychic environment, and because the ordinary physical duties were not necessary, it was all the more easy for you to release these energies into the formation of the images you saw. However, you very nearly drained your energy reserve in forming these images. The energy you used dancing came from psychic reserves, saved subconsciously for emergency.
quotes.translation: 你们的舞蹈代表了脱离那些影像含义的第一步，而暴力行动在当时情况下是最佳选择。因为你们的人格暂时脱离了惯常的物理与心理环境，且无需履行日常的物理职责，反而更容易将这些能量释放到所见影像的形成中。然而，你们在形成这些影像时几乎耗尽了能量储备。你们跳舞所用的能量来自潜意识中为紧急情况储存的心灵储备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Again, this is no reason to feel that the individual is nothing, simply because he is one of so many. Action develops according to value fulfillment, and value fulfillment has little to do with size or numbers; and action turns to consciousness. Action working on itself becomes consciousness, and in speaking of consciousness I do not necessarily mean what you mean by the word.
quotes.translation: 同样，这并非理由让人认为个体微不足道，仅仅因为他是众多之一。行动依价值完成而发展，而价值完成与规模或数量无关；行动转向意识。行动作用于自身便成为意识，而当我谈及意识时，未必指你们所理解的那个词义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Either it attempts to return the emotion to a subjective state, or it attempts to objectify it further away from itself. In either case the ego is at fault for not assimilating or accepting the emotion. It is easy to see then that the ego is itself a series of actions, that it is a collection of more or less similar actions, selected from a larger mainstream of other actions.
quotes.translation: 它要么试图将情绪回归主观状态，要么试图将其进一步客观化而远离自身。无论哪种情况，都是自我未能同化或接纳情绪之过。由此不难看出，自我本身即是一系列行动，是从更庞大的其他行动主流中筛选出的、或多或少相似的行动集合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other words the past and the present are real to the same extent. At times in fact the past can become more real than the present, and in such cases past actions are reacted to in the present. You take it for granted that present action can alter the future, but present actions can also alter the past.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，过去与现在具有同等程度的真实性。事实上，过去有时会比现在更真实，在这种情况下，过去的行动会在当下被反应。你理所当然地认为现在的行动可以改变未来，但现在的行动同样可以改变过去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This involves, simply, a quickening of experience and action relatively unhampered by the sort of time necessities inherent within the physical universe. Action itself therefore is allowed greater freedom. This is not to say that structure does not exist within the dream universe, for structures of a mental or psychic nature do exist. But structure is not dependent upon matter as in the physical universe, and the motion of molecules is more spontaneous, and an almost unbelievable depth of experience is possible within what would seem to you a fraction of a moment.
quotes.translation: 这简单地涉及经验与行动的加速，相对不受物理宇宙内固有的那种时间必要性的阻碍。因此，行动本身被赋予了更大的自由。这并非说梦宇宙中不存在结构，因为心智或心灵性质的结构确实存在。但结构并不像在物理宇宙中那样依赖于物质，分子的运动更为自发，而在你看来似乎只是一瞬间的片刻中，可能体验到几乎令人难以置信的深度经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Let us consider the following. The individual within your system--and this is quite simplified--an individual finds himself with a choice of three actions. He chooses one of these and experiences it within the physical field. The other two actions are experienced however, but not within the physical system. The results of the other two actions are perceived by the inner ego.
quotes.translation: 让我们考虑以下情况。在你的系统内的个体——这已相当简化——发现自己面临三种行动的选择。他选择其中之一并在物理领域内体验它。然而，另外两种行动也被体验了，但不在物理系统内。另外两种行动的结果由内我感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is an involvement that would seem, would seem, intense. The ego appears to be extremely intense, but to a large degree this is a deception, for the intenseness is caused by the attempt of the ego not to become involved with action, unless the ego can dominate action. There is no basic trust of the inner self. The personality does not basically recognize or trust the ability of the inner self, and this results in an intense inhibited fear.
quotes.translation: 有一种投入看似、看似强烈。自我看似极度强烈，但很大程度上这是一种欺骗，因为这种强烈感源于自我试图不涉入行动，除非自我能主导行动。自我对内在自体缺乏基本信任。人格本质上不承认或不信任内在自体的能力，这导致了一种强烈压抑的恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Once more, action is not a force outside that acts upon matter. Action is, instead, the inside vitality of the inner universe. It is the dilemma between inner vitality's desire and impetus to completely materialize itself, and its inability to completely do so. This was also discussed briefly in sessions dealing with the first appearance of matter within the physical field.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，行动并非作用于物质的外在力量。相反，行动是内在宇宙的内在活力。它是内在活力的欲望与动力——想要完全物质化自身——与其无法完全做到这一点的困境。这在讨论物质在物理场中首次出现的课程中也曾简要提及。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am rather pleased with the evenings session. Indeed, I feel in rather good spirits, if you will again forgive the phrase. We will at our next session truly get down again to business, as far as our discussions on action are concerned. There is still much to be said here. Nor was I flattered at Ruburt's surprise upon his discovery that what I told you in the past, concerning your friends, was coming to pass. He should have expected it. He is if anything more bullheaded than even I gave him credit for, and I gave him credit for a good deal of bull- headedness.
quotes.translation: 我对今晚的课程相当满意。确实，我感觉精神相当不错，如果你再次原谅这个说法的话。就我们关于行动的讨论而言，我们下次课程将真正回归正题。这里还有很多要说的。鲁柏发现我过去告诉你的关于你朋友的事正在应验时感到惊讶，这并非奉承。他本该预料到的。他比我原先认为的还要固执，而我已经认为他相当固执了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are deeply hidden areas of human behavior far below the surface of actions, and these cause the actions. They are psychic exchanges. Before the beginning of any war, subconsciously each individual knows not only that a war will occur, but its precise outcome. Battles like other physical acts exist first in the mental realm. When this realm is peaceful there are no wars. All of your physical activities, from the political to the economic and to the most insignificant individual concerns have their origin in mental existence, and their outcome is known.
quotes.translation: 人类行为中存在着深藏于行动表象之下的领域，这些领域才是行动的真正成因。它们是心灵层面的能量交换。在任何战争爆发之前，每个个体潜意识中不仅知晓战争即将发生，更清楚其精确结局。战役如同其他物质行为，首先存在于心灵领域。当此领域保持平和时，便不会发生战争。你们所有的物质活动——从政治经济到最微不足道的个人事务——都源于心灵存在，其结局早已被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The peculiar nature of the impeding action or illness has much to do with its persistence. The whole focus of the personality can shift from constructive areas to a concentration of main energies in the area of the impeding action or illness. In such a case the illness actually represents a new unifying system. Now, if the old unifying system of the personality has broken down, the illness, serving as a makeshift, temporary emergency measure, may hold the integrity of the personality intact until a new constructive unifying principle replaces the original.
quotes.translation: 阻碍性行动或疾病的特殊性质与其持续性密切相关。人格的全部焦点可能从建设性领域转移，将主要能量集中于阻碍性行动或疾病区域。在这种情况下，疾病实际上代表着一种新的统一系统。当人格原有的统一系统瓦解时，作为权宜之计的临时应急措施，疾病能维持人格的完整性，直到新的建设性统一原则取代原有系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We are dealing here principally, and in the main, with the essence of action, and essentially all apparent divisions are arbitrary for the sake of explanation. The moment point is in itself arbitrary, an artificial division. As we have said, the moment point for you is actually composed of the amount of action which you are capable of assimilating within your present framework, for the moment point is indeed a portion of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 我们在此主要探讨行动的本质，本质上所有表面上的划分都仅为解释方便而设。时间点本身即是人为的划分。如我们所述，对你们而言，时间点实际上由你们在当前框架内能够吸纳的行动量所构成，因为时间点确实是广袤当下的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Death simply does not exist to the whole personality. Only the physically oriented portions of the self accept this as a finality. (Long pause.) Whenever you use abilities that to you seem supernormal, you are drawing upon the ability of the supraself. It is the whole I and yet more than the sum of its parts. It is action highly aware, and quite able to change its components. It consists also of course of the probable selves of which we have spoken, and it unites and directs infinitely larger portions of action than possible for the physical personality.
quotes.translation: 死亡对整体人格而言根本不存在。只有自我中执着于物质层面的部分，才将死亡视为终结。（长停顿）每当你运用那些看似超常的能力时，你其实是在调用超我（supraself）的能力。这个"全我"既是各部分的总和，又超越各部分之和。它是高度觉知的行动，能自如重组自身组件。它当然也包含我们讨论过的可能自我，并统合与引导着远超物质人格所能掌控的更大行动范畴。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The personality itself, as you know, is a gestalt of action, and as such it is necessary that the flow of action within it follow the overall directives of the entity and the inner self. When for example the ego is allowed to apply too tightly and too rigorously its inhibitory functions, then this freedom of action within the personality is seriously divided and impeded.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，人格本身即是行动完形（gestalt），因此其内部行动流必须遵循存有与内在自我的整体指令。举例而言，当自我被允许过度严苛地执行其抑制功能时，人格内部的行动自由便会遭到严重割裂与阻碍。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: Action at this level is conscious of itself, but the "I" differentiation is not definite enough to fear destruction or painful stimuli. Here we merely have action knowing itself. And knowing itself, it knows its basic indestructibility, knows its own oneness, and has no fear of destruction, for it is also part of destruction itself, from which further action will evolve.
quotes.translation: 此层面的行动具有自我意识，但其"我"的分化尚未明确到会恐惧毁灭或痛苦刺激。此处仅存在行动对自身的觉知。正因觉知自身，它便知晓自身本质的不可摧毁性，明了自身的合一性，对毁灭毫无畏惧——因为它同时也是毁灭本身的一部分，而新的行动将从毁灭中演化而生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: No action can be considered by itself. There is no solitary action. Such a possibility is basically meaningless. Nor does a tension exist in isolation. In all of these matters there is also constant pulsations of action within the outer ego, the inner ego, and all the other aspects of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 没有任何行动可以单独被考虑。没有孤立的行动。这种可能性基本上毫无意义。张力也不会孤立存在。在所有这些问题中，外在自我、内在自我以及整体自我的所有其他面向内部，都存在着行动持续不断的脉动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Instead of a shadowy element, you yourself may feel unsubstantial -- "ghostly," as Ruburt did. Period. Instead of any of those things, the imagined dialogue -- if there is any -- may suddenly change from the dialogue that you remember; or the entire scene and action may quickly alter. Any of these occurrences can be hints that you are beginning to glimpse the probable variations of the particular scene or action. It is, however, the subjective feeling that is the important clue here, and once you experience it there will be no doubt in your mind.
quotes.translation: 你自身可能会像鲁柏那样感到不实在——"幽灵般"的，而非一个模糊的元素。句号。如果存在任何想象中的对话，它可能会突然从你记忆中的对话改变；或者整个场景和行动可能迅速转变。这些现象中的任何一个都可能暗示你开始瞥见特定场景或行动的可能变体。然而，主观感受才是这里的重要线索，一旦你体验到它，你的心中将不再有任何怀疑。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: We are dealing here, again, merely with the various aspects of action. As a personality itself is an action gestalt, within the inner self there is a capsule comprehension of the purposes and intents of the whole personality. These are indeed within the very structure, both psychic and physical, of the personality itself. The ego, on its own as a separate unit, does not have such data, although since it is after all a portion of the whole self, it does have such information available. But when it acts as a unit it does not use such information.
quotes.translation: 我们在这里再次仅仅处理行动的各种面向。正如人格本身是一个行动完形，在内在自我内部存在着对整个人格目的与意图的浓缩理解。这些确实存在于人格自身的结构之中，无论是心灵结构还是物质结构。自我作为一个独立的单元，并不拥有这些数据，尽管它毕竟是整体自我的一部分，确实可以获得这些信息。但当它作为一个单元运作时，它并不使用这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: None of that is the intellect's concern at an intellectual level. At a biological level, and at an electromagnetic level, the intellect, of course, performs feats that it cannot consciously know through the use of its reason (all intently). Spontaneously, with the process just mentioned, millions of pictures are being taken also of the probable actions that will -- or may -- be needed, in your terms, in the moment immediately following, from microscopic action to the motion of a muscle, the driving of a car, the reading of a book, or whatever.
quotes.translation: 这些都不是智性在智力层面所关心的事。在生物层面与电磁层面，智性当然会展现出它无法通过理性有意识地知晓的壮举（全神贯注地）。随着刚才提到的过程，无数张照片也在拍摄那些——用你们的话说——在紧接着的当下时刻可能或将会需要的可能行动，从微观动作到肌肉运动、开车、读书或任何其他行为。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: Power does not basically imply superiority over. There is the power of love, for example, and the power to love. Both imply great action and vitality, and an aggressive thrust that has nothing to do with violence. Yet many people have physical symptoms or suffer unpleasant situations because they are afraid to utilize their own power of action, and equate power with aggression -- meaning violence. (See the 634th session in Chapter Eight.)
quotes.translation: 力量本质上并不意味凌驾于他人之上。例如，有爱的力量，也有去爱的力量。两者都意味着伟大的行动与活力，以及一种与暴力无关的进取冲劲。然而许多人出现身体症状或遭遇不愉快情境，是因为他们害怕运用自身行动的力量，并将力量等同于攻击性——即暴力。（参见第八章第634节。）
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) In a world in which individuals were confined in space in a tribe or clan (a one-minute pause), action was immediate. The environment presented a framework in which consciousness learned to deal with stimuli in a direct fashion. It learned how to focus. The necessary specialization meant that only so much data could be handled at once, emotionally or otherwise. The formation of different tribes allowed man to behave cooperatively, in small numbers. This meant that those on the outside were selectively ignored, considered strangers.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）在一个个体被局限于部落或氏族空间的世界里（停顿一分钟），行动是即时的。环境提供了一个框架，让意识学会以直接方式处理刺激。它学会了如何聚焦。必要的专门化意味着无论情感或其他层面，一次只能处理有限的数据。不同部落的形成使人类得以在小群体中合作行动。这意味着外部的人被选择性忽略，被视为陌生人。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
