source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Therefore each portion of action is aware of its simultaneous experience within all levels. Again, action carries itself along. Each self is therefore aware of its previous gestalt affiliations. Now. Identities may or may not have egos. An atom is an identity--
quotes.translation: 因此，行动的每个部分都意识到自己在所有层面上的同时性经验。再次强调，行动承载着自身前行。因此每个自我都意识到自己先前的完形隶属关系。现在。身份可能有自我，也可能没有自我。一个原子就是一个身份——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The scent image built up by the animal is every bit as real as the visual image. Action cannot be caught and held, and the nature of perceiving an action changes the very nature of the action itself. It is indeed, here again, that tension causes such a change.
quotes.translation: 动物构建的气味意象与视觉意象同样真实。行动无法被捕捉或固定，而感知行动的本质会改变行动本身的特性。确实，在此处再次印证，正是张力引发了这种改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: All creation is constant, and physical reality is formed and maintained in mental realms, sparked by psychic(pause)experiences. These inner events are the results of action's own characteristics. Action continually working upon itself creates more action.
quotes.translation: 现在：一切创造都是持续的，物质实相在心灵领域中被形成并维持，由心灵（停顿）体验所激发。这些内在事件是行动自身特性的结果。行动持续作用于自身，从而产生更多行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now: Your beliefs and intents cause you to pick, from an unpredictable group of actions, those that you want to happen. You experience those events. (To me:) "Your" desire to live straddled the death of the child in an operation. The child's desire to die chose that event. People are as free as atoms are. Give us a moment ... In no way could you predict what would happen to the child in that photograph of yourself.6 In no way now can you "predict" what will happen to you now. You can choose to accept as your reality any number of given unpredictable events. In that respect, the choice is yours, but all the events you do not accept occur nevertheless.
quotes.translation: 现在：你的信念与意图使你从一组不可预测的行动中，挑选出那些你希望发生的事件。你体验这些事件。（对我而言：）你“想要活下去”的渴望跨越了那个孩子手术中的死亡。而孩子“想要死去”的渴望则选择了那个事件。人与原子一样自由。请稍等片刻……你绝无可能预测那张你童年照片中的孩子会发生什么。6 此刻你也绝无可能“预测”自己接下来会发生什么。你可以选择接受任何数量的不可预测事件作为你的实相。就此而言，选择权在你手中，但所有你未接受的事件依然会发生。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The emergence of consciousness into those physical conditions automatically alters them -- a fact not recognized by astrologers. Each child born alters the entire universe,7 and changes the world of its time and birth by bringing into it action not there earlier, in your terms, and by impressing the universe with the stamp -- the indelible stamp -- of its reality. Each child chooses its own probable version of any given birthdate. Such dates are obviously not just points in time, pinpointed in space. In the first place, since all time is simultaneous, you are always dying and being born, and your later experience affects the time of your birth.
quotes.translation: 意识进入那些物质条件时会自动改变它们——这是占星家们未能认识到的事实。每个出生的孩子都会改变整个宇宙，并以其现实性的印记——不可磨灭的印记——影响其出生时代的世界，将你们所谓的、此前不存在的行动带入其中。每个孩子都会选择其任何给定出生日期的可能版本。这样的日期显然不只是时间中的点，在空间中精确定位。首先，由于所有时间都是同时存在的，你始终在死亡与出生，而你后来的经验会影响你出生的时间。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 729
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The psyche expresses itself through action, of course, but it carries behind it the thrust from which life springs, and it seeks the fulfillment of the individual -- and it automatically attempts to produce a social climate or civilization that is productive and creative. It projects its desires outward onto the physical world, seeking through private experience and social contact to actualize its potentials, and in such a way that the potentials of others are also encouraged. It seeks to flesh out its dreams, and when these find no response in social life, it will nevertheless take personal expression in a kind of private religion of its own.
quotes.translation: 心灵当然通过行动表达自身，但它背后携带着生命涌出的推力，寻求个体的圆满——并自动试图创造富有生产力与创造力的社会氛围或文明。它将欲望向外投射到物质世界，通过私人经验与社会接触来实现其潜能，并以这种方式鼓励他人的潜能。它试图将梦想具体化，当这些梦想在社会生活中找不到回应时，它仍会以某种私人宗教的形式进行个人表达。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: ("Looking over those nine-and-a-half months of sessions now, it's fairly obvious what Seth was up to. He'd initially given us the material on Frameworks 1 and 2 in private sessions not long after starting Mass Events, as Rob explained in his notes for Session 814. Yet even though Seth also discussed those psychic frameworks to some degree in a dozen sessions for the book, still he finally took that break in dictation to 're-educate' us, looking at our own previous beliefs and those of the world at large in the light of Frameworks 1 and 2.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The inner ego looks inward, yet in looking inward it looks outward toward those vast portions of the self. Because there is always action within action, and because of the three dilemmas of which we have spoken earlier, the new personalities projected outward into other fields of perception, or other moment points, these other personalities in turn create new ones, and the cycle is again repeated.
quotes.translation: 内在自我向内看，然而在向内看时，它又向外看向自我的广大部分。因为行动中总有行动，又因为我们之前谈到的三种困境，向外投射到其他感知领域或其它时间点的新人格，这些其他人格又会创造新的人格，如此循环往复。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is you who change the apparent form of the action, and give the form a name. It is you who arbitrarily recognize a portion of an action as any particular material object. There are many actions which you do not recognize because you do not perceive them.
quotes.translation: 是你们改变了行动的明显形式，并赋予该形式一个名称。是你们任意地将行动的某一部分识别为任何特定的物质对象。有许多行动你们并未识别，因为你们感知不到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We will later be concerned more deeply with this transparent mobility, for it operates within all systems. And without it your own physical system would not exist. When the nature and behavior of energy as it is seen in action is understood, and when it is applied to the mobility of the human personality, then such sessions as ours will be taken for granted, though this I admit will take a while.
quotes.translation: 我们稍后将更深入地探讨这种透明的流动性，因为它运作于所有系统之内。没有它，你们自己的物质系统便不会存在。当行动中显现的能量之本质与行为被理解，并应用于人类人格的流动性时，像我们这样的课程便会被视为理所当然，尽管我承认这需要一段时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It must, of course, succeed to some extent, or the physically oriented personality as you know it would not exist. The ego is of course a part of action. There are endless levels of action however, which the ego does not perceive. It is possible for the inner and outer egos to merge to some extent, and this merging when it occurs does indeed represent the formation of a new kind of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 它当然必须在某种程度上成功，否则你们所知的、以物质为导向的人格便不会存在。自我自然是行动的一部分。然而，存在着自我无法感知的、无穷无尽的行动层次。内在自我与外在自我有可能在某种程度上融合，而这种融合发生时，确实代表着一种新意识形式的形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: While many of your expectations are formed in childhood, no switch is really stuck in one position, and it is your prerogative to channel your emotional energy into whatever pattern for action you desire. It is extremely important, if difficult, to probe and to discover exactly what your present expectations are. Not your desires but your expectations, for you will only construct physically that environment which you believe capable of construction. It has been said that oftentimes men's expectations are too high for their abilities, but indeed expectations form abilities: and if expectations were higher, so would abilities flourish.
quotes.translation: 虽然你们的许多期望形成于童年，但没有任何开关真的卡死在一个位置上，将情绪能量导向任何你渴望的行动模式，这是你的天赋权利。尽管困难，但深入探查并准确发现你当前的期望极其重要——不是你的欲望，而是你的期望，因为你只会建构出你相信能够建构的物质环境。常有人说人们的期望往往超出能力，但事实上期望塑造能力：若期望更高，能力亦将蓬勃生长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The rejected emotion, in other words, will express itself in any case, but it will do so then as a rebel, outside of the organizational directives of the ego itself. Hence for example, actions that appear senseless to the ego are often the results of such unassimilated or denied emotions. At one time or another such emotions were acceptable to the ego. There was an attraction, or the emotion would not have been permitted to enter into a realm close to ego control.
quotes.translation: 被拒绝的情绪无论如何都会表达自己，但那时它会以叛逆者的姿态出现，脱离自我本身的组织指令。举例来说，自我看来毫无意义的行动，往往就是这类未被同化或遭否认的情绪所致。这些情绪在某个时刻曾为自我所接纳——若非存在吸引力，它们根本不会被允许进入接近自我控制的领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Examine the event as you know it. Then try to trace its emergence from the thread of your own past life as you understand it, and project outward in your mind what other events might emerge from that one to become action in your probable future. This exercise has another part: When you have finished the procedure just given, then change your viewpoint; see the event from the standpoint of someone else who is also involved. No matter how private the experience seems, someone else will have a connection with it. See the episode through his or her eyes, then continue with the procedure just given, only using this altered viewpoint.
quotes.translation: 检视你所知的事件，然后尝试循着你所理解的自身过往生命线索追溯其源头，并在心中向外投射：从这个事件还可能衍生出哪些其他事件，成为你可能未来中的行动。这个练习还有第二部分：完成上述步骤后，转换你的视角——从同样涉入此事的他人立场看待该事件。无论经历看似多么私密，总会有他人与之关联。透过他或她的眼睛观察这个片段，然后继续执行上述步骤，只是改用这个转换后的视角。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 695
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The negative suggestions therefore are symptoms of an inner block of energy and impetus. They represent a rift that has already occurred. It is rather important that I make this point clear. It goes without saying that these which you call negative suggestions are in themselves actions. They represent however dead eddies, the motion that means nothing in dead waters. They are impeding actions.
quotes.translation: 因此，负面暗示是内在能量与动力受阻的症状。它们代表已经发生的裂痕。我必须把这一点说清楚，这相当重要。不言而喻，你们所谓的负面暗示本身就是行动。然而，它们代表的是死水中的死漩涡，毫无意义的运动。它们是阻碍性的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Since suggestion is used constantly, and by every cell in your body, then it is not a question of whether or not you can use suggestion, but of how to use it more effectively. And this will involve a balanced personality, for in such a personality action will be allowed freedom of expression. The ego will gain and not lose in the process, but we will not have an autocratic and willful ego, but a reasonable and even disciplined ego that is aware of its position, aware of its own dependency, as well as of its own peculiar and unique perceptive apartness. For the apartness is dependent upon its being a part of the whole gestalt.
quotes.translation: 既然暗示被持续使用，且被你身体的每个细胞所使用，那么问题不在于你是否能使用暗示，而在于如何更有效地使用它。这将涉及一个平衡的人格，因为在这种人格中，行动将被允许自由表达。在这个过程中，自我会获得而非失去，但我们不会有一个专横任性的自我，而是一个理性甚至自律的自我，它意识到自己的位置，意识到自己的依赖性，也意识到自己独特而特殊的感知独立性。因为这种独立性依赖于它是整体完形的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, however, you understand the reason why even an impeding action is literally accepted by the personality as a portion of the self, and why therefore efforts must be made that will coax the personality to give up any portion of itself, if progress is to be made. Once the personality can understand that an illness has been accepted as a portion of the self, then even the ego will be an aid.
quotes.translation: 然而，现在你明白了为什么即使是阻碍性的行动，也会被人格如实接受为自我的一部分，以及为什么必须努力引导人格放弃自身的任何部分，才能取得进展。一旦人格能够理解疾病已被接受为自我的一部分，那么即使是自我也会成为助力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You will recall that the ego, while disliking change, is nevertheless dependent for its identity upon change. The ego to a large degree, therefore, chooses during its development those characteristic actions which will form its nature. Because the ego necessarily changes however, actions or emotions which at one time it chose as acceptable, at a later date so to speak it may attempt to deny.
quotes.translation: 你应记得，自我虽厌恶改变，却仍依赖改变来维持其身份认同。因此，自我在发展过程中，很大程度上会选择那些能塑造其本质的特征性行动。但由于自我必然改变，它曾一度认可的行动或情绪，在稍后阶段可能会试图否认。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We come therefore to the fact of creative tension. The individual in his psychological state is familiar with creative tension, often in its pure state. So quickly however is the tension transformed into a distortive creation that the sensation of creation is mistakenly accepted as the tension itself, rather than seen for what it is. Creation is the result of tension, though instantly new tension is set up, since tension is a characteristic of action. And each creation, being action, will instantly set up new tension.
quotes.translation: 我们因此触及创造性张力的实相。个体在其心理状态中常能体验到纯粹状态的创造性张力。然而，张力如此迅速地转化为扭曲性创造，以至于创造的感受被误认为张力本身，而非看清其本质。创造是张力的结果，但随即又建立起新的张力，因为张力是行动的特性。而每个创造作为行动，会立即引发新的张力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The following basic subjects are necessary for an understanding of what we are trying to say, particularly for any practical application: the construction of physical matter; the psychological and electrical gestalt that results in the formation of a self; the nature of the dream universe; the electrical system, as it is related to both the physical universe and the inner psychic gestalt; the nature of action; mental enclosures; mental genes; and again, all of these subjects in relationship to their reality as action.
quotes.translation: 以下基础主题对于理解我们试图阐述的内容至关重要，尤其涉及实际应用：物质实相的建构；形成自我所必需的心理与电性完形；梦境宇宙的本质；与物质宇宙及内在心灵完形相关的电性系统；行动的本质；心灵围场；心灵基因；以及所有这些主题与其作为行动之实相的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is not as far-fetched as it might seem, for again, you perceive now more than you realize; although you may not be consciously aware of this, it still falls within the framework of your associated experience. The mere shaking of a hand may be perceived by you as a simple action. You are not consciously aware of the million small actions which make up this seemingly insignificant act.
quotes.translation: 这并不像表面看来那么牵强，因为再次强调，你现在感知到的远比你意识到的要多；虽然你可能没有有意识地觉察到这一点，但它仍然属于你关联经验的框架之内。仅仅一次握手，你可能视为一个简单的动作。你并未有意识地觉察到构成这个看似微不足道的行为的百万个小动作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In certain circles now it is fashionable to deny the intellectual capacities in favor of feeling, sentiment, or intuitive actions. Intellectual concerns then become suspect, and recourse to reason is considered a failing. Instead, of course, intellectual and intuitive behavior should be beautifully blended. In the same way you have attempted to force the expression of love into a purely -- or exclusively -- sexual orientation. An affectionate caress or kiss between members of the same sex is generally not considered proper. The taboos include most aspects of the sense of touch in connection with the human body.
quotes.translation: 在某些圈子里，现在流行否认理智能力，转而推崇感受、情感或直觉行动。于是理智的关切变得可疑，诉诸理性被视为一种缺陷。当然，实际上理智与直觉行为应该美妙地融合。同样地，你曾试图将爱的表达强行限制在纯粹——或唯一——的性取向中。同性之间充满感情的抚摸或亲吻通常被认为不合宜。这些禁忌涵盖了与人体相关的触觉的大多数方面。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "The insight that flashed into my consciousness was that human beings haven't changed either, really, that our more complicated mental processes only make it seem that we have. Coupled with this is the idea that magic, as we call it, reflects a basic part of our natural mental equipment and abilities, but that our present course of action, our focusing upon the material and the intellectual -- the 'reasonable' portions of our psyche -- has created artificial divisions, in which magic seems quite 'unreasonable' or unreal. Actually, our need for magic is a very real, vital, and integral portion of our psyches.
quotes.translation: "闪入我意识的洞见是：人类其实也未曾改变，我们更复杂的心理过程只是让我们看起来改变了。与此相伴的是，我们所谓的魔法，反映了我们天生心智装备与能力的基本部分，但我们当前的行为方向——聚焦于物质与理智，即我们心灵中'合理'的部分——造成了人为的分裂，使得魔法显得相当'不合理'或不真实。实际上，我们对魔法的需求是我们心灵中非常真实、充满活力且不可或缺的一部分。"
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: As long as you believe that either good events or bad ones are meted out by a personified God as the reward or punishment for your actions, or on the other hand that events are largely meaningless, chaotic, subjective knots in the tangled web of an accidental Darwinian world, then you cannot consciously understand your own creativity, or play the role in the universe that you are capable of playing as individuals or as a species. You will instead live in a world where events happen to you, in which you must do sacrifice to the gods of one kind or another, or see yourselves as victims of an uncaring nature.
quotes.translation: 只要你相信好事或坏事是由一位人格化的神祇根据你的行为给予奖惩，或者另一方面认为事件大多是毫无意义、混乱、主观的纠结，如同达尔文式偶然世界中的一团乱麻，那么你就无法有意识地理解自己的创造力，也无法在宇宙中扮演你作为个体或物种所能扮演的角色。相反，你将生活在一个事件发生在你身上的世界里，你必须向某种神祇献祭，或者将自己视为冷漠自然的受害者。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Five weeks ago [in the notes leading off Session 821], I wrote that Jane could resume work on The Further Education of Oversoul Seven -- or Seven Two -- at any time. She finished her first novel about Seven in July 1972, and within a month, long before it was published, she wrote the first five chapters for Seven Two. Then we became involved in so many other projects that she laid it aside until August 1976, when she wrote two more chapters. The book has hovered in the back of her consciousness ever since, waiting until she focused her attention upon it once again. "Seven's got all the time in the world," she laughed more than once. But now that her editor, Tam Mossman, has scheduled a visit to us at the hill house in a couple of weeks [on April 10, to be exact], Jane feels that she wants to study what she's done on Seven Two, go over it with Tam, and perhaps take up work on it again.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Your ego gains assurance from what seems to be the memory of its immediate past. A man who loses memory of past events feels insecure and lost, but other types of personality gestalts operate far differently. Instead of a time sequence that governs or seems to govern thought, mental activity of any kind, and overt action, you have associative processes, offshoots, and possibilities. To some extent you can gain an idea of this through an examination of your own stream of consciousness. But the comparison is highly superficial, for here too continuity reigns, even though associations are given greater play.
quotes.translation: 你的自我从看似对直接过去的记忆中获取信心。一个失去过去事件记忆的人会感到不安全与迷失，但其他类型的人格完形运作方式则大不相同。不是时间序列支配或似乎支配思想、任何形式的心理活动及外在行动，而是联想过程、分支与可能性在起作用。在某种程度上，你可以通过检视自己的意识流来获得对此的理解，但这种比较非常肤浅，因为即使联想被给予更大的发挥空间，连续性仍然占据主导。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In the psychological realm it goes without saying that a repressed emotion is never really repressed, since action cannot be retained. It must change. The cause of such difficulties lies not in the repression of an emotion, for this is impossible. The emotion in one way or another, will out, but the difficulty lies in the attempt to repress the emotion. This attempt is itself an action.
quotes.translation: 在心理领域，不言而喻的是，被压抑的情绪从未真正被压抑，因为行动无法被保留。它必须改变。这类困难的根源不在于压抑情绪，因为这是不可能的。情绪总会以某种方式显现出来，但困难在于试图压抑情绪的行为本身。这种试图本身就是一种行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is not meant to dilute the function or natural abilities of reasoning awareness, for its powers allow you to focus experience in a highly specific manner, and to direct energy with great purposeful attention. (Pause.) In your terms, this action is in the process of automatically changing the nature of rational consciousness -- which is, as you think of it, in a state of evolution.
quotes.translation: 这并非要削弱理性觉知的功能或天生能力，因为其力量使你能够以高度特定的方式聚焦经验，并以极具目的性的专注力引导能量。（停顿。）用你们的话来说，这种行动正自动改变理性意识的本质——而你们所认为的理性意识，正处在进化状态中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If its built-in instincts are left alone the body is basically self-regulating. It does not kill off all red blood cells if there are too many of them at a given time. It has better sense. But in your fear of negative thoughts you often attempt to deny all normal aggressiveness, and at the first glimpse of it bring up your mental antibodies prepared for action. In so doing you try to repudiate the validity of your own experience. If you do not feel your individual reality, then you can never realize that you form it, and so can change it. It is this denial of experience, and the energy blockages involved, that build up the accumulation of unnecessary "unnatural" guilt. The body itself cannot understand these blocked messages, and cries out to express its own corporeal knowledge of the moment as it experiences it. (Intently:) You mentally shout in such situations that you do not feel what you feel.
quotes.translation: 若其内置本能不受干扰，身体基本上能自我调节。它不会在特定时刻因红细胞过多而将其全部杀死——它更有分寸。但你们因恐惧负面思想，常试图否认所有正常的攻击性，一旦瞥见它便立即调动精神抗体准备行动。如此做时，你们试图否定自身经验的有效性。若你感受不到自己的个体实相，便永远无法意识到自己正在创造它，因而也无法改变它。正是这种对经验的否认，以及由此产生的能量阻塞，累积成不必要的"非自然"罪恶感。身体无法理解这些被阻塞的信息，它呼喊着要表达当下体验到的肉身知识。（专注地：）在这种情境下，你们在精神上大喊自己感受不到所感之物。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now all of this certainly sounds unscientific to many people, yet most of my readers have already picked up a different version of the nature of science, or they would not be reading this book to begin with. The private oracle: What does that mean? And what does it have to do with the unknown reality? More, what does it have to do with the practical world? The private oracle is the voice of the inner multidimensional self -- the part of each person not fully contained in his or her personhood, the part of the unknown self-structure out of which personhood, with its physical alliance, springs. Basically that portion of the psyche is outside of space and time, while enabling you to operate in it.4 It deals intimately with probabilities -- (louder:) the source of all predictable action.
quotes.translation: 如今这一切对许多人而言当然显得不科学，但我的多数读者早已接纳了科学本质的不同版本，否则他们根本不会开始阅读这本书。私密神谕：这究竟意味着什么？它与未知实相有何关联？更进一步，它与现实世界又有何关联？私密神谕是内在多维自我的心声——那是每个人未被完全包含在人格中的部分，是未知自性结构的一部分，人格及其物质联盟皆由此生发。本质上，心灵的这一部分存在于时空之外，同时使你得以在时空中运作。它密切处理着或然性——（提高音量：）一切可预测行动的源头。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 704
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Much information does not even reach the brain (the mind is aware of such data, however). In man, the psychic-physical structure has at every moment a complete up-to-date picture of pertinent information about all events that will in any way affect the organism. All actions are taken with this information available. In the dream state such data becomes transformed, again, into pseudophysical pictures -- reflections of events that might occur, previews of probable sequences. These are flashed before a consciousness that momentarily focuses upon the inner rather than the outer arena of reality.
quotes.translation: 许多信息甚至没有到达大脑（然而心灵是觉察这些数据的）。在人类身上，心灵-身体结构每时每刻都拥有关于所有可能影响有机体的事件的完整最新信息图景。所有行动都是在掌握这些信息的情况下进行的。在梦境中，这些数据再次转化为伪物理图像——可能发生的事件的倒影，可能序列的预览。这些图像在意识暂时聚焦于内在而非外在实相舞台时闪现。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For the inner self can perceive it, and does change it. The idea of inverted time states that time flows in all directions, and that as each action affects every other action, so time constantly affects itself and continually reacts within itself. The past moment is never completed. Consciously you have simply lost sight of it, and have not followed it through in its endless depths.
quotes.translation: 因为内在自我能够感知它，并且确实改变它。倒转时间的概念表明时间向所有方向流动，并且每个行动都影响其他行动，因此时间不断影响自身并在自身内部持续反应。过去的时刻从未完成。你只是有意识地忽略了它，没有跟随它进入其无尽的深处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: （Mark is Bill Macdonnel's entity name. See Session 68 in Volume 2.）

quotes.text: Unifying principles are groups of actions about which the whole personality forms itself at any given time. These unifying principles may change, and do change, usually in a relatively smooth fashion, when action is allowed to flow unimpeded.
quotes.translation: 统一原则是一组行动，整个个性在任何特定时刻都围绕这些行动形成。当行动被允许不受阻碍地流动时，这些统一原则可能会改变，也确实会改变，通常以相对平稳的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. Let us return to our discussion on action, and tie this in with action as it is seen within dreams. Your own dreams greatly affect the actions that you take within the physical situation, and as you know telepathy operates within dreams.
quotes.translation: 现在。让我们回到关于行动的讨论，并将其与梦境中的行动联系起来。你自己的梦境极大地影响着你在物质情境中所采取的行动，而如你所知，心电感应也在梦境中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The ego is that portion of the self which experiences time as continuity, and to whom experience is a series of stimuli and responses carried on one after another. And yet this is in itself a division, so to speak, or a kind of value fulfillment, for the simultaneous nature of a given action is here experienced in slow motion, as a child must learn to walk before the child can run.
quotes.translation: 自我是自体中将时间体验为连续性的那一部分，对自我而言，经验是一连串依次进行的刺激与反应。然而，这本身可以说是一种分割，或是一种价值完成，因为特定行动的同时性本质在此以慢动作被体验，就像孩子必须先学会走路才能奔跑一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: What you call negative suggestions represent discordant actions. Unless the main reasons are discovered, the distortive actions will keep reoccurring. In many cases quite a simple exercise will almost immediately begin to make an improvement. With these exercises you are familiar, for in your psychological time the self is momentarily in connection with its more extensive portions.
quotes.translation: 你所谓的负面暗示代表不协调的行动。除非找出主要原因，否则扭曲的行动会不断重复。在许多情况下，一个相当简单的练习几乎能立即开始带来改善。这些练习你都很熟悉，因为在你的心理时间里，自体暂时与它更广大的部分相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is, momentarily, literally accepted by the personality as a part of the self, and here lies its danger. It is not just symbolically accepted, and I am not speaking in symbolic terms. The impeding action, as seen in an illness for example, is quite literally accepted by the personality structure, and by all corresponding systems, as a portion of the self. Once this occurs, a conflict instantly develops. The self does not want to give up a portion of itself, even while that portion may be painful or disadvantageous. There are many psychological reasons behind such a psychological truth.
quotes.translation: 它被人格暂时性地、字面地接纳为自我的一部分，其危险正在于此。这并非象征性的接纳，我也不是在用象征性术语说话。例如在疾病中所见的阻碍性行动，确实被人格结构及所有相应系统字面地接纳为自我的一部分。一旦发生这种情况，冲突便立即产生。自我不愿放弃自身的任何部分，即便那部分可能带来痛苦或不利。这种心理真相背后存在着许多心理原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Action is therefore a part of all structure. Here again is an apparent dilemma, an exquisite imbalance whose result is consciousness and existence. For consciousness and existence do not exist because of delicate balances, so much as they are made possible by lacks of balances, so richly creative there would be no reality as it is understood to be, if balance were ever maintained.
quotes.translation: 因此行动是所有结构的一部分。这里再次呈现出一个明显的困境，一种精妙的不平衡，其结果是意识与存在。因为意识与存在并非源于精妙的平衡，而恰恰是由不平衡所促成——这种不平衡如此富有创造力，以至于若平衡得以维持，现实便不会以我们所理解的方式存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The next adjacent level now would be A-1-c, which is an extension of the one just given, in which there is greater freedom of action, mobility and experience. Here to some extent there is some participation in the events perceived. There is no need to go deeply into any of these beyond this point, because ordinarily you will not be involved with them, and they lead into realities that have little reference to your own. They are states of consciousness too divorced, and under usual circumstances, this is as far as your present consciousness is able to go in that particular direction.
quotes.translation: 下一个相邻层次将是A-1-c，即上述层次的延伸，其中行动、流动性和体验具有更大自由。在此程度上，对感知事件存在某种参与。无需深入探讨这些层次，因为通常情况下你们不会涉及它们，它们导向与你们自身现实几乎无关的实相。这些意识状态过于疏离，在常规情况下，你们当前的意识在特定方向上所能达到的极限即在于此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: While so materialized, action is aware of itself in two basic ways: through its innate comprehension of itself, and through a secondary, more limited but more focused perception of a self belonging to such a materialization. The innate comprehension of course involves us with the inner self. The secondary self belonging to the materialization gives us, within your field, the ego.
quotes.translation: 当行动如此具体化时，它通过两种基本方式觉知自身：通过对其自身的内在理解，以及通过属于这种具体化的一个自我的次要、更有限但更聚焦的感知。内在理解当然涉及内在自体。属于具体化的次要自我，在你们的领域内，给予我们所谓的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I will comment here for all of this fits into our discussion. Existence is not a game in the terms spoken of by our Mr. Watts, though he is often on the right track. We do not have a static god, recreating himself as he is in various guises. Using those terms, we have a god constantly in the process of creation, action acting upon itself, always with new possibilities, each existence bringing forth new varieties. (Pause.) Legitimately, each personality is a co-creator, and part of All That Is, but this All That Is constantly develops, and develops in terms of growth fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 我在此评论，因为这一切都符合我们的讨论。存在并非华兹先生所说的那种游戏，尽管他常常走在正确的轨道上。我们没有一个静态的神，以各种伪装重新创造自己。用那些术语来说，我们有一个不断处于创造过程中的神，行动作用于自身，总是带着新的可能性，每个存在都带来新的变种。（停顿。）合法地说，每个个体都是共同创造者，是万有的一部分，但这个万有不断成长，并以成长完成的方式发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Let me take this moment to state again that there are no devils or demons, except as you create them out of your belief. As mentioned earlier, good and evil effects are basically illusions. In your terms all acts, regardless of their seeming nature, are a part of a greater good. I am not saying that a good end justifies what you would consider an evil action. While you still accept the effects of good and evil, then you had better choose the good.
quotes.translation: 让我在此刻再次说明，没有魔鬼或恶魔，除非你们根据自己的信念创造它们。如前所述，善与恶的效果基本上是幻相。在你们的术语中，所有行动，无论其表面性质如何，都是更大善的一部分。我并不是说好的目的可以合理化你们认为的邪恶行动。当你们仍然接受善与恶的效果时，那么你们最好选择善。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Those belonging to this (Milumet) family will not be in positions of any authority, generally speaking, for they will not concentrate that long on specific physical data. However, they may be found in your country precisely where you might not expect them to be: on some assembly lines that require simple repetitive action -- in factories that do not require speed, however. They usually choose less industrialized countries, then, with a slower pace of life. They have simple, direct, childish mannerisms, and may appear to be stupid. They do not bother with the conventions.
quotes.translation: 属于这个（米路梅特）家族的人通常不会担任任何权威职位，因为他们无法长时间专注于具体的物质数据。然而，他们可能会出现在你国家里最意想不到的地方：在一些不需要速度、只需简单重复动作的工厂装配线上。他们通常会选择工业化程度较低、生活节奏较慢的国家。他们举止简单、直接、带着孩子气，可能显得愚钝。他们不理会世俗常规。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 736
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: If you will consider the projection of a thought, that is intangible, so that it affects another individual, and hence both directly and indirectly affects the action of physical matter, then you may consider the possibility of other such projections. We have here a rather delicate point. I have said that there are no duplicates. Yet you may say, are not some thoughts duplicates? The variations may indeed be slight, but the variations are always present. A thought transmitted knowingly or unknowingly by "A" is not precisely the same thought when it reaches receiver "B".
quotes.translation: 如果你思考一个念头的投射——它虽无形却能影响另一个人，进而直接或间接影响物质实相的行动——那么你就能考虑其他类似投射的可能性。这里有一个相当微妙之处。我曾说过没有完全相同的副本。但你会问：难道有些念头不是副本吗？差异或许确实微小，但差异始终存在。由"A"有意或无意传递的念头，当它到达接收者"B"时，已不再是完全相同的念头。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Organized action is an excellent method of exerting influence, but only when each member is self-activating; only when he or she extends individuality through group action, and does not mindlessly seek to follow the dictates of others.
quotes.translation: 有组织的行动是发挥影响力的绝佳方式，但前提是每个成员都能自我激活；只有当每个人通过群体行动扩展自身独特性，而非盲目追随他人指令时，这才成立。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (With amusement:) The male scientist considers the rocket his private symbol of sexual power. (Pause.) He feels he has the prerogative to use power in any way he chooses. Now many scientists are "idealists." (Pause.) They believe that their search for answers, however, justifies almost any means, or sacrifices, not only on their parts but on the parts of others. They become fanatics when they ignore the rights of others, and when they defile life in a misguided attempt to understand it (see Session 850, with Note 3).
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Man automatically began to form culture. He did not start with the rudiments of culture, as is thought. He did not learn (pause) through trial and error to think clear thoughts. He thought quite clearly from the beginning. He did learn through trial and error various ways of best translating those thoughts into physical action. The first cultures were as rich as your own. In your terms, reading and writing are great advantages, but it is also true that in the past the mind was also used to record information, and transmit it with an artistry that you do not now use.
quotes.translation: 人类自动开始形成文化。他并非如人们所想的那样从文化的雏形起步。他并非通过（停顿）试错学习清晰思考。他从一开始就思考得相当清晰。他确实通过试错学会了如何以最佳方式将这些思想转化为实际行动。最早的文化与你们的文化同样丰富。以你们的说法，读写能力是巨大的优势，但同样真实的是，在过去，心智也被用来记录信息，并以你们现在不再使用的艺术性方式传递信息。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The complicated organism which is the human personality with its physical structure, has evolved, along with many other structures, a highly differentiated "I" consciousness, whose very nature is such that it attempts to preserve the apparent boundaries of identity. To do so it chooses between actions, for the very choice, or act of choosing, and ability to do so, represents the nature of identity. But beneath this sophisticated gestalt are the simpler foundations of its being, and indeed the very acceptance of all stimuli without which identity would be impossible.
quotes.translation: 这个复杂的有机体——具有生理结构的人类人格——与许多其他结构一同演化，发展出高度分化的"我"意识，其本质特性在于试图维护身份认同的明显边界。为此它在行动之间做出选择，因为选择本身、选择的行为以及选择的能力，正代表了身份认同的本质。但在这精密的完形之下，存在着其存在的更简单基础，事实上正是对所有刺激的接纳——没有这种接纳，身份认同就不可能存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: They are aware of themselves as a part of action, and therefore through capsule comprehension, which we have discussed, the simple atoms and molecules are aware of their own basic immortality. All this is basic knowledge, if you would understand why the personality accepts even an impeding action, or pain or illness, as a part of itself, despite the ego's resistance to pain.
quotes.translation: 它们意识到自己是行动的一部分，因此通过我们讨论过的胶囊式理解，简单的原子和分子意识到自身基本的不朽性。如果你想理解为何人格会接纳甚至阻碍性的行动、痛苦或疾病作为自身的一部分——尽管自我抗拒痛苦——那么这一切都是基本知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: One of the reasons, Joseph, for your own lack of festive spirit in the past has been the result of your realization that this gap between idealism and action is great. You could not therefore enter into what you felt to be the hypocrisy of the season. All the more since you have no particular conviction, anymore than Ruburt has, concerning the historic existence of a Christ.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你过去缺乏节日气氛的原因之一，正是你意识到理想主义与行动之间的鸿沟如此巨大。因此你无法投入你认为是虚伪的节庆氛围——尤其当你和鲁柏一样，对基督的历史存在并无特别确信时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The "true facts" are that you exist in this life and outside it simultaneously. You are "between lives" and "in lives" at once. The deeper dimensions of reality are such that your thoughts and actions not only affect the life you know, but also reach into all of those other simultaneous existences. What you think now is unconsciously perceived by some hypothetical 14th-century self. The psyche is open-ended. No system is closed, psychological systems least of all. Your life is a dreaming experience to other portions of your greater reality which focus elsewhere.
quotes.translation: "真实情况"是：你同时存在于此生与此生之外。你既"处于生命间隙"又"处于生命之中"。实相的更深维度决定了你的思想与行动不仅影响你所知的生命，更会触及所有其他同时存在的生命。你此刻的所思所想，正被某个假设中的十四世纪自我无意识地感知着。心灵是开放的，没有任何系统是封闭的——心理系统尤其如此。对你那聚焦于别处的更大实相的其他部分而言，你的人生不过是一场梦境体验。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Creation is constant. Due to the nature of action creation cannot be anything but simultaneous. Each act of creation brings forth another, and opens up further dimensions of activity. Within your own system, thought becomes materialized, and there is literally no end to the activity of thoughts. Thoughts however are connected with language and with highly organized ego development. They are translations and symbols for inner activity. As a rule they are highly physically oriented, their function being to acquaint the physically adapted ego with some inner data.
quotes.translation: 创造是持续不断的。基于行动的本质，创造只能是同时性的。每个创造行为都会催生下一个，并开启更广阔的活动维度。在你的系统内，思想会物质化，而思想的活动永无止境。然而思想与语言及高度组织化的自我发展相关联——它们是内在活动的翻译与象征。通常而言，它们高度偏向物质导向，其功能是让适应物质世界的自我认知某些内在数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Because you are forced at this point to perceive actions in a separate and successive fashion you more or less naturally take it for granted that one thing causes another, or that one action could not occur before another that appears to follow it. This is of course not the case, although it is an example of the distortions you get when you rely upon the outer senses only.
quotes.translation: 由于你在此阶段被迫以分离且连续的方式感知行动，你或多或少自然地认为一件事导致另一件事，或一个行动不可能发生在看似紧随其后的另一个行动之前。这当然并非实情，尽管这是当你仅依赖外在感官时所产生的扭曲的一个例子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You perceive however but one flicker, one small dimension of any given action as a rule. As in the case of your own illness, Joseph, you perceived the physical effect of the mental action, which was but a small portion of the event.
quotes.translation: 然而，你通常只感知到任何给定行动的一丝闪烁、一个微小维度。正如约瑟夫你自身疾病的情况，你感知到了心智行动的身体效应，而这只是该事件的一小部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: But you have on a subconscious level all the knowledge and experience of your previous selves upon which to build. Your dreams are free from the restrictions imposed by your ego, and your dreams affect your daily life much more than you know. For situations appear in them that affect your actions, and these are elements from your own previous selves. This is a large subject; but though I can tell you some things about your future, the future is not predestined, and subconsciously you are well aware yourself of what will happen, and all human beings are.
quotes.translation: 但在潜意识层面，你拥有所有先前自我的知识与经验作为基础。你的梦境不受自我施加的限制，而你的梦对你日常生活的影响远超你所知。因为梦中出现的情境会影响你的行动，这些元素来自你自身的先前自我。这是一个庞大的主题；但尽管我能告诉你一些关于你未来的事，未来并非预先注定，而你在潜意识中早已清楚将会发生什么，所有人类皆是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The very nature of the ego and of the personality is formed by the ability to choose between actions or stimuli; but life as it is not connected to a highly differentiated ego, rejoices in all stimuli, as sensation, whether it is pleasurable or painful, for these distinctions do not exist in your terms. In the beginning of our sessions I spoke in a general manner, for example, saying that trees and plant life had a consciousness, but not a developed ego system. The tree, therefore, is conscious of the pain connected with, say, the severing of a limb.
quotes.translation: 自我与人格的本质正是由在行动或刺激之间做出选择的能力所塑造；但与高度分化的自我无关的生命，却欣喜于所有刺激，将其视为感受，无论是愉悦还是痛苦——因为这类区分在你们的层面上并不存在。在课程初期，我曾泛泛而谈，例如说树木与植物拥有意识，但缺乏发达的自我系统。因此，树木能意识到与断枝相关的痛苦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your actions take place with such seeming smoothness that you do not realize the order involved. A volcanic eruption in one corner of the world will ultimately affect the entire earth in varying degrees. An emotional eruption will do the same thing on another level, altering the local area primarily but also sending out its ripples into the mass psychological environment. The psyche's picture of reality, then, would be equally incomprehensible to the conscious mind because of the intense focus upon singularity that your usual consciousness requires.
quotes.translation: 你们的行动看似如此流畅，以至于你们未能察觉其中蕴含的秩序。世界某角落的火山爆发，最终会以不同程度影响整个地球。一场情感爆发在另一层面上也会产生同样效应，主要改变局部区域，但也会将其涟漪扩散至集体心理环境。因此，心灵对实相的描绘对意识心智而言同样难以理解，因为你们通常的意识需要极度聚焦于单一性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is wrong to think that restraint under such circumstances or discussions is cowardly, though of course, it may be. To refrain from argument while simultaneously and deliberately forcing thoughts or pictures of peace, represents a positive action. The intensity of the peaceful images or thoughts unfortunately rarely match the intensity of the bitterness, you see. Thoughts of reconciliation or peace actually and practically do their bit to destroy the causes of war. Since Ruburt has somewhat come around, you may take a break and I shall continue.
quotes.translation: 认为在此类情境或讨论中保持克制是懦弱的，这种想法是错误的——尽管它当然也可能是。在刻意强迫自己不去争辩的同时，将和平的意象或想法注入心中，这本身就是一种积极行动。可惜的是，和平意象或想法的强度往往难以匹配怨恨的强度。和解与和平的念头实际上确实在尽其本分地摧毁战争的成因。既然鲁柏已有所回心转意，你们可以休息片刻，我将继续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now, putting these two statements together, you see that an individual will perceive basic reality, in the main, only from his own reference point, and through his outer sense apparatus. His perception of basic reality in one way does not change the nature of that reality or of that action, as it exists independently of his field of reference. However, the very distortions that occur in his attempt to perceive this reality results in a new reality. What he perceives then is legitimate, for his very perception of it is the basis for its existence.
quotes.translation: 现在，将这两句话结合起来，你会发现个体主要只能从自己的参考点出发，通过外在感官装置来感知基本实相。他对基本实相的单向感知并不会改变该实相或该行动的本质——这些本质独立存在于他的参考场域之外。然而，他在试图感知这实相时所产生的扭曲本身，却造就了一个新的实相。他所感知到的事物因此是正当的，因为正是他的感知构成了其存在的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is only the ego that steps from moment to moment, as a man who walks from puddle to puddle. It is only the ego who drowns in time. Therefore, since only the ego is momentarily imprisoned within the focus of your plane, it is only the ego who probes so slowly into simultaneous action, perceiving it bit by bit and sip by sip. So now you will see what I meant when I spoke about the limitless self, for the whole self is not so bound. The whole self could and does perceive a limitless number of such moment points simultaneously. And now hear this:
quotes.translation: 只有自我才会像踏着水洼行走的人那样，从一个瞬间跳跃到另一个瞬间。只有自我才会溺毙于时间之中。因此，既然只有自我暂时被囚禁于你们层面的焦点中，也只有自我才会如此缓慢地探索同时性行动，一点一滴地啜饮感知。现在你该明白我谈及无限自性时的真意了——因为整体自性并不受此束缚。整体自性能够且确实同时感知着无数个这样的瞬间点。请听好：
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The hope and the possibilities here, as well as some of the dangers, lie in the fact that the ego does indeed change, and is not one specific reality but a series or group of actions, with direction, that have the potentiality for unlimited value fulfillment. The ego will never be less than it is now. It may very well be more. Possibilities for development here are very great, but most such possibilities lie still in the future, and only, so far, as possibilities. There is nothing that will force the ego to enlarge the scope of its awareness.
quotes.translation: 这里的希望与可能性，以及某些危险，都源于一个事实：自我确实在改变，它并非单一固定的实相，而是一系列或一组具有方向性的行动，这些行动蕴含着无限价值完成的潜能。自我永远不会比现在更少。它完全可能变得更多。此处发展的可能性极为广阔，但大多数可能性仍存在于未来，目前仅作为可能性存在。没有任何力量会强迫自我扩展其觉知的范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Perception of beauty through the senses is the trigger on your plane for subsequent inner perceptions. The two are so closely bound, through music for example, which can only be appreciated through the senses. Psychic actions take place which lead the individual beyond the senses. There is much more to be said here. There is a phrase which I will explain at a later date--inner senses--which you will find extremely interesting. By this I mean senses within the senses. I would use behind the senses but I believe this would lead to confusion.
quotes.translation: 通过感官感知美，是你在物质层面上触发后续内在感知的契机。两者紧密相连——例如音乐，唯有通过感官才能欣赏。随后发生的灵性活动会引导个体超越感官。此处尚有更多可探讨之处。有个术语我将在日后解释——内我感官——你会发现它极为有趣。我指的是感官中的感官。我本想用"感官背后"这个说法，但恐怕会引起混淆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You remember this from our material on action and the personality. The ego therefore is pleased when information is proven correct. (Long pause.) If the nature of perception were clearly understood then the nature of reality as you know it would also be understood much more clearly. Only half the process of perception, so-called, is even considered, however. Only half of the circle is known. The entire circle consists of those projections outward that form events, as well as the mechanisms by which the events are then physically perceived.
quotes.translation: 你应记得我们在"行动与人格"资料中讨论过的内容。因此当信息被证实正确时，自我会感到愉悦。（长停顿）然而，若感知的本质能被清晰理解，你所认知的现实本质也将被更透彻地领悟。但人们通常只考虑所谓感知过程的一半，只知晓这个圆环的一半。完整的圆环既包含向外投射形成事件的过程，也包含随后通过物理机制感知这些事件的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You can indeed to a large measure train yourself to react to constructive rather than impeding suggestions. This merely means that you will, or may to some extent, choose the direction in which action within you will move. This also implies that some part of the personality does the choosing, and is capable of distinguishing a constructive suggestion from an impeding one. And here it is necessary that we discuss more thoroughly the nature or characteristics of constructive suggestions versus impeding ones, for one may turn into the other.
quotes.translation: 你确实能在很大程度上训练自己，对建设性而非阻碍性的暗示做出反应。这仅意味着你将在某种程度上选择内在行动流动的方向。这也暗示着人格的某部分在进行选择，且能区分建设性暗示与阻碍性暗示。在此我们必须更深入地探讨建设性暗示与阻碍性暗示的本质或特性——因为两者可能相互转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: A very delicate network of imbalances is here maintained. The ego must not be too rigid, or too much a disciplinarian, or it ceases to speak for the whole personality, and becomes a warden, imprisoning the main expressive urges of the deeper self. It must not on the other hand be composed of too disorganized a system of actions, for in this case it is not capable of maintaining a consistent sense of identity or purpose, and is not strong enough to act in a magnetic manner, that will attract or hold the basic energies of the personality.
quotes.translation: 此处维持着一套极为精微的不平衡网络。自我既不能过于僵化，也不能成为严苛的纪律执行者，否则它将不再代表整个人格发声，反而沦为狱卒，禁锢深层自体的主要表达冲动。另一方面，自我也不能由过于混乱的行动系统构成，否则它将无法维持一致的认同感或目的感，也缺乏足够的力量以磁性方式运作，从而无法吸引或维系人格的基本能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego itself attempts as its function to be the director and center of other functions. The ego, while considering itself apart from action, is obviously not apart from it. As dreams allow the inner self great freedom, and as in dreams great perspectives of time are available, and great freedom in space, though no space as you know it is involved, so it is possible for the ego itself to achieve the experience of freedom from time and space, if it would only allow itself for a short while to relax the intensity of its objective focus.
quotes.translation: 自我本身试图以其他功能之导演与中心为其功能。自我虽自认与行动分离，但显然并非如此。正如梦境赋予内在自体极大自由，在梦中可获得时间之广阔视角与空间之无限自由——尽管其中不涉及你所认知的空间——自我同样有可能体验脱离时间与空间的自由，只要它允许自己短暂放松客观焦点的强度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other words, an action cannot be judged as an impeding one without a thorough knowledge of the other actions that result in the makeup of any given personality. This is extremely important. To overlook this point is to risk the adoption on the part of the personality of a more serious illness.
quotes.translation: 换言之，若不彻底了解构成特定人格的其他行动，便无法判定某个行动是否为阻碍性行动。这一点极为重要。若忽视此点，人格可能因此招致更严重的疾病。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Actions have an electrical reality. Your outer senses do not perceive electrical realities of this nature. Nevertheless, you are a gestalt of electrical actions. Within the physical matter of your chromosomes there are electrically coded systems. These are not the chromosomes themselves. The chromosomes are the physical materialization of the inner electrical data.
quotes.translation: 行动具有电性实相。你们的外在感官无法感知这种本质的电性实相。然而，你们是电性行动的完形。在你们染色体的物质结构内，存在着电性编码系统。这些系统并非染色体本身，染色体是内在电性数据的物质显化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （"Abstract" art done in this manner would be an attempt to appeal, to generate an emotional response--in other words action on our plane--on a subconscious level. This would enable the emotional response so generated to radiate its warmth through all levels of our being. The appeal of "recognizable" art is more direct, and may penetrate the being in reverse direction, that is from the top down. Whether it is as profound I cannot say.）
quotes.translation: （以这种方式创作的"抽象"艺术，试图在潜意识层面引发情感反应——换言之，在我们这个层面引发行动。这能使由此产生的情感反应，将其温暖辐射至我们存在的所有层次。"可辨识"艺术的感染力更为直接，可能以反向方式渗透存在，即自上而下。至于其是否同样深刻，我无法断言。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. So-called hunches indeed are often caused by an inner recognition that a given event might occur. As you know, there is no cause and effect as you understand it. Nevertheless there are probabilities. Now basically it is not true to say that an individual's decisions must be based upon concrete events within his own past, nor that he is largely imprisoned by his past, nor that his future actions are predetermined by his past experience. For as you now understand the past is as real as the future, no more and no less. The past exists as far as the individual is concerned as a pattern of electromagnetic currents within the brain, and these connections constantly change.
quotes.translation: 现在。所谓直觉确实常源于对特定事件可能发生的内在认知。如你所知，并不存在你所理解的因果律。然而确实存在或然性。从根本上说，认为个人的决定必须基于自身过去的具象事件，认为他很大程度上被过去所禁锢，认为他的未来行动由过往经验预先决定——这些说法都不正确。因为如你此刻所理解的，过去与未来同样真实，不多也不少。就个人而言，过去以脑内电磁流模式的形式存在，而这些连接不断在改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In most cases children grow up, of course (pause), although in the vast overall picture of nature (pause) a goodly proportion of individuals do indeed take other courses. They serve other functions, they have other purposes, they take part in life through a different cast of action. They affect life while themselves not completely immersed in it. They die young. They are aborted. They remain, however, an important element in life's overall picture -- part of a psychological underpainting that always affects later versions.
quotes.translation: 在大多数情况下，孩子当然会长大（停顿），尽管在自然界的宏观图景中（停顿），相当比例的个体确实选择了其他路径。他们服务于其他功能，怀有不同目的，通过另一种行动模式参与生命。他们在不完全沉浸于生命的同时影响着生命。他们英年早逝，或遭流产。然而，他们始终是生命整体图景中的重要元素——如同心理底稿的一部分，永远影响着后续的版本。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: Ego also fears spontaneity, for it cannot control action; being a part of action, most of its efforts of necessity are thwarted. Yet it is precisely this struggle between ego's struggles for stability, and the personality's attempt to expand spontaneously, that is at the basis of much of mankind's achievements, and that is certainly the basis for much of his art.
quotes.translation: 自我同样畏惧自发性，因为它无法控制行动；作为行动的一部分，它的大部分努力必然受挫。然而，正是自我追求稳定的挣扎与人格自发扩展的尝试之间的冲突，构成了人类诸多成就的基础，也无疑是其艺术创作的根基。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When man feels powerless, however, and in a state of generalized fear, he can even turn the most natural earthly ingredients against himself. Your television, and your arts and sciences as well, add up to mass meditations. In your culture, at least, the educated in the literary arts provide you with novels featuring antiheroes, and often portray an individual existence [as being] without meaning, in which no action is sufficient to mitigate the private puzzlement or anguish.
quotes.translation: 然而，当人类感到无力且处于普遍恐惧状态时，甚至会将最自然的大地元素转而对抗自身。你们的电视、艺术与科学，共同构成了集体冥想。至少在你们的文化中，受过文学艺术教育的人会创作以反英雄为主角的小说，常常描绘个体存在毫无意义的状态——没有任何行动足以缓解私密的困惑或痛苦。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

SESSION 805, MAY 16, 1977
9:28 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Still, to the unconscious the problem has been set and given. In the following deep protected areas of sleep, the higher centers of the inner self are allowed to function and come to the aid of the three-dimensionally oriented portion of the personality. This more liberated self sees the situation much more clearly, suggests a given line of action (but does not order it), and informs the dreaming self. The dreaming self then manufactures a group of dreams in which the solution is stated within a symbolic dream situation.
quotes.translation: 然而，问题已被设定并交付给无意识。在接下来深层受保护的睡眠区域中，内在自我的更高中心得以运作，并协助人格中面向三维实相的部分。这个更自由的自我更清晰地看清处境，建议一条特定的行动路线（但不下达命令），并告知做梦的自我。做梦的自我随后制造一组梦境，在其中解决方案以象征性的梦境情境呈现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The suggestion itself, psychologically, also prevents you from simply being swept away, willy-nilly, by the collective energy. You must understand that use of such energy does in no way suggest monopolizing it. You do not deprive others. Your own actions continue to produce additional energy. This method of utilizing energy is also used in the creation of dream images. The form of the images is not an illusion. You simply have form without mass, to all practical purposes, and there is no contradiction in that statement.
quotes.translation: 从心理学角度来看，这个建议本身也防止你被集体能量随意席卷而去。你必须明白，使用这种能量绝不意味着独占它。你并未剥夺他人。你自己的行动会持续产生额外的能量。这种运用能量的方法也用于创造梦境影像。影像的形式并非幻象。就所有实际目的而言，你只是拥有无形体的形式，这个说法并无矛盾之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, you see, you have been robbing yourself of an experience of truly knowing these individual men, for you have not permitted yourself to see them as they are and as they have been. After three lives as a male, you have indeed acclimated yourself very well. You have been somewhat envious. I senseyou yelling to yourself when you see a male in strong action or performance, I senseyou yelling to yourself --I can do that better than you can for I have done it before--again this is reflected in the way you drive your car.
quotes.translation: 你看，你一直在剥夺自己真正了解这些个体的经验，因为你没有允许自己看见他们本来的样子和曾经的样子。在经历三世男性身份后，你确实已适应得很好。你一直有些嫉妒。我感觉到当你看到男性在强烈行动或表现时，你在内心对自己呐喊——我比你们做得更好，因为我以前就做过——这再次反映在你开车的方式中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: All of these procedures are unnecessary to consciousness itself, however. They are necessary to develop communication between nonphysical consciousness and the physical form which it has adopted. Consciousness, in forming an image, or creating it, then responds to it creatively, setting up frameworks for further creative actions. Consciousness experiences reality directly, but having formed physical matter into a personal image, it must then creatively translate data to that physical brain. It must keep it informed.
quotes.translation: 然而，所有这些程序对意识本身而言并非必要。它们是发展非物理意识与其所采用的物质形态之间沟通所必需的。意识在形成意象或创造它之后，会对其做出创造性回应，为后续的创造性行动建立框架。意识直接体验实相，但既然已将物质形相塑造成个人意象，它就必须创造性地将数据转译给那个物质大脑，并使其保持信息畅通。

quotes.text: It is important that it be understood that suggestion, as you know it, is but the manifestation of inner flows and inner directions. It would instead entangle itself within the power of its own energy, and be unable to form any long-lasting patterns or frameworks within which fulfillments and fairly permanent constructions could be formed.
quotes.translation: 必须理解的是，你们所知的暗示，不过是内在流动与内在方向的表现。没有内在的流动与方向，不言而喻，行动确实会陷入混乱无序，缺乏建设性的模式或具体化。它反而会纠缠于自身能量的力量之中，无法形成任何持久的模式或框架，使圆满与相对恒久的建构得以在其中形成。

quotes.text: When they do, you might question: Could it be possible that you really were perceiving an action ahead of time? Later, some people more stubborn than others might try to "prove" that some events are definitely precognitively perceived--but the point is that all events are precognitively perceived (intently), and that you actually step into an event, become part of it, reject it, accept the certain version you have "picked up," or exert yourself to make certain changes that affect the nature of the event itself.
quotes.translation: 当他们这样做时，你可能会质疑：有没有可能你真的提前感知到了一个行动？后来，一些比其他人更固执的人可能会试图"证明"某些事件确实是被预知感知到的——但关键在于，所有事件都是（专注地）被预知感知的，而你实际上踏入一个事件，成为它的一部分，拒绝它，接受你"捕捉到"的特定版本，或努力做出某些改变来影响事件本身的本质。

quotes.text: In a most basic manner, a denial of stimuli is a negative action, if any action could be called negative. I do not, of course, speak in human terms, where every stimuli for example should then be followed or sought out indiscriminately. This is not my meaning. I am talking of deeper biological levels, and indeed of levels that are buried within tissue itself.
quotes.translation: 在最基本的层面上，对刺激的否定是一种负面行动——如果任何行动可被称为负面的话。当然，我并非以人类术语来说，即并非每个刺激都应被不加区分地追随或寻求。这不是我的意思。我谈论的是更深的生物层面，甚至是埋藏在组织本身内部的层面。

quotes.text: Now this happens in every night's sleep. Two areas of activity are involved, one very passive and one acutely active. In the next stage it is active as it takes part through action -- the concepts given it are then vividly perceived through participation and examples. This is the most protected area of sleep. The rejuvenating characteristics enter in here, and it is during this period that the Speakers act as teachers and guides.
quotes.translation: 这种情况发生在每夜的睡眠中。涉及两个活动区域，一个非常被动，一个极度活跃。在一种状态中，意识的这一部分是被动的，接收信息。在下一阶段，它变得活跃，通过行动参与——给予它的概念随后通过参与和实例被生动地感知。这是睡眠中最受保护的领域。恢复活力的特性在此进入，正是在此期间，发言者充当教师和向导。

quotes.text: He is another aspect of me while being himself. (Pause.) In your terms, I am a guide he also follows. These communications change me as they change you, for they are action on both of our parts. Your egos are being well educated, since they are aware of the sessions, and this will be of great benefit to you when other coordinates come into your perception.
quotes.translation: 他是另一个面向的我，同时又是他自己。（停顿。）用你们的话来说，我是他也追随的一位向导。然而，他对我们关系的觉察远胜于你们对自己与他关系的觉察。（停顿；超过一分钟。）你们的时间是必要的……这些通讯改变了我，正如它们改变了你，因为这是双方的行动。你们的自我正在接受良好的教育，因为它们意识到了这些课，当其他坐标进入你们的感知时，这对你们将大有裨益。

And in such cases the ego is not equipped to judge, except for itself.

quotes.text: If, however, you dwell mentally in a generalized environment of fear, the body is given no clear line of action, allowed no appropriate response. Look at it this way: An animal, not necessarily just a wild one in some native forest, but an ordinary dog or cat, reacts in a certain fashion. It is alert to everything in its environment. A cat does not anticipate danger from a penned dog four blocks away, however, nor bother wondering what would happen if that dog were to escape and find the cat's cozy yard.
quotes.translation: 然而，如果你在心理上沉浸于一种普遍的恐惧环境中，身体便得不到明确的行动指令，也无法做出适当的反应。这样看吧：一只动物——不一定只是原始森林里的野生动物，而是一只普通的狗或猫——会以某种方式做出反应。它对环境中的一切保持警觉。然而，一只猫不会预料到四个街区外一只被拴住的狗带来的危险，也不会费心去想如果那只狗挣脱了束缚，找到它舒适的院子会发生什么。

quotes.text: If you will remember the three creative dilemmas discussed in our past session, you will see that we have here the reason for our self-perpetuating universe, the reason for termination within it, and the inherent necessity for change. If one thought were held forever, no other thoughts would follow, no action would follow, and no identity. In your own intimate psychological experience, in the intimate psychological experience of every individual within your race, you will find recognition of the thought.
quotes.translation: 若你记得我们上次课程中讨论的三个创造性困境，便会明白我们在此找到了宇宙自我延续的原因、其中终结的缘由，以及改变的内在必然性。若一个念头被永恒固守，便不会有其他念头随之而生，不会有行动，也不会有身份认同。在你自身亲密的心理体验中，在你种族每个个体的亲密心理体验里，你都会发现对这个念头的认知。

quotes.translation: 其结果反而增加了时间，并在许多情况下深化了视角。行动并非沿着任何既定路线或方向发生，尽管你可能只感知到它朝单一方向的运动。它是其他维度的一部分。在此，若以行动的角度审视梦境，这一点应能清晰呈现。

quotes.text: Selves are not destroyed. They change into other selves, and yet are still themselves, for each new self is also the previous self which changed through acting upon itself. quotes.translation: 自我不会被摧毁。它们转化为其他自我，却依然是自身，因为每个新自我正是通过作用于自身而改变的先前自我。就这些术语而言，行动不会剧烈收缩回自身。每个自我很可能都能清醒地认识到，自己是原初行动自我的一部分。

quotes.text: Many past beliefs were automatically shattered in the reality of the moment. Powers of initiation and action, long buried, were released in numberless individuals. Federal funds were directed instantly to this region. The spotlight was turned on to the section. (Pause.) Many lonely people were forced, or rather forced themselves, into a situation where it was imperative that they relate with others. Since this is not the main topic of this book, I cannot go deeply into the ways and means involved.
quotes.translation: 许多过往信念在当下的实相中自动瓦解。长期埋藏的主动与行动能力，在无数个体中被释放。联邦资金即刻拨往该地区。聚光灯转向了这片区域。（停顿。）许多孤独的人被迫——更确切地说，是迫使自己——置身于必须与他人建立联系的处境。由于这并非本书主旨，我无法深入探讨其中涉及的方式方法。

quotes.text: It operates for your benefit almost automatically in any case, for your benefit is its benefit, you see, and its energies are always at your disposal. This does not mean that you are dependent. You are independent as far as the actions you choose to take. You are however a part of your supraself, for it is a self which you will become, in your time terms. In other terms it is the self which you are; you can call upon your own supraconsciousness therefore, though there should be no reason to do so.
quotes.translation: 它几乎自动为你运作，无论如何都是为你的利益服务，因为你的利益就是它的利益，你看，它的能量随时供你使用。这并不意味着你有所依赖。就你选择采取的行动而言，你是独立的。然而，你是你超我的一部分，因为那个自我是你终将成为的——以你们的时间术语来说。以其他术语而言，它就是你现在所是的自我；因此你可以召唤你自己的超意识，尽管没有理由这样做。

quotes.text: Indeed, oftentimes they serve to preserve the integrity of the whole psychological system, and to point out the existence of inner problems. I am saying that illness is a portion of the action of which any personality is composed, and therefore it is purposeful, and cannot be considered as an alien force that attacks the personality from without.
quotes.translation: 的确，它们常常有助于维护整个心理系统的完整性，并指出内在问题的存在。它们往往发挥临时功能，引导人格远离其他更严重的困难领域。我并非在此说所有疾病都是好的。我是说疾病是构成任何人格的行动的一部分，因此它是有目的的，不能被视为从外部攻击人格的外来力量。

quotes.text: There may be the appearance of a time lapse of one kind or another between mental actions and their appearance or projection into other systems, but this is a distortive effect. Such distortive effects, such distortions, are often correlated within a given system, and accepted as a foundation for the nature of reality. And all further data is then accepted according to the easiness with which it can be accepted within this framework, the distortions being mistaken for the actuality behind them.
quotes.translation: 心理行动与其显现或投射到其他系统之间，可能存在某种时间延迟的表象，但这是一种扭曲效应。此类扭曲效应常被特定系统内部相互关联，并被接受为实相本质的基础。随后所有进一步的数据，都根据其在该框架内被接受的难易程度而被接纳，而扭曲则被误认为其背后的实相。

quotes.translation: 我并不担心会扰乱既有的平衡，恰恰相反。事实是，某种程度的了悟可以在戏剧上演得如火如荼之后才到来，而且往往确实如此。此时伪装行动已如此错综复杂，以至于了悟本身也以伪装框架的形式显现，并常与之难以区分。

quotes.translation: 这些同时发生的行动，在无数活动领域中同时显现。从这些领域内部看来，似乎涉及你所认知的时间。然而你明白时间并未参与其中。这种时间表象是由行动进入任何特定伪装场域时产生的明显变化或转化所致。

quotes.translation: 我将谈及你过去的状况，也将谈及行动。虽然你特定疾病的原因涉及个人因素，事实上所有疾病都或多或少根植于自我试图脱离构成其自身的行动，以至于有时会与自己对抗。

quotes.translation: 创造性的困境与扭曲，其本身自然是一种将在后续行动中化解的行动。这些是关于行动本质的基本原理，在任何系统内都贯穿始终。因此它们在你的系统、电力系统、梦境系统以及所有其他系统中同样有效。

The inflexibility of dogma conscientiously applied to daily action was experienced, and within it Ruburt tried to apply himself and to focus his deeply mystical nature.*
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的母亲知道，只要能证明她有任何方面不称职或无法给予孩子适当照顾，孩子就可能被带走。事实上，在这张照片拍摄前一年多，鲁柏就被送进了一所天主教收容所。在那里，非传统思想是不被容忍的。教条的僵化被一丝不苟地应用于日常行动中，鲁柏在这种环境中努力约束自己，并试图聚焦他深具神秘本质的天性。
