quotes.text: I do feel that part of that enrichment involves a worldwide (and possibly universal) healing action, contributed to by each living form--that here on earth, at least, this vital force of our own creation sustains us in an unending grand synthesis of regeneration. Yet I haven't read anything about this, at least put in just this way. Our species should study the whole subject of global healing, so that it can use the knowledge gained to lead itself into new areas of thought and feeling.
quotes.translation: 我确实感到，这种丰盛的一部分涉及一种全球性（甚至可能是宇宙性）的疗愈行动，由每个生命形态共同促成——至少在地球上，我们自身创造的这股生命力，在永无止境的伟大再生综合体中支撑着我们。然而我从未读到过相关论述，至少没有以这种方式呈现的。我们的物种应当研究全球疗愈的整个主题，以便运用所得知识引领自身进入思想与感受的新领域。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: "Seth used Session 909 as a bridge between chapters 6 and 7 in Dreams. This means that now the session serves as a connective--a very effective lure, say--between volumes 1 and 2. Indeed, in retrospect it almost seems as though Seth, that 'energy personality essence,' planned it that way! And Jane and I look forward with intense interest to the final version of Dreams, for as always this work will be as revealing and educational for us as it will be for anybody else. I thank each reader for his or her patience in accepting the publication of Dreams in two volumes."

quotes.text: The actions result in concrete physical materiaizationls. These are all highly colored and charged, however, and the stuff of physical materiaizationl is in itself conscious and alive. There are hidden but very definite connections between the self and the objects of which it has created in its environment. The environment is simply an extension of the self, and those objects within it are a part of the physical or the physically materialized personality. Hence your ideas of ownership.
quotes.translation: 这些行动会形成具体的物质显化。然而它们都高度着色且充满能量，物质显化的素材本身即有意识且鲜活。自我与其在环境中创造的对象之间，存在着隐秘却明确的关联。环境不过是自我的延伸，其中的物体是人格的物质化或物质显化部分。这便是你们所有权观念的由来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Any individual reacts to a reality as he perceives it to be, and he perceives it to be since he has himself created it from basic reality. The very distortions therefore form many of the characteristic differences which for him gives his reality its peculiar nature. Those whose actions set them apart drastically from others within your system, and who seem in one way or another mentally unbalanced, are often told that they must relate themselves more clearly with reality as it exists.
quotes.translation: 任何个体都会按照他所感知到的实相做出反应，而他之所以如此感知，是因为他本人已从基本实相中创造了它。因此，正是这些扭曲形成了许多特征差异，这些差异赋予了他的实相独特的性质。那些行为与你们系统内其他人截然不同、在某种程度上显得精神失衡的人，常被告知必须更清晰地与“既存”的实相关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In the same way, each of my readers has a connection with the same level of psychic reality. In greater terms, all of this is happening at once. Ruburt is contributing and forming a certain portion of my experience, even as I am contributing to his. Your identities are not something already completed. Your most minute action, thought, and dream adds to the reality of your psyche, no matter how grand or austere the psyche may appear to you when you think of it as a hypothetical term.
quotes.translation: 同样地，我的每位读者都与同一层级的心理实相有所关联。从更宏大的角度来看，这一切都在同时发生。鲁柏正在贡献并形成我经验的特定部分，正如我也在贡献于他的经验一样。你们的身份并非某种已完成之物。你们最微小的行动、思想和梦境，都会为你们的心灵实相增添内容——无论当你们将心灵视为一个假设性术语时，它显得多么庄严或肃穆。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: So does the personality, through negative charges, cause boundaries to be set about its own emotional system. It will accept most readily those thoughts and emotions, or electric actions, which attract it, which have a similarity to its own charged emotional climate; and it will have greater resistance to those which have the greatest dissimilarities. It is, therefore, most advantageous to study well those thoughts and emotions which are habitually accepted by any given personality.
quotes.translation: 人格也是如此，通过负面电荷，在其自身情感系统周围设定界限。它会最轻易地接受那些吸引它、与其自身带电情感氛围相似的思想、情感或电性行动；而对那些差异最大的思想情感，则会表现出最大的抗拒。因此，仔细研究任何特定人格习惯性接受的那些思想与情感，是最为有利的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is a rather simplified explanation. Consider however a situation in which the personality needs to express dependency, but feels that such an expression is not possible within his waking experience. If he is able to dream in such a manner that he can construct dream dramas in which he plays a dependent part, then the action is satisfied.
quotes.translation: 这是一个相当简化的解释。但请考虑这样一种情况：人格需要表达依赖性，却觉得在清醒体验中无法做到这一点。如果他能以这样的方式做梦——构建出自己扮演依赖角色的梦境戏剧——那么行动便得到了满足。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You have many more than five dreams a night, however. I believe Ruburt's top number of recalled dreams for one night was thirteen. Now there is something else here that must be considered. The very self-suggestions that will enable you to recall your dreams may also change their nature, to some extent, for any action changes any other action.
quotes.translation: 然而，你每晚所做的梦远不止五个。我相信鲁柏曾在一夜之间回忆起多达十三个梦。这里还有一点必须考虑：那些能让你回忆梦境的自暗示，也可能在某种程度上改变梦的本质，因为任何行动都会改变其他行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The interior self causes the physical challenges that then seem to spurt further bodily activity. The impetus for any developing and latent action is incipient in the unborn infant. The child's first steps are latent within the first flickering of the infant's eyes, for the events follow as naturally as the opening of the petals of a flower.
quotes.translation: 内在自体引发了那些看似进一步激发身体活动的物理挑战。任何发展中的、潜在的行动的驱动力，在未出生的婴儿体内便已初现端倪。孩子迈出的第一步，潜伏在婴儿最初的眼眸闪烁之中——因为事件的发生，如同花瓣绽放般自然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is difficult to explain to you. As an exercise, occasionally catch yourself in some insignificant action--speaking, touching. If you speak for example be conscious of speaking and hearing yourself speak. Try to think of the words, or to experience them in terms of color. In terms of bulk, of density, of distance. Think of the beginnings of the simple act of which you are normally almost completely unaware, the muscular motions that must be made before one word can be uttered.
quotes.translation: 这很难向你们解释。作为练习，偶尔捕捉自己某个微不足道的动作——说话、触摸。例如说话时，有意识地觉察自己说话并听见自己说话。试着思考这些词语，或用色彩来体验它们。从体积、密度、距离的角度去感受。思考这个简单动作的起源——你们通常几乎完全意识不到，在说出一个字之前必须完成的肌肉运动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In this chapter we will be concerned with the effect that dream experiences and objective experiences have upon each other. Certainly there is a connection... in terms of events... between waking and dreaming reality as we know it. If rauixuxx our dreams effect our objective actions in any way at all, on an individual then we as a race are 'also effected, en masse, in the physical universe, by our collective dreams, dreams could then be seen as a causal element in physical events.
quotes.translation: 本章我们将探讨梦境体验与客观体验如何相互影响。就事件层面而言，清醒现实与梦境现实之间确实存在关联。如果我们的梦境以任何方式影响个体的客观行为，那么作为人类整体，我们也会在物质宇宙中受到集体梦境的影响——梦境可被视为物质事件中的因果要素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When we have discussed further the nature of action, then we can delve further into these questions, for they involve thrusts of action, and are intimately connected with energy's action upon itself.
quotes.translation: 待我们进一步探讨行动的本质后，便能深入探究这些问题，因为它们涉及行动的冲力，且与能量作用于自身的特性密切相关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Suggestion is therefore one of the characteristics of action. The term suggestion is a poor one. As it operates within your system, and within the human personality, the word expectation is a much better term. Nevertheless, expectation is only one phase, for the same kind of inner directive activity is pertinent within all forms of action.
quotes.translation: 因此暗示是行动的特性之一。暗示这个术语并不恰当。在你们的系统及人类人格的运作中，期待这个词要贴切得多。然而期待只是其中一个面向，因为相同的内在导向活动适用于所有形式的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: When you are born, you understand that you have a new consciousness. You explore its ramifications. It is your primary evidence that you exist in flesh. Basically, each person must confront the experience of reality through a direct encounter with it. This encounter takes place through the use of the physical senses, of course, as they are used to perceive and interpret physical data. The very utilization of those senses, however, is dependent upon the nature of your consciousness itself, and that consciousness is aware of its power and action through the exercise of its own properties.
quotes.translation: 当你出生时，你明白自己拥有全新的意识。你探索它的各种衍生面向。这是你存在于肉身中的首要证据。基本上，每个人都必须通过直接面对经验来体验实相。这种面对当然是通过运用物质感官来感知和诠释物质资料。然而这些感官的运用本身取决于你意识的性质，而该意识通过运用自身属性来觉察其力量与行动。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now that you know something about the nature of matter, you will see that all matter is objectified mental action, and that basically such action happens simultaneously in the spacious present, formed by individualized energy through the formation of mental enclosures.
quotes.translation: 既然你已对物质本质有所了解，便会明白所有物质都是客观化的心智行动，且这种行动基本上在广袤当下同时发生，由个性化能量通过形成心智围场而构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego, if you recall, is self's attempt to set itself apart from action, and to see or perceive action as an object. The ego attempts to attain stability and dominance, and resents change. It seeks to limit certain perceptions, to block out many perceptions of which the self is knowledgeable. In this way limitations become fairly rigid.
quotes.translation: 自我，若你记得，是本体试图将自己与行动分离，并将行动视为客体来观察或感知。自我试图获得稳定与支配权，且憎恶改变。它寻求限制某些感知，屏蔽本体所知的众多感知。如此一来，限制便变得相当僵化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Whatever the initial course of action agreed to in just this probable reality by everyone involved, from whatever point in the "past," in Framework 1 the participants have subjected it to an almost infinite variety of choices and modifications through the years: but always--always--within nature's great structure, and accompanied by the utter freedom of each person concerned to accept, reject, abort, or change the whole affair from their individual perspective at any moment....
quotes.translation: 无论最初在恰好这个可能性实相中，所有参与者同意的行动路线为何——无论从"过去"的哪个时间点开始——在第一框架中，参与者们多年来已将其置于几乎无限的选择与修正之中：但始终——始终——在自然伟大的结构之内，并伴随着每个相关者从自身视角随时接受、拒绝、中止或改变整个事件的绝对自由……
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I don't really think we can conceive of anything to be truly "alien," though, so I use the word here only to lead into the next of Seth's larger concepts that I want to mention: that of probable realities, or probabilities, as Jane and I usually say. Not only does Seth stress the constant psychic motion of reincarnational and counterpart selves upon this earth we know--but he also tells us that each of those selves can move into other or parallel realities. I quote him from Session 681 in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality:
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Various emotional factors within each personality cause what we may call a characteristic emotional climate. Certain types of thoughts and emotions are entertained therein. Since these are electrical actions, they set up strong electrical fields of attraction within the personality, easy electric paths. Uncharacteristic thoughts or emotions must then meet with some resistance. Habit, then, has not only a psychological, but an electrical and psychological nature and implication.
quotes.translation: 每个人格内的各种情感因素，会形成我们可称之为"特征性情感氛围"的状态。某些类型的思想与情感在此氛围中被接纳。由于这些是电性行动，它们会在人格内建立强烈的电性吸引场，形成顺畅的电性路径。非特征性的思想或情感则必须遭遇某种阻力。因此，习惯不仅具有心理本质与意涵，更兼具电性与心理的双重本质与意涵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Present and future experience of those in the room are available to me, and as real as their present experience. Therefore I must remember what they think has already happened, or not yet occurred, for to me it is one. These patterns of activity, however, are also constantly changing. I say for example that I am aware of their past and future actions and thoughts; and yet what I am aware of, actually, are ever-shifting and changing patterns, both in the future and in the past.
quotes.translation: 在场者当下与未来的经验对我而言皆可触及，其真实性与他们当下的经验无异。因此我必须记住他们自认为已发生或尚未发生之事——因为对我而言，这些皆为一体。然而这些活动模式亦在持续变化。举例而言，我虽能感知他们过去与未来的行动与思想，但实际我所感知的，实则是过去与未来中不断流转变化的模式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such people--in a fashion, now--play a game of quite serious hide-and-seek with themselves and with the world. They believe in the dictum: "Divide and conquer." It is as if, for reasons I hope to discuss, they refuse to put themselves together properly, refuse to form one fairly united self. The idea behind this is: "If you cannot find me, then I cannot be held accountable for my actions--actions which are bound in one way or another to betray me."
quotes.translation: 这类人——以某种方式而言——正与自己及世界玩着一场相当严肃的捉迷藏游戏。他们信奉"分而治之"的箴言。仿佛出于某种我希望能探讨的原因，他们拒绝将自己妥善整合，拒绝形成一个相对统一的自我。其背后的理念是："若你寻不着我，我便无需为自身行为负责——这些行为无论如何终将背叛我。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: The conditions, however, while "set" in one fashion, are highly plastic in another, so that a multitudinous variety of probable events can flow from them. Precognitively you are unconsciously quite aware -- again in your terms -- of the results of any given action or cause. When this (photograph) of Ruburt3 was taken, he had already become aware of the overall interests and concerns that would dominate his future life, although the particular course of it had not been chosen.
quotes.translation: 然而这些条件虽在某种形式上"固定"，在另一层面上却极具可塑性，由此可衍生出无数种可能事件。以预知视角而言——再次借用你们的说法——你潜意识中完全清楚任何特定行动或起因的结果。当鲁柏这张（照片）被拍摄时，他已意识到将主导其未来人生的整体兴趣与关切，尽管具体的人生轨迹尚未选定。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 679
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Which you? Which world? These questions are to be answered in the "now," as you understand it, through the realization that your power of action is in the present and not in the past. Your only effective point of changing any aspect of your world lies in that miraculous instant connection of spirit and self through neurological impact.
quotes.translation: 哪一个你？哪一个世界？这些问题要在你理解的"当下"中回答，通过认识到你的行动力量存在于当下而非过去。你改变世界任何面向的唯一有效点，就在于那通过神经冲击达成的灵性与自我之间奇迹般的瞬间连接。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The rejected action patterns, however, will find outlet. The nature of the outlet will be the result of the nature of the particular patterns themselves. The quality of the outlet will depend upon the intensity of these patterns, and the necessity or the degree of necessity, for their expression. Unless some adjustments are made at this point, the ego will have nothing to say with the direction that these patterns may take, simply because it will not accept their legitimacy.
quotes.translation: 然而，被拒绝的行动模式终将找到出口。出口的性质取决于这些特定模式本身的特质。出口的质量则取决于这些模式的强度，以及它们表达的必要性或必要程度。除非在此刻做出某些调整，否则自我对这些模式可能采取的方向将毫无发言权，仅仅因为它拒绝承认它们的正当性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is obviously somewhat simplified, in that the ego constantly changes, and the above examples must be read carefully or their meaning could be misinterpreted. Actions may appear to be separate, but they are all part of other actions, this being of course the basis for all organization, including that of the ego and the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这显然有些简化，因为自我在不断变化，上述例子必须仔细阅读，否则其含义可能被误解。行动看似各自独立，但它们都是其他行动的一部分，这当然是所有组织——包括自我与内在自体——的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Incidentally, suggestion will reach many aspects of the self, and some which are very distant from the ego, for you are setting into motion psychic action, which is behind all realities. Suggestion will reach portions of the self of which the ego is entirely unfamiliar. Suggestion can indeed change experience which has already passed.
quotes.translation: 顺便一提，暗示会触及自我的许多层面，其中一些层面离自我非常遥远，因为你正在启动心灵行动——那是所有实相背后的基础。暗示会触及自我完全陌生的自我部分。暗示确实能够改变已经过去的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There is much here to be studied about personality. From your viewpoint the information available to you can be practically endless. There is much to be learned about perceiving other realities. Trance states are only a beginning. The self is made of action. Teaching the self to expand is most important, and the ways are nor difficult... this is what makes the experiment interesting. This is not beyond human abilities. The structure of the personality makes this possible.
quotes.translation: 关于人格，这里有许多值得研究之处。从你的视角来看，你可获得的信息实际上无穷无尽。关于感知其他实相，还有许多需要学习。出神状态只是一个开始。自我由行动构成。教导自我扩展最为重要，而方法并不困难……这正是让实验变得有趣的原因。这并未超出人类能力范围。人格的结构使这成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are obviously many kinds of identities. Now in our last session I told you that our imaginary sender "A" does not transmit a given thought. He does not even send an exact duplicate. Action, the very action of transmission, alters the nature, the electrical reality of the thought itself. This is an extremely important point.
quotes.translation: 显然存在多种多样的身份。在我们上次的课中，我告诉过你，我们假想的发送者"A"并不会传递一个既定的思想。他甚至不会发送一个精确的复制品。行动——传递本身的行动——会改变思想本身的本质和电性实相。这是极其重要的一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now in your dream you got the feeling of that kind of work, or action. It is the given power of the world, the given power of nature. It is the directed force of value fulfillment.2 In other terms it is of course the energy of All That Is. The trouble is that the rational view of life has separated man from a sense of his own power source. When he has a problem, the rational approach to its solution seems the only answer, and often, of course, it is no answer at all.
quotes.translation: 现在，在你的梦境中，你感受到了那种工作或行动的感觉。它是世界赋予的力量，是自然赋予的力量。它是价值实现的方向性力量。换句话说，它当然是"一切万有"的能量。问题在于，理性的生活观将人类与自身的力量源泉分离开来。当人类遇到问题时，理性的解决方式似乎是唯一的答案，而通常，它根本就不是答案。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: Some of this is difficult to verbalize. The EE units2 within matter, within the atoms and molecules, are aware of the probable fields of action that are possible. While the body's integrity must lie in a constant reiteration in one probability, and maintain within that probable system a certain "constant," and while physically perception is largely directed there, the basic integrity of the body system and consciousness comes from outside the system into it. Period.
quotes.translation: 其中有些部分难以用言语表达。物质内部、原子和分子内的EE单位，意识到可能的行动场域。虽然身体的完整性必须在于对一种可能性的不断重复，并在那个可能系统内维持某种"恒常"，虽然物质感知主要指向那里，但身体系统和意识的基本完整性来自系统之外，进入系统之内。句号。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

source_raw.title: SESSION 694
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I have often said that all these divisions and separations are arbitrary. All exist one within another. Apparent boundaries are not boundaries, but only differences in the focus of attention. Even this inner ego is not the same from one given moment to another, for it is not a static thing, but is a part of continuing action. It is much more familiar with the subconscious and with the dream universe, and with the inner self, than it is with the outside ego, however.
quotes.translation: 我常说过，所有这些划分和分离都是武断的。一切都彼此存在于对方之内。明显的边界并非边界，而只是注意力焦点的差异。即使是这个内在自我，也不是从一刻到另一刻都相同的，因为它不是一个静态的东西，而是持续行动的一部分。然而，它与潜意识、梦境宇宙和内在自我，远比与外在自我更为熟悉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We have to some extent explained the reality of the personality within the electrical system. We have to some extent explained its basic origin within inner reality. We have explained the fact that the potentialities of the personality and of the self are basically unlimited. But during its alliance within the physical system, it is diffused within the cellular structure, and interrelating actions between the biological system, the electrical system, and the personality structure actually form the reality of the human individual.
quotes.translation: 我们已在某种程度上解释了电性系统内人格的实相，也在某种程度上解释了它在内在实相中的基本起源。我们已说明人格与自性的潜能基本上是无限制的这一事实。但在它与物质系统联盟期间，它被分散于细胞结构内，而生物系统、电性系统与人格结构之间的互动行为，实际上形成了人类个体的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These actions exist nevertheless. It does not take you time to perceive them one by one. You perceive them in their completed fashion. Now this other portion of the self experiences these probable events, consciously, with as much rapidity as you subconsciously perceive the million small actions that make up the handshake.
quotes.translation: 然而这些行动确实存在。你无需逐一感知它们所需的时间。你以完整的方式感知它们。现在，自性的这个其他部分有意识地体验这些或然事件，其速度之快，正如你潜意识地感知构成握手的百万个微小行动一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The differences among all species are caused by this kind of organization, so that areas of choice are clearly drawn, and areas of free activity clearly specified. The entire gestalt of probable actions, therefore, is already focused to some degree in the species' differentiations. In the vast structure of probable activity, however, far more differentiation was still necessary, and this is provided for through the inner passageways of reincarnational existence.
quotes.translation: 所有物种间的差异正是由这种组织方式所造成，使得选择区域被清楚划分，自由活动区域被明确界定。因此，或然行动的整体完形已在物种分化中达到某种程度的聚焦。然而，在或然活动的庞大结构中，仍需要更进一步的区分，而这通过转世存有的内在通道得以实现。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is also true however that this lack of boundary allows for possibilities of development and expansion that would be impossible with a limited self. The self is not nebulous. Action changes itself, as we have described. Any self, therefore, is never the same self, but action contains within itself its own comprehension.
quotes.translation: 然而，这种缺乏界限的特性也使得自我得以发展与扩展，这是有限自我所无法实现的。自我并非虚无缥缈。如我们所述，行动本身会改变自身。因此，任何自我都绝非一成不变，但行动本身蕴含着对自身的理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner ego sees and knows itself as a part of this action or happening, and sees the entire identity existing in various dimensions simultaneously. The outer ego attempts to cut action short, and so its viewpoint is limited by its own attempt. It perceives its birth and its death, but not beyond its birth or its death.
quotes.translation: 内在自我将自身视为这行动或事件的一部分，并看到整个身份同时存在于不同维度中。外在自我试图截断行动，因此其视角受限于自身的企图。它感知到自身的出生与死亡，却无法超越出生与死亡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: "I got a definition of master events but forgot some of it ... to the effect that master events are spectacular events whose main thrusts are outside of time, but whose actions on or in time [are] extravagant--out of proportion to their actual historical connections. The physical part of [such an] event in history is actually minimal in contrast to its effects ... and something about master events touching the worlds of imagination and reason in different ways.
quotes.translation: "我曾得到过关于主事件的定义，但遗忘了一部分……大意是：主事件是壮观的，其主要驱动力超越时间，但其在时间之内或之上的行动却铺张浪费——与其实际历史关联不成比例。这类事件在历史中的物质部分与其影响相比实则微不足道……还提到主事件以不同方式触及想象与理性的世界。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. Let us continue our discussion. I did not say that action was not motion. I want this clear. Action is motion, but not necessarily motion that is perceived in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 现在，让我们继续讨论。我并未说过行动不是运动，这点请务必厘清。行动即是运动，但未必是能以物质形式感知的运动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is nevertheless the physical materialization of this lack of communication. Its purpose is basically a good one. The results are obviously poor. The ulcer is an attempt to force a recognition of unity from the various levels of the self. It is, literally, a physical bridge. At this time it is an impeding action, but it can be dissolved and resolved, according to our previous discussions.
quotes.translation: 然而，这仍是沟通失序的物质具现化。其初衷本善，结果却显然不佳。溃疡是试图迫使自我各层面认知统一性的尝试——它本质上是一座物质桥梁。此刻它虽是阻碍性行动，但根据我们之前的讨论，这阻碍可以被消融化解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The emotional climate, though intangible, is intimately known by each individual as it exists within himself, and it is the best indication of his physical condition, for thoughts and emotions as independent electrical actions have great influence directly upon the physical mechanism, acting indeed as electric storms which flash through the entire nervous system; or as great stabilizers as the case may be, and with of course many middle varieties of influence.
quotes.translation: 情绪氛围虽无形无相，但每个个体都能深切感知其内在状态。这正是身体状况的最佳指标，因为作为独立电磁活动的思想与情感，会直接对物质机制产生重大影响——它们时而如穿越整个神经系统的电暴，时而如强大的稳定器，当然也存在诸多中间形态的影响力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Two: All objects have their origin basically in mental action. Mental action is directed psychic energy.
quotes.translation: 二：所有物体的根源基本上都源于心智行动。心智行动是定向的心灵能量。

quotes.text: More and more, the quality of your lives is formed through the subjective realities of your feelings and mental constructions. Again, beliefs that foster despair are biologically destructive. They cause the physical system to shut down. If mass action against appalling social or political conditions is not effective, then other means are taken, and these are often in the guise of epidemics or natural disasters. The blight is wiped out in one way or another.
quotes.translation: 你们生活的品质越来越多地通过感受与心智建构的主观实相形成。再次强调，助长绝望的信念在生物学上具有破坏性。它们会导致身体系统关闭。如果针对骇人社会或政治状况的集体行动无效，就会采取其他手段，这些手段往往以流行病或自然灾害的形式出现。祸害会以某种方式被清除。

quotes.text: The telepathic message picked up in dreams under such circumstances will of course be interpreted by the dreaming self in its own way, symbolically, so that the dream actions may not appear to be the same. If it were possible to examine two such allied dream communications however, the connection between them would be very clear. In years to come we may be able to work along these lines, but this will be in the future. It is nevertheless an important point.
quotes.translation: 在此类情况下，梦中接收到的传心讯息自然会被做梦的自我以自身方式象征性地解读，因此梦中的行动可能看似不同。然而，若能检验两个此类相关的梦沟通，它们之间的关联将非常清晰。未来我们或许能沿着这些方向开展工作，但这将是以后的事。不过，这一点仍然至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: However, by seeing beneath the camouflage in any one case you see beneath the camouflage in all cases. What these wires are, therefore, that seem to divide our planes and that appear so differently in one plane than they do in another, are solidified vitality whose camouflaging action is determined by mental enzymes.
quotes.translation: 然而，当你透过任何个案的表象看到其下本质时，你便也看穿了所有个案的表象。因此，那些看似分隔我们层面、在不同层面呈现截然不同样貌的丝线，实则是固化的生命力，其伪装作用由心智酵素所决定。

quotes.text: In all of these episodes definite emotional experience was involved. Also connected was an indefinable but unmistakable sense of familiarity. Space and time continually expand, and all probabilities of any given action are actualized in one reality or another. All of the potentials of the entity are also actualized.
quotes.translation: 所有这些片段都涉及明确的情感体验，同时伴随着一种难以言喻却不容错认的熟悉感。时空持续扩展，任何特定行动的所有可能性都在某个实相中被具体化。存有的一切潜能同样被具体化。

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: He will be at all times a prisoner of clock time and of aging, for he will consider these the primary conditions under which he must operate. And the action, or actions involved in this belief will therefore act upon the physical cells of his body with vengeful force, because he has himself directed them to do so.
quotes.translation: 他将始终是钟表时间与衰老的囚徒，因为他会将这些视为必须遵循的首要条件。而基于这种信念产生的行动，将带着报复性的力量作用于他身体的物质细胞——因为他自己已指示它们如此运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I told you that we do not experience your time sequence. We travel through various intensities. Our work, development, and experience all takes place within what I term the "moment point." Here, within the moment point, the smallest thought is brought to fruition, the slightest possibility explored, the probabilities thoroughly examined, the least or the most forceful feeling entertained. It is difficult to explain this clearly, and yet the moment point is the framework within which we have our psychological experience. Within it, simultaneous actions follow "freely" through associative patterns. For example, pretend that I think of you, Joseph. In so doing I immediately experience -- and fully -- your past, present, and future (in your terms), and all of those strong or determining emotions and motivations that have ruled you. I can travel through those experiences with you, if I choose. We can follow a consciousness through all of its forms, for example, and in your terms, within the flicker of an eye.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你，我们并不经历你们的时间序列。我们穿越各种强度。我们的工作、发展与体验，都发生在我所谓的"瞬间点"之内。在此瞬间点中，最微小的念头得以实现，最细微的可能性被探索，各种或然性被彻底检视，最轻微或最强烈的情感都被容纳。这很难解释清楚，然而瞬间点正是我们拥有心理体验的架构。在其中，同时性的行动通过联想模式"自由地"展开。例如，假设我想起你，约瑟夫。如此一来，我立即——且完整地——体验到你（以你们的时间而言）的过去、现在与未来，以及所有那些曾支配你的强烈或决定性情绪与动机。若我选择，便能与你一同穿越那些体验。举例而言，我们可以追随一个意识穿越其所有形态，而在你们的时间尺度里，这只需一眨眼的功夫。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Often, for instance, you handle probabilities very well, while remaining consciously blind to them because of your concepts. Even then, however, on other levels your unconscious reaction will follow your own conscious intents. You may make a move in physical life, for example, seemingly for one reason. You may also be unconsciously reacting to quite pertinent data regarding the probable actions of others. Because you do not really fully accept the fact that you can so react, you may block this unofficial information on the one hand, even while on the other you take it into consideration. You are far more aware than you realize of the probable future in areas with which you are concerned. This is true on all levels. If your purposes do not involve illness, for instance, and yet if you believe in contagion, you will automatically avoid circumstances that can lead to epidemics. In terms of probabilities that particular kind will not enter your experience.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，你们常常能妥善处理或然性，却因自身观念而对它们视而不见。即便如此，在其他层面上，你们的无意识反应仍会遵循自身有意识的意图。比如，你们可能在物质生活中采取某个行动，表面看来出于某个理由。同时，你们也可能无意识地对他人的或然性行为做出相当精准的回应。由于你们并未真正全然接受自己能够如此反应的事实，一方面可能阻绝这些非官方信息，另一方面却又将其纳入考量。在你们所关注的领域中，你们对或然性未来的认知远超自身所意识到的程度。这在所有层面上皆然。举例而言，若你们的目的不涉及疾病，却又相信传染之说，便会自动避开可能导致疫情的情境。就或然性而言，那种特定类型的事件便不会进入你们的经验。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 697
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Because you have in the past convinced yourselves that the conscious mind must of necessity be cut off from inner reality, you think that it must be alienated from the dream state. Following such beliefs, you find yourselves thinking of dreaming as chaotic, unreasonable, and as completely divorced from normal conscious direction, purpose, or function. It often seems that sleep is almost a small death, and psychologists have compared dreaming with controlled insanity.5 You have so divorced your waking and dreaming experience that it seems you have separate "lives," and that there is little connection between your waking and dreaming hours. The rich tapestry of probable actions from which you choose your official life becomes just as invisible. This is quite needless.
quotes.translation: 由于过去你们说服自己，认为有意识心智必然与内在实相隔绝，便以为它必须与梦境状态疏离。遵循此类信念，你们发现自己在思考时将梦境视为混乱、非理性，且完全脱离正常意识的方向、目的或功能。睡眠往往看似近乎小死，心理学家更将做梦比作受控的疯狂。你们如此割裂清醒与做梦的经验，以至于仿佛拥有各自独立的"生命"，清醒与做梦的时光之间几无关联。你们从中选择官方人生的那幅丰饶的或然性行动织锦，也因此变得隐而不见。这实属无谓。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 698
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: "In Seth Speaks I tried to describe certain extensions of your own reality in terms that my readers could understand. In The Nature of Personal Reality, I tried to extend the boundaries of individual existence as it is usually experienced ... to give the reader hints that would increase practical, spiritual and physical enjoyment and fulfillment in daily life. Those books were dictated by me in a more or less straight narrative style. In 'Unknown' Reality I went further, showing how the experiences of the psyche splash outward into the daylight, so to speak. I hope that [in those two books] through my dictation and through Ruburt's and Joseph's experiences, the reader can see the greater dimensions that touch ordinary living, and sense the psyche's greater magic. 'Unknown' Reality required much more work on Joseph's part, and that additional effort in itself was a demonstration that the psyche's events are very difficult to pin down in time. Seemingly its action goes out in all directions.... As Joseph did his notes, it became apparent that some events ... seemed to have no beginning or end."
quotes.translation: 在《赛斯书》中，我试图用读者能理解的术语描述你们自身实相的某些延伸。在《个人实相的本质》中，我试图拓展通常被体验的个体存在边界……给予读者能增强日常生活中实用、灵性与身体享受及满足的提示。那些书是以近乎直叙的风格由我口述而成。在《未知的实相》中，我更进一步，展示了心灵经验如何向外迸发进入日光世界，姑且这么说。我希望（在那两本书中）通过我的口述及鲁柏与约瑟的经验，读者能看见触及平凡生活的更大维度，并感知心灵更伟大的魔法。《未知的实相》需要约瑟付出更多努力，而这额外的努力本身便证明了心灵事件极难在时间中固定。看似它的行动向所有方向发散……当约瑟做笔记时，某些事件显然……似乎没有开始或结束。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: To me, some of the most important material in Volume 1 is Jane's information on her sensing of other neurological pulses as they're connected with probable events, and how she picked up those pulses by bypassing her direct, or ordinary neurological impact. See her work in appendixes 4 and 5. Seth also discussed such neurological changeovers in Session 685, among others. I think this kind of material offers a rich source for future scientific investigation.

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Those experienced events, however, are also the result of a screening process. They attain their focus, brilliance, and physical validity because they rise into prominence on the backs of other seemingly unperceived events. In the dream state you work intimately with the "inner grammar" of events. In dreams you find the unspoken sentence and the physically unexperienced act. The skeletons of the inner workings of events are there more obvious. Actions are not yet fully fleshed out. The mechanics of your waking psychological behavior are brilliantly delineated. That state can be explored and utilized far more fully than it is, and should be. Yet there will always be a veil between the waking and sleeping consciousness, for while you are physical, the waking mind can only deal with so much information. It would simply forget what it cannot hold.
quotes.translation: 然而这些被经验的事件，也是筛选过程的结果。它们获得焦点、光辉与物理有效性，是因为它们借由其他看似未被感知的事件之背脊而跃升到显著地位。在梦境状态中，你们与事件的"内在语法"亲密合作。在梦中你们找到未被言说的句子与未被物理经验的行为。事件内在运作的骨架在那里更为明显。行动尚未完全血肉丰满。你们清醒时心理行为的机制被鲜明地描绘出来。那个状态可以被远更充分地探索与利用，且应当如此。然而清醒意识与睡眠意识之间永远存在一道帷幕，因为当你们处于肉身时，清醒心智只能处理这么多信息。它只会遗忘无法承载的内容。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now give us a moment ... As creatures dwelling in time and space, your senses provide you with highly specific data, and with a cohesive-enough physical reality. Each person may react to the seasons in a very personalized manner, and yet you all share those natural events. They provide a framework for experience. It is up to the conscious mind to interpret sense events as clearly and concisely as possible. This allows for the necessary freedom of action for psychological and physical mobility. You are an imaginative species, and so the physical world is colored, charged, by your own imaginative projections, and powered by the great sweep of the emotions. But when you are confused or upset, it is an excellent idea to return your attention to the natural world as it appears at any given moment -- to sense its effect upon you as separate from your own projections.
quotes.translation: 现在请稍等片刻……作为栖居于时空的生物，你们的感官提供高度特定的数据，以及足够凝聚的物理实相。每个人可能以非常个人化的方式对季节做出反应，但你们全都共享这些自然事件。它们为经验提供框架。清醒心智有责任尽可能清晰简洁地诠释感官事件。这允许心理与身体活动所需的必要行动自由。你们是富有想象力的物种，因此物理世界被你们自己的想象投射着色、充电，并被情感的伟大浪潮驱动。但当你们困惑或不安时，将注意力回归到任何当下显现的自然世界——感受它对你产生的影响，将其与你们自己的投射区分开来——是个绝佳的主意。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: hen he originally gave us the 812th session some 16 months ago, Seth told us it would "be part of a chapter later in the book...." [See my opening notes for Session 814.] The 812th session was held following an encounter Jane and I had with an unexpected visitor, although these excerpts aren't personal at all. They fit in well with material in Mass Events, however -- indeed, as soon as Seth confirmed Jane's headings for Part 3 and Chapter 6, we knew that we'd found the place to present this material. We made our decision without consulting Seth, by the way.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: There is a natural impulse to die on the part of men and animals, but in such circumstances [as we are discussing here] that desire becomes the only impulse that the individual feels able to express, for it seems that all other avenues of expression have become closed. There is much misunderstanding concerning the nature of impulses, so we will discuss them rather thoroughly. I always want to emphasize the importance of individual action, for only the individual can help form organizations that become physical vehicles (intently) for the effective expression of ideals. Only people who trust their spontaneous beings and the altruistic nature of their impulses can be consciously wise enough to choose from a myriad of probable futures the most promising events -- for again, impulses take not only [people's] best interest into consideration, but those of all other species.
quotes.translation: 人类与动物天生具有死亡的冲动，但在[我们此处讨论的]情境下，这种欲望成为个体唯一感觉能够表达的冲动，因为其他所有表达途径似乎都已关闭。关于冲动的本质存在诸多误解，因此我们将深入探讨这一主题。我始终强调个体行动的重要性，因为唯有个人才能协助形成组织，使其成为理想有效表达的物理载体（专注地）。只有信任自身自发存在及其冲动之利他本质的人，才能以足够清醒的智慧从无数可能未来中择取最具前景的事件——因为冲动不仅考量人类的最佳利益，也兼顾所有其他物种的福祉。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (In the opening notes for Session 852 I wrote that starting with the 846th session for April 4, "Seth has been dictating material for Mass Events on Wednesday evenings only." Eight weeks later he's still following that arrangement, that "unspoken agreement" among the three of us. Even last Thursday night's session was displaced from the evening before. I took it upon myself to present material from two Monday night sessions -- 853 and 855.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Through the centuries philosophical and religious thinkers have created numerous complicated variations of ideas involving free will and determinism, so that neither thesis is as simple as it first appears to be. Man related the concept of free will long ago to the question of whether he could deliberately choose evil, for example. He still does. And he still struggles with questions about his freedom before God's omnipotence and foreknowledge, and whether those qualities cause events, or can cause them, and whether they involve predestination. Opposing determinism is the idea that man has always fought for his personal responsibility--that instead of being controlled entirely by his heritage, he's capable of forming new syntheses of thought and action based upon the complicated patterns of his own history.
quotes.translation: 千百年来，哲学与宗教思想家围绕自由意志与决定论创造了无数复杂的思想变体，使得这两种论点都不似表面那般简单。例如人类早将自由意志的概念与能否蓄意选择邪恶的问题相关联，至今依然如此。人们仍在挣扎于这样的问题：在上帝的全能与预知面前，人类是否拥有自由？这些特质是否导致或能够导致事件发生？它们是否涉及宿命论？与决定论相对的是，人类始终为个人责任而抗争——即人并非完全受遗传控制，而是能够基于自身历史的复杂模式，形成思想与行动的新综合。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Religion was hampered--and is--by its own interpretation of good and evil, but it did not deny the existence of other versions of consciousness, or differing kinds of psychological activity and life. (Long pause.) Reincarnation suggests, of course, the extension of personal existence beyond one time period, independently of one bodily form, the translation or transmission of intelligence through nonphysical frameworks, and implies psychological behavior, memory and desire as purposeful action without the substance of any physical mechanism--propositions that science at its present stage of development simply could not buy, and for which it could find no evidence, for its methods would automatically preclude the type of experience that such evidence would require.
quotes.translation: 宗教始终受其自身对善恶的诠释所困，但它并未否认其他意识版本或不同心理活动与生命形式的存在。（长停顿）轮回转世自然暗示着个人存在超越单一时间段的延伸，独立于任何肉体形态，智能通过非物质框架的转化或传递，并意味着心理行为、记忆与欲望作为无需物理机制实质的有目的行动——这些命题在科学当前发展阶段根本无法接受，也找不到任何证据，因为其方法会自动排除此类证据所需的经验类型。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane doesn't agree with my doubts. As always, she's been letting me put this book together the way I think best--and inevitably that way has followed how we've been trying to understand our joint long-term situation. She innocently accepts my labors as they come out. And that trust always reflects, I'm sure, Seth's own larger view of reality, as I just quoted him from Session 915. Our challenges echo throughout all of our probable realities simultaneously, and through all of them together the largest picture of Jane and myself is presented. In this probable reality we work with what we can pick up from that great whole. We keep trying to learn to ask better questions.

quotes.text: The same still applies, though often dreams themselves are forgotten. Instead, for example, for news or for advice you watch your morning television news, which provides you with a kind of manufactured dream that to some extent technologically serves the same purpose. Instead of sending cameramen and newspaper people to the farthest corners of the earth, early man sent out aspects of himself to gather the news and to form it into dream dramas. Oftentimes much of the material did not need to become conscious: It was "unconsciously" acted upon, turned directly into action. Now such dreams simply act as backup systems, rising to the fore whenever they are needed. Their purpose was and is to increase the value fulfillment of the species and of the individual.
quotes.translation: 同样的道理依然适用，尽管梦境本身常常被遗忘。例如，你们不再通过梦境获取消息或建议，而是观看晨间电视新闻——这种技术制造的"人造梦境"在某种程度上发挥着相同的作用。早期人类无需派遣摄影师和记者到地球最偏远的角落，而是派出自身意识的各个面向去收集资讯，并将其编织成梦境戏剧。通常这些素材无需进入意识层面：它们被"无意识"地直接转化为行动。如今这类梦境仅作为备用系统，在需要时浮现出来。它们过去和现在的目的，都是为了增进物种与个体的价值完成。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Last month, in the opening notes for Session 931, in Chapter 9, I recorded that on July 8 Jane spontaneously wrote "a complete outline for a book on Seth's magical approach to reality." Actually, we've been quite aware of the potential of such an idea ever since Seth began that material a year ago.3 After supper this evening we went over the loose-leaf notebook of information Jane has accumulated for The Magical Approach to Reality: A Seth Book, and discussed how she could follow her outline in putting all of that material--on our dreams, psychic events and insights, her poetry and our essays--together with Seth's private sessions on the magical approach. She'd had trouble doing that at various times in the past year. Such a book would involve the publication of much Seth material that could either lie in our files for a long time, or never be published. I now feel that many of those sessions aren't so private after all, and can help others. The more I talked about the idea the better I liked it. Jane seemed to pick up on my own enthusiasm.

quotes.text: Your species shares with the other species a feeling of kinship for its kind. There is a great give-and-take of ideas. You end up, then, with a consensus, generally speaking, as to what a reasonable picture of agreed-upon reality is. Your system has frowned upon many experiences, considering them eccentric behavior in an adverse fashion, since your belief systems have so regimented behavior, and so narrowly defined sanity. (Long pause.) The intellect, I want to stress, is socially oriented. It is peculiarly suited, of course, to react to cultural information. (Pause.) It wants to see the world as it is seen by the minds of others. Through that kind of action it helps form your cultural environment, the civilization of which you are justly proud.
quotes.translation: 你们人类与其他物种共享着同类相惜的情感。思想之间存在着巨大的给予与接纳。总体而言，你们最终会就"公认现实"的合理图景达成共识。你们的体系对许多体验持否定态度，将其视为反常行为，因为你们的信念系统如此严格地规范行为，如此狭隘地定义理智。（长停顿）我要强调，智力是社会导向的。它自然特别适合对文化信息做出反应。（停顿）它渴望以他人心智看待世界的方式去观察世界。通过这类行动，它协助塑造了你们的文化环境，以及你们引以为傲的文明。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: A death in a family, for example, is a physical occurrence. Various members of the family will react differently, as you know. The psychological experience will be intensely diversified, personal, unpredictable as far as each family member is concerned. You cannot observe this actual psychological experience with the outer senses. Even you yourself cannot see, smell, touch that inner experience. You cannot hold it in both hands and look it over. You cannot observe it in any objective manner, as you can observe a pencil on a table, yet it would be foolish to say that this psychological experience did not exist. It is too vivid to ignore, and oftentimes the personality is almost divorced from action because of this experience that is psychological, that cannot be observed with instruments, or even by the person involved.
quotes.translation: 例如，家庭成员的死亡是物理事件。如你所知，不同家庭成员会有不同反应。就每个家庭成员而言，心理体验将呈现高度差异化、个人化且不可预测的特性。你无法用外在感官观察这种实际的心理体验。甚至你自己也无法看见、嗅闻或触摸那种内在体验。你无法像观察桌上铅笔那样客观地审视它，但若说这种心理体验不存在，那将是愚蠢的。它太过鲜活而无法忽视，且往往由于这种无法用仪器观测、甚至当事人自身也无法察觉的心理体验，人格几乎与行动分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I do not believe that Dunne understood this. There is no serialization as he imagined, after a certain point, simply because this progression of selves through various times in a serial fashion is no longer necessary. The selves reach a point which is not a theoretical point, but a particular mathematically existent point, whereby these times and selves simply become one, or in our terms, an entity. I must stress that individuality is never lost. But this is too complicated a subject to cover this evening. We have explained it rather adequately in terms of action however, and gestalts of selves do not imply a giving-up of individuality at all. It should be remembered here that reincarnation is simply a fact, and one which is not accepted by Priestley or Dunne.
quotes.translation: 我不认为邓恩理解这一点。并不存在他所想象的那种序列化过程，因为在某个特定点之后，自我以序列方式穿越不同时间的进程已不再必要。这些自我会抵达一个并非理论性的、而是数学上真实存在的特定点，在此处这些时间与自我将直接合而为一，用我们的术语来说，即成为一个"存有"。我必须强调，个体性从未丧失。但今晚这个话题过于复杂，不便详述。不过我们已用"行动"的概念对此做了相当充分的解释，而"自我完形"绝不意味着放弃个体性。这里需要记住的是，转世轮回只是一个事实，一个普里斯特利和邓恩都不接受的事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: （Seth had some interesting things to say about using suggestion. The kernel of thought here is that it is important to use whatever suggestions we want to, daily; he stressed the importance of not missing a day. He explained that in a given period of say, thirty days, the suggestions on perhaps but three or four days within that period would be really effective, and that as of now we have no way of knowing the best days. So if we miss a day, we run a chance of missing out on a particularly effective day for suggestion. Seth said that on occasion suggestion will reach all levels of the personality, that our voice will be heard throughout the personality, and that effective action will follow. There was more here but the above is the main point made.
quotes.translation: （赛斯就如何运用暗示提出了一些有趣见解。其思想核心在于：每日坚持使用我们想要的任何暗示至关重要；他特别强调不可中断任何一天。他解释说，在譬如三十天的周期内，可能只有三四天的暗示能真正生效，而目前我们无法预知哪些是最佳时机。因此若错过一天，就可能错失某个特别有效的暗示日。赛斯指出，暗示有时能触及人格的所有层次，我们的声音将响彻整个人格，继而引发有效的行动。此处还有更多细节，但以上是主要论点。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You are all pieces, you see, of the whole; but you are not all the same pieces of the whole, but rather individualized pieces of the whole. You do not all fit together like a crossword puzzle that any idiot can put together. You are still highly individualized portions of the whole. You are the whole, but you are all highly unique. You fit into different portions of the whole. The self or structure or personality travels outward and inward and (if you will forgive me) in all directions. It is action. It constantly changes. Each self as you know it has its own abilities and inclinations and sympathies. It has its own particular place within the Pyramid Gestalt. It can contact that whole self which in your terms does not yet exist, but which is of course always present. In your search you must contact that whole portion of yourself toward which you are growing--toward which I hope you are growing. This is your individual circuit, so to speak. All ways are one way, but your way is your own way. And you can travel no other. He is--Baba--highly advanced indeed. He is a way, however; he is not the end. He is not completed. He is right, but he is wrong in taking pleasure in his rightness. (I have never been known for my own Humilitye. It ill-behooves me to speak.) Nevertheless he who is and knows that he is, is. He has no need for words and he has no need to proclaim himself, for he speaks without the necessity for words and he is heard. Those who are really heard have no need for words. I speak to you now in words because without words now, there would not be the necessary understanding that must be reached before I can become wordless.
quotes.translation: 你们都是整体的碎片，但并非相同的碎片，而是整体中个体化的碎片。你们不会像任何傻瓜都能拼凑的填字游戏那样严丝合缝。你们仍是整体中高度个体化的部分。你们即是整体，却又各具独特性。你们嵌合于整体的不同部分。这个自我、结构或人格向外向内（请恕我直言）向所有方向延伸。它就是行动。它不断变化。你们所认知的每个自我都拥有独特的能力、倾向与共鸣。它在金字塔完形中占据专属位置。它能接触那个在你们时间概念中尚未存在、却始终在场的完整自我。在你们的探索中，必须触及那个你们正在向其成长——我希望你们正在向其成长——的完整自我部分。这可以说是你们各自的个体回路。万法归一，但你的道路只属于你自己。你无法行走其他路径。那位巴巴——确实高度进化。然而他是一条路径，而非终点。他尚未圆满。他是正确的，但以正确为乐则是错误的。（我素来不以谦逊著称。由我来说这话并不恰当。）然而，存在且知晓自身存在者，即是存在。他无需言语，无需自我宣告，因为他无需言辞便能言说，且能被听见。真正被听见者无需言语。我现在用言语对你们说话，因为若不用言语，就无法达成必要的理解——在我能进入无言境界之前，必须首先达成这种理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is a chameleon like characteristic, a continuity, not in terms of successive moments, but a continuity in terms of design. Events are perceived in what would seem a most alien manner to the ego. The probabilities are traveled through, so to speak. Identity or continuity of the self is retained and strengthened in a series of simultaneous events, with value fulfillment foremost insofar as purposeful action is concerned.
quotes.translation: 这种特性具有变色龙般的特质，一种连续性——并非指连续的时刻，而是设计上的连续性。事件以自我（ego）看来最为陌生的方式被感知。可以说，概率被穿越了。在一系列同时性事件中，自我的身份或连续性得以保留并强化，就目的性行动而言，价值完成（value fulfillment）居于首位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The personality itself exists in many dimensions, as you know, and it has its reality within many other fields than the physical field, and is indeed basically not nearly as allied with the physical field as you may imagine. These unifying principles of which I spoke are themselves main, dominating groups of actions, about which the main energies of the personality group themselves.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，人格本身存在于多个维度中，它在物理场之外的其他许多场域中拥有实相，并且本质上并不像你可能想象的那样与物理场紧密相连。我所说的这些统一原则本身是主要的主导性行动群组，人格的主要能量围绕它们聚集。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Time, physical matter, these are but portions of action as perceived in one particular fashion. The basic stuff, or the basic action of the universe, is one. It is perceived differently, and therefore reality constantly wears a different face. It is speeded up or slowed down according to the scope of perception.
quotes.translation: 时间、物质——这些只是以特定方式被感知的行动片段。宇宙的基本材料或基本行动是同一的。它被以不同方式感知，因此实相不断呈现出不同的面貌。根据感知范围的不同，它被加速或减缓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I think that you will find this particular session most beneficial. The desire to set yourself apart from emotion, and coolly appraise it, is merely an indication of the ego's characteristic nature. It tries to separate itself from action, to view it objectively, and to see itself as something apart from action.
quotes.translation: 我认为你会发现这一节特别有益。将自己与情感分离并冷静评估的欲望，只是自我本质特性的表现。它试图将自己与行动分离，客观地审视行动，并将自身视为与行动无关的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Suggestion then can shape the future. Expectation enters in here particularly of course. Suggestion can shape dreams, and the dreams themselves then operate as action. A strong dream can be a more significant psychic action than any physical experience, and it can change the course of the personality completely.
quotes.translation: 因此，暗示可以塑造未来。当然，期望在此特别介入。暗示可以塑造梦境，而梦境本身则作为行动运作。一个强烈的梦境可能比任何物理体验都更具意义的心理行动，并能彻底改变人格的轨迹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Thoughts have what you may term color and shape, as well as electromagnetic structure and intensity. These combining together form your physical image, in your terms. Action can never be broken down to a prime or original unit, for it automatically builds upon itself, and can never be, therefore, subtracted from. Nor can it be isolated. It is within all things that you see, and invisible because it makes up the appearance of any physical construction.
quotes.translation: 思想具有你们所谓的颜色和形状，以及电磁结构和强度。这些结合在一起，在你们的说法中形成了你们的物质形象。行动永远无法被分解为原始或初始单位，因为它会自动建立在自身之上，因此永远无法被减去。它也无法被孤立。它存在于你们所见的一切事物之中，且因构成任何物质构造的外观而不可见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: A particular consciousness is a gestalt of these conceptual patterns; but there is nothing to prevent a consciousness from increasing itself by experiencing other conceptual patterns or patterns of perception. This assimilation would increase, not decrease, any given consciousness. We use, or you use, words merely as a convenience. We therefore say that a consciousness is a gestalt of patterns of perception, by which action knows itself. But the patterns of perceptions may grow, and the consciousness reach out. The consciousness has changed. It is no longer the same consciousness, since it has extended itself. Yet it is the same consciousness, on the other hand, because it is that which has extended itself. So words can confuse us.
quotes.translation: 特定意识就是这些概念模式的完形；但意识可以通过体验其他概念模式或感知模式来扩展自身，这并无任何阻碍。这种同化会增强而非削弱任何既有的意识。我们或你们使用文字仅为方便起见。因此我们说，意识是感知模式的完形，行动借此认识自身。但感知模式可以成长，意识可以延伸。意识已然改变——它已不再是原先那个意识，因为它扩展了自身。然而从另一方面看，它仍是同一个意识，因为正是这个意识完成了自我延伸。所以文字可能令我们困惑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In order that you understand it is necessary, as I have told you, for me to break down concepts. In this way much of the unity of certain phenomena may escape you. We have spoken at various times about specific portions of action's manifestations. We have discussed to some degree, for example, the nature of matter, the electrical universe, the dream universe, and such other topics as the layers of the subconscious and the nature of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 如我曾告知的，为了让你们理解，我必须分解概念。如此一来，某些现象的完整性可能会被遗漏。我们曾多次讨论行动显化的特定面向。例如，我们已在一定程度上探讨过物质本质、电性宇宙、梦境宇宙，以及潜意识层次与全我本质等主题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your concept of time does not of course change time itself, but it does force you to perceive actions in a certain manner. Much of this is the result of the limitations of the physical organism, but much more is the effect of the development of the ego, which attempts to set itself up and apart from action.
quotes.translation: 你们的时间概念当然不会改变时间本身，但它确实迫使你们以特定方式感知行动。这很大程度上源于物质有机体的限制，但更重要的原因是自我发展的结果——自我试图将自己树立为独立于行动的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Clairvoyance exists and is possible because of its basis within the spacious present, and this is not known because man will not accept the available data. Clairvoyance exists because matter and energy are one and the same thing. There is clairvoyance within the organs of the physical body itself, because the organs of the body are not, quote, "just" matter, but energy which has composed itself into matter. Such inner data continually and automatically is accepted by every other portion of the human framework except by the outer ego. Even this outer ego, however, acts all unknowingly often on the basis of such information, which it will not admit it has received; and often such action saves it from dire circumstances.
quotes.translation: 千里眼之所以存在且可能，是因为它基于广袤当下，而人类之所以不知晓，是因为不愿接受可用的数据。千里眼之所以存在，是因为物质与能量本为一体。物理身体本身的器官中也存在千里眼，因为身体的器官并非"只是"物质，而是已凝聚为物质的能量。这种内在数据持续自动地被人类架构的每一部分所接受，唯独外在自我除外。然而，就连这个外在自我，也常常在不知不觉中依据这类它不肯承认已接收的信息行事；而这类行动往往能使其免于险境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A species that senses a lack of this quality can in one way or another destroy its offspring -- not because they could not survive otherwise, but because the quality of that survival would bring about vast suffering, for example, so distorting the nature of life as to almost make a mockery of it. Each species seeks for the development of its abilities and capacities in a framework in which safety is a medium for action. Danger in that context exists under certain conditions clearly known to the animals, clearly defined: The prey is known, for example, as is the hunter. But even the natural prey of another animal does not fear the "hunter" when the hunter animal is full of belly, nor will the hunter then attack.
quotes.translation: 一个感知到缺乏这种品质的物种，会以某种方式毁灭其后代——并非因为它们无法存活，而是因为那种存活品质会带来巨大痛苦，例如，如此扭曲生命的本质，几乎使其沦为笑柄。每个物种都在安全作为行动媒介的框架中寻求自身能力与才能的发展。在此脉络下，危险存在于动物清楚知晓且明确界定的特定条件下：例如，猎物与猎食者皆被明确认知。但即使是另一种动物的天然猎物，当猎食者饱腹时也不会恐惧"猎手"，而猎手此时也不会发动攻击。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 805, MAY 16, 1977
9:28 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Where matter would exist there, a concentration of energy forms what you could think of as a body form, body meaning mass, yet it would not be matter in your terms. Such manifestations in the electric field are much more powerful, in terms of intensity per mass unit, than anything you know. This is a very important point, which will come up with us again in the future. Now again: regardless of current scientific thought, there are at least three different kinds of electric force which your scientists have not yet discovered, and one of these has much to do with the intensity of thoughts as they are formed in the intangible mind, and translated to the physical brain and then into action, as the case may be.
quotes.translation: 物质存在之处，能量会凝聚成你可视为身体形态的东西——"身体"意指质量，但这并非你认知中的物质。电场中的这类显化，就单位质量强度而言，比你所知的任何事物都强大得多。这是个非常重要的观点，我们未来还会再次提及。现在再说一遍：不论当前科学思想如何，至少存在三种你们科学家尚未发现的电力，其中一种与思想在无形心智中形成、转化为物理大脑、进而转化为行动（视情况而定）时的强度密切相关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Hate, left alone then, does not erupt into violence. Hatred brings a sense of power and initiates communication and action. In your terms it is the build up of natural anger; in animals, say, it would lead to a face-to-face encounter, of battle stances in which each creature's body language, motion, and ritual would serve to communicate a dangerous position. One animal or the other would simply back down. Growling or roaring might be involved.
quotes.translation: 仇恨若任其自然，并不会爆发为暴力。仇恨带来力量感，并启动沟通与行动。以你们的说法，这是自然愤怒的累积；以动物为例，这会导致面对面的对峙，双方摆出战斗姿态，通过肢体语言、动作和仪式来传达危险处境。其中一方会直接退让，过程中可能伴随咆哮或怒吼。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: These probable realities exist within what may be generally termed your own sphere of activity, your own plane. There are many other realities that are far divorced from your own however. Every thought, as I have told you, is an action and must seek to fulfill itself. It is a fragment, therefore. You are literally surrounded by other realities that you do not perceive consciously. Some of these are perceived by the inner self, but all are not.
quotes.translation: 这些可能性的实相存在于可泛称为你们自身活动领域（即你们自己的层面）之中。然而还有许多其他实相与你们的世界截然不同。正如我曾告诉你们的，每个念头都是行动，必须寻求自我完成。因此它是个片段。你们确实被其他无法有意识感知的实相所环绕。内在自体感知到其中一部分，但并非全部。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now again, no psychic action is static. Nor is it sterile. The dream world may have no material reality in your plane, and yet its existence in many respects is no less than what you consider reality. The difference is only in the amount of energy which you focus and the direction in which you focus it.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，没有心灵行动是静止的，也没有心灵行动是贫瘠的。梦境世界在你们层面或许没有物质实相，但其存在在许多方面丝毫不亚于你们所谓的实相。差异仅在于你们聚焦的能量多寡，以及聚焦的方向不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now it is easier perhaps for some of you to understand the simple stories and parables of beginnings of which I have spoken. But the time has come for mankind to take several steps further, to expand the nature of his own consciousness by trying to comprehend a more profound version of reality. You have outgrown the time of children's tales. When your own thoughts have a form and reality, when they have validity even in other systems of reality of which you are unaware, then it is not difficult to understand why other systems of probabilities are also affected by your own thoughts and emotions -- nor why the actions of the probable gods are not affected by what happens in other dimensions of existence.
quotes.translation: 现在你们中有些人或许更容易理解我所说的那些关于起源的简单故事与寓言。但人类已到了需要再迈出几步的时刻——通过尝试理解更深刻的实相版本，来扩展自身意识的本质。你们已经超越了童话故事的阶段。当你们自己的思想具备形态与实相，甚至在你们未曾察觉的其他实相系统中也具有效力时，就不难理解为何其他概率系统也会被你们的思想与情感所影响——也不难理解为何那些"可能的神祇"的行动不会受其他存在维度中发生之事的影响。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They will grow in consciousness and continue their own lines of development on different levels. In one way, we are all thought-forms, and this will be further explained in the material dealing with the god concept. Understand, however, that I do not mean that we lack our own initiative for action, individuality or purpose -- and remember also here that you live from the inside out. Then perhaps the statement will have more meaning for you.
quotes.translation: 他们将在意识中成长，并在不同层面上延续自身的发展路线。从某种角度而言，我们皆是思想形态，这一点将在探讨神祇概念的资料中进一步阐释。但请明白，我并非意指我们缺乏行动的自发性、个体性或目的性——同时请记住：你们是从内向外活着的。那么这句话或许会对你们具有更深的意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, however, all of the other programs are "latent" in the one you are watching. There are coordinates that unite them all. There is a give-and-take quite invisible to you between one program and another, and action within one, again, affects the action within each of the others.
quotes.translation: 然而，可以说所有其他程序都"潜藏"于你们正在观看的这个程序之中。存在统合它们的坐标。在程序与程序之间，存在着你们看不见的给予与获取，而一个程序中的行动，同样会影响其他每个程序中的行动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 713
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Your universe cannot be its own source. Its inner mysteries--which are indeed the mysteries of consciousness, not matter--cannot be explained, and must remain incomprehensible, if you try to study them from the viewpoint of your objective experience alone. You must look to the source of that experience. You must look not to space but to the source of space, not to time but to the source of time--and most of all, you must look to the kind of consciousness that experiences space and time. You must look, therefore, to events that show themselves through historical action, but whose origins are elsewhere. None of this is really beyond your capabilities, as long as you try to enlarge your framework.
quotes.translation: 你们的宇宙不能是它自己的源头。其内在奥秘——这些奥秘实际上是意识的奥秘，而非物质的——无法被解释，如果你仅从客观经验的角度去研究它们，它们必然难以理解。你必须审视那经验的源头。你必须看向的不是空间，而是空间的源头；不是时间，而是时间的源头——而最重要的是，你必须看向体验空间与时间的那种意识。因此，你必须看向那些通过历史行动展现自身、但其起源却在别处的事件。只要你尝试扩展你的架构，这一切其实都不超出你的能力范围。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your conscious mind can only accept a certain sequence of probabilities as recognized experience. As I have said, the choices among probabilities go on constantly, both on conscious and unconscious levels. Events that you do not perceive as conscious experience are (pause) a part of your unconscious experience, however, to some extent. This applies to the individual, and of course en masse the same applies to world events. Each action seeks all of its own possible fulfillments. All That Is seeks all possible experience, but in such a larger framework in this case that questions of, say, pain or death simply do not apply, though [certainly] they do on the physical level (all quite forcefully).
quotes.translation: 你的意识心智只能接受特定序列的概率作为被认可的经验。如我所说，概率的选择持续进行着，既在意识层面也在无意识层面。那些你未感知为意识经验的事件，在某种程度上，却是你无意识经验的一部分。这适用于个体，当然也适用于世界事件。每个行动都寻求其所有可能的实现。一切万有寻求所有可能的经验，但在如此更大的架构中，诸如痛苦或死亡之类的问题根本不适用，尽管它们在物质层面确实存在（语气相当有力）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The probable events are experienced in such a way that any given action or probable action is followed through in its various and almost infinite varieties.
quotes.translation: 概率事件以这样一种方式被体验：任何给定的行动或概率行动，都会在其各种近乎无限的变体中得以贯彻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now: Dictation. (With many pauses:) When I speak of the dream world, I am not referring to some imaginary realm, but to the kind of world of ideas, of thoughts, of mental actions, out of which all form as you think of it emerges. In actuality this is an inner universe rather than an inner world. Your physical reality is but one materialization of that inner organization. All possible civilizations exist first in that realm of inner mind.
quotes.translation: 现在：口述。（多次停顿：）当我谈及梦境世界时，并非指某个虚幻领域，而是指那个由理念、思想、心灵行动所构成的世界——你们所认知的一切形态皆由此涌现。实际上，这是一个内在宇宙，而非内在世界。你们的物质实相仅是那内在组织的一种物质化呈现。所有可能的文明都首先存在于那内在心灵的领域。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "Now, physically, neurological action is a code for other actions that usually can't be experienced at once because of the selectivity mentioned earlier.2
quotes.translation: "从生理层面而言，神经活动是其他行动的密码——由于先前提及的选择性，这些行动通常无法被同时体验。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 685)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: ([Tom:] "He talked some more about physical matter... an elaboration on the things we've talked about during the evening. The reality on another plane or in another dimension is just as physical as what we experience as physical here... just as real, seems physical to them. But the freedoms are greater, so that when we think of something on another plane, it happens instantaneously. Whereas here, there is a time lag between the time we think of something and it results in a created action or object. In the time lag on this plane, there are other thoughts, projections on the same idea or object; Seth declined to go into their effects on the final idea or object until a later time.
quotes.translation: （汤姆："他还进一步阐述了物质...是对我们晚间讨论内容的延伸。在另一个层面或维度中的实相，其物质性如同我们在此处体验的物质实相一般真实...对他们而言同样真实可感。但那里的自由度更高，因此当我们在另一层面思考某事时，它会即刻发生。而在此处，从思考到产生行动或物体之间存在时间差。在这个时间差里，同一理念或物体会产生其他想法与投射；赛斯暂不探讨这些投射对最终理念或物体的影响，留待日后说明。"）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In a reality that is inconceivably multidimensional, the old concepts of God are relatively meaningless. Even the term, a supreme being, is in itself distortive, for you naturally project the qualities of human nature upon it. If I told you that God was an idea, you would not understand what I meant, for you do not understand the dimensions in which an idea has its reality, or the energy that it can originate and propel. You do not believe in ideas in the same way that you believe in physical objects, so if I tell you that God is an idea, you will misinterpret this to mean that God is less than real -- nebulous, without reality, without purpose, and without motive action.
quotes.translation: 在一个不可思议的多维实相中，关于神的旧有概念相对而言毫无意义。甚至"至高存在"这个术语本身也具有扭曲性，因为你自然会将自己的人性特质投射其上。若我告诉你神是一个理念，你无法理解我的意思，因为你并不了解理念在其维度中具有的实相，也不了解它能发起和推动的能量。你并不像相信物质物体那样相信理念，所以若我告诉你神是一个理念，你会误解为神不如实相——虚无缥缈、没有实相、没有目的、也没有动机性的行动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, this is not to be a technical book, so this is not the time nor place to discuss thoroughly the action, behavior or effects of these coordinate points; nor of the electromagnetic energy units -- those natural emanations of consciousness of which I spoke. I want it known, however, that thoughts and emotions are formed into physical matter by very definite methods and through laws quite valid, though they may be presently unknown.
quotes.translation: 这并非一本技术性书籍，因此现在不是详细讨论这些坐标点的行动、行为或效应的适当时机；也不是讨论电磁能量单元——那些我提及过的意识自然放射物——的适当时机。然而，我希望你们明白，思想和情感是通过非常明确的方法和相当有效的法则（尽管目前可能未知）被形成为物质实相的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
