quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Again, the term God is used simply because it is an accepted term for the reality we are discussing. That which knows itself, which experiences itself within many forms and yet knows itself as something apart from the total of its sums, that left-over, unexplainable remnant you see, can be thought of as original action, original consciousness, prime mover, or consciousness as distinct from its own creations, of which it is also part.
quotes.translation: 再次说明，"神"这个术语之所以被使用，仅仅因为它是一个被接受的术语，用以指代我们正在讨论的实相。那个知晓自身、在众多形式中体验自身、却又知晓自身是超越其总和之物——那个剩余的、无法解释的残余部分，你可以将其视为原初行动、原初意识、原动者，或意识本身，它既区别于自己的创造物，又同时是这些创造物的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Four o'clock in the afternoon is a very handy reference. You can say to a friend, "I will meet you at four o'clock at the corner," or at a restaurant, for a drink or a chat or a meal, and your friend will know precisely where and when he will find you. This will happen despite the fact that four o'clock in the afternoon has no basic meaning, but is an agreed-upon designation -- a gentlemen's agreement, if you prefer. If you attend the theatre at nine o'clock in the evening, but the actions of the play take place within the morning hours, and the actors are shown eating breakfast, you accept the time as given within the theatre's play. You also pretend that it is morning.
quotes.translation: 下午四点钟是一个非常方便的参照点。你可以对朋友说："我下午四点在街角等你"，或者在餐厅碰面喝一杯、聊聊天或吃顿饭，你的朋友会确切知道何时何地能找到你。尽管下午四点钟本身并无基本意义，只是一种约定俗成的指称——若你愿意，也可称之为绅士协定。若你晚上九点去看戏，但剧情发生在清晨时分，演员们正在吃早餐，你便会接受剧场戏剧中设定的时间。你也会假装此刻是清晨。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In line with the statement that action necessarily changes that which it acts upon （in parentheses: which is basically itself）, then it follows that the action involved in these sessions changes the nature of the sessions.
quotes.translation: 根据"行动必然改变其作用对象（括号内：本质上即是其自身）"这一陈述，那么这些课程中所涉及的行动，自然也会改变课程本身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Experience existing outside of that reference is not dependent upon duration in your terms. There is no "perfect ending," no completed perfection beyond which further experience is impossible or meaningless. (Long pause.) All That Is is a source of infinite and unending simultaneous action. Everything happens at once, and yet there is no beginning and end to it in your terms, so it is not completed in your terms at any given point.
quotes.translation: 存在于该参照系之外的体验，并不依赖你们所理解的时间持续。不存在"完美的终点"，也没有任何完成的完美状态，使得进一步的体验变得不可能或无意义。（长停顿。）一切万有是无限且无始无终的同时性行动的源头。万事万物同时发生，然而在你们看来既无起点也无终点，因此在你们的时间框架内，它永远不会在任何特定时刻"完成"。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: While I am doing that I am also trying to introduce you, intuitively at least, to a larger framework, in which events straddle the reality that you know. Nevertheless, we will begin with issues in which it is very possible that contradictions may seem to occur, since your own definitions of an event are so simple that they ignore larger ramifications--ramifications that would reconcile any seeming contradictions in an overall greater unity of structure and action. Your imaginations will be of high value here, for they can often perceive unities that are not evident to the intellect--which you have trained to deal specifically with the evidence of the here and now.
quotes.translation: 当我进行这项工作时，我也在试图引导你——至少是直觉上——进入一个更广阔的框架，其中事件跨越你所知的实相。然而，我们将从那些看似可能产生矛盾的问题开始，因为你们对事件的定义过于简单，以至于忽略了更广泛的分支——这些分支会在结构与行动的整体更大统一性中调和任何表面矛盾。你们的想象力在此极具价值，因为它们常能感知到理智无法明见的统一性——而你们已训练理智专门处理此时此地的证据。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I now suggest your break, and I do myself indeed enjoy your pleasant summer evening. I would like to make it plain here, however, that on a surface psychological level, the personality plunges into activity, and it is for the present this portion of the personality with whom we must deal. Nevertheless, beneath there is a denial of involvement, and a strong desire for permanency, both of which are repressed, and the stronger the efforts put forth by the ego to repress these tendencies, then these tendencies will explode with inadequate stimuli. There will be an over action on the part of the ego to compensate for the refusal to accept involvement on deeper levels.
quotes.translation: 现在我建议你们休息，我确实很享受你们这宜人的夏夜。不过我想在此说明，在表面心理层面，人格会投入活动，而目前我们必须处理的就是人格的这一部分。然而在表层之下，存在着对卷入的否认和对永恒性的强烈渴望，这两者都被压抑着，而自我越努力压抑这些倾向，这些倾向就越会在不充分的刺激下爆发。自我会过度行动，以补偿在更深层次上拒绝接受卷入。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A study of the correlations with their distortive effect would seem to yield entirely different data. Only an observer from without the three-field system of universes could judge that one action, and not three, had occurred. It will be simplest to discuss at first such correlations occurring within the dream universe, and the universe of matter, since the dream universe is closest to you in both psychic and electromagnetic terms.
quotes.translation: 研究这些具有扭曲效应的关联性，似乎会得出完全不同的数据。只有从三场域宇宙体系之外观察的观察者才能判断：发生的是一个行动，而非三个。最简便的方法是先讨论梦境宇宙与物质宇宙中发生的此类关联性，因为无论在心灵层面还是电磁层面，梦境宇宙都离你们最近。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Nor is the dream universe a shadow image of your own. It carries on according to the possibilities inherent within it, as you carry on according to the possibilities that exist within the physical field. The possibilities for action vary, however, within these two fields as they vary within all other fields. You may say that in sleeping you focus your energies to form a different reality than the reality of waking physical matter.
quotes.translation: 梦境宇宙也并非你们世界的投影。它依循自身内在的可能性运作，正如你们依循物质场域中的可能性运作。然而行动的可能性在这两个场域中各有不同，正如其在所有其他场域中各有差异。你可以说，在睡眠中你集中能量形成的实相，与清醒时物质世界的实相截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is only learning now not to scold and badger his subconscious. Again, all of this involves action within action. Now. It is the intuitive, spontaneous and psychically exuberant nature of Ruburt's whole entity, for one thing, that makes it possible for me to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏现在才学会不再斥责和纠缠潜意识。再次强调，这一切都涉及行动中的行动。请注意，正是鲁柏整体存有那直觉性、自发性和灵性丰沛的本质，才使我得以与你们两人沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Matter has little effect within the electrical system, but the effects of the electrical system upon physical matter are great. Now. Thoughts, human thought, has an electric reality; a human thought exists as an independent electrical action, and as such it continues to exist within the electrical system long after it has left its point of origin. This is another important piece of information that will also be referred to later.
quotes.translation: 物质在电性系统内几乎不产生作用，但电性系统对物质的影响却极为深远。请注意：人类思想具有电性实相——每个思想都是独立的电性行动，当它离开起源点后，仍会持续存在于电性系统中。这是另一项重要资讯，日后还会再提及。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Therefore, to some extent we are part of one vast sphere of action; and it is relatively more easy, therefore, for us to communicate. You in particular, Joseph, can benefit through the development of an easy access of communication with your own personal subconscious. Our Ruburt is indeed at times heavy-handed. At times he badgers you, but his remarks concerning the importance and indeed the strength of joy, should be well taken.
quotes.translation: 因此，在某种程度上，我们是同一个广阔行动领域的一部分；因此，我们之间的沟通相对更容易。尤其是你，约瑟夫，可以通过发展与自己个人潜意识轻松沟通的途径而获益。我们的鲁柏有时确实过于强硬。他有时会纠缠你，但他关于喜悦的重要性及其力量的评论，应当认真听取。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: So, comparing the ball to an action, you perceive but the smallest portion of any given action, even one performed by yourself. It does not occur to you that there is more to perceive. When the ball goes out of sight, so to speak, you could say for our analogy that it goes into the future.
quotes.translation: 所以，将球比作一个行动，你只能感知到任何特定行动的最小部分，即使是你自己执行的一个行动。你并没有意识到还有更多值得感知的东西。打个比方，当球从视线中消失时，你可以说它进入了未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The same mechanism that causes a disturbed woman, say, to perform repetitive action such as a constant washing and rewashing of hands, also causes a particular kind of apparition to return time and time again to one place. In such cases the behavior is often composed of repetitive action.
quotes.translation: 导致一个困扰的女性，比如，反复进行洗手和再洗手的重复性行动的相同机制，也会导致某种特定的幻影一次又一次地回到同一个地方。在这种情况下，行为往往由重复性行动构成。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is instead composed of the intensity with which it is felt by a given individual. When you speak in terms of the depth of a river, you speak in terms of distance, physical distance. When you speak in terms of the depth of a psychological experience or action, you mean something else entirely, for this is a depth of intensity. And you travel through an experience only so far as your own experience of intensity will allow you.
quotes.translation: 它反而由个体感受的强度所构成。当你谈论河流的深度时，你指的是物理距离。当你谈论心理经验或行动的深度时，你指的完全是另一回事，因为这是强度的深度。你穿越一个经验的程度，仅取决于你自身对强度的体验所能允许的范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: My own identity, in simple terms, has fewer hang-ups than the personality that is operating in physical terms. My range of perception is far greater, as is my range of activity and the kinds of energy I am able at times to direct. Even the quality of that action is of a different nature.
quotes.translation: 简单来说，我的身份比在物质层面运作的人格拥有更少的执念。我的感知范围远大于此，我的活动范围以及我有时能引导的能量种类也是如此。甚至那种行动的本质也具有不同的性质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego must be understood as having certain general necessary characteristics. Again, it must attempt to see itself as apart from action, even though basically the attempt to do so must fail. The attempt however allows the ego to act as a front man, so to speak, an organized and disciplined agent to deal with physical environment for the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 必须理解自我具有某些普遍的必要特征。再次强调，它必须试图将自己视为与行动分离，尽管这种尝试基本上注定失败。然而，这种尝试使自我能够充当所谓的"前台人物"，一个为整个人格处理物质环境的有组织、有纪律的代理人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This vastvoid, this infinite mind, came out of another that was greater than itself. (Pause, smile.) The possibilities that have come to reality within this universal system have each given birth to other systems and other realities, as one tree bears a thousand seeds. (Pause.) you yourselves through your own mental actions create realities of which you yourselves are unaware, and you give birth to more than physical children.
quotes.translation: 这片广袤的虚空，这无限的心灵，出自一个比它自身更伟大的存在。（停顿，微笑。）在这个宇宙系统内已化为实相的可能性，每一个都孕育出其他系统与其他实相，如同一棵树结出千粒种子。（停顿。）你们自己通过自身的心灵行动，创造出连你们自己都未曾察觉的实相，你们所孕育的远不止是物质层面的子女。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The relative, neutral passivity is attained as various portions of the whole self once more collect together. The acceleration, which is mental, begins as those divergent portions of the whole self-interact. This is an electromagnetic sequence or action that will eventually help provide the impetus for projection of the whole self into another field of actuality, as the rate of acceleration increases and becomes more unified.
quotes.translation: 当整体自性的各个部分再次汇聚时，便达到那种相对的、中性的被动状态。当整体自性那些分散的部分开始相互作用时，心灵的加速便开始了。这是一种电磁序列或行动，随着加速率增加并变得更加统一，最终将有助于为整体自性投射到另一个实相场域提供动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: All electrical actions exist with those characteristics. They amount to an overall existence as valid as your own. In many ways it could be said that the physical system is an effect caused by this electrical field. There is still much to be covered here. There are units, working backward from your system, for conveniences sake, whereby your very physical weight is in electric form, an actuality beside the one that you know.
quotes.translation: 所有电性行动都具备这些特性。它们构成一种与你们自身同样有效的整体存在。从许多方面来说，可以说物质系统是由这个电磁场引发的一种效应。这里还有许多内容需要探讨。为方便起见，从你们的系统逆向推导，存在一些单位，使得你们物质性的体重本身也以电性形式存在——这是与你们所知的实相并存的另一种实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We will discuss what you call suggestion in more practical terms, for your particular uses. Nevertheless it is necessary that its basic nature be understood. The ego simply cannot judge, as a rule, whether an action is a constructive or an impeding one, for the personality as a whole.
quotes.translation: 我们将以更实际的角度讨论你们所谓的暗示，以便你们能加以运用。然而，理解其基本性质仍是必要的。自我通常无法判断一个行动究竟是建设性的还是阻碍性的，因为人格是一个整体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: You think for example in terms of good and bad suggestions, and I have on occasion used the terms myself, in order to make a point clear. However what you call suggestion, left alone, is a part of the inner impetus of action, which is translated in all areas of consciousness outward.
quotes.translation: 例如，你们以好坏暗示来思考，我有时也使用这些术语以阐明观点。然而，你们所谓的暗示，若不加干预，本是行动内在驱力的一部分，它会向外显化于意识的所有领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: All of this sounds very complicated. Yet in a different way the same processes occur at other levels, as in its way cellular consciousness perceives all of the probabilities concerned with physical survival in its most far-reaching complications. At this moment the cells within your body know the life conditions of any place on the planet, and compute these, ascertaining the ways in which they require action on the body's part. Your cells are aware of the motion of the planets and of all circumstances regarding the body's equilibrium, stability, and survival. The body is then formed constantly as the result of these computations.
quotes.translation: 这一切听起来非常复杂。然而，同样的过程以不同方式发生在其他层面——就像细胞意识以其方式感知所有与物理生存相关的概率，甚至包括最深远复杂的层面。此刻，你体内的细胞知晓地球上任何地方的生命条件，并计算这些条件，确定身体需要采取何种行动。你的细胞意识到行星的运动，以及所有关乎身体平衡、稳定与存续的状况。身体正是这些计算结果的持续显化。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are bombarded with such "alien intrusions" constantly. The focus of your consciousness blots these out while you are in the normal waking state. There are falling stars everywhere tumbling through the heavens, for example, though you only see some of these in the night sky. It is important during the day that a screening process be used, so that the precision of your actions can be maintained. Again, however, that fine precision rests upon an endless amount of information that impinges onto other levels of your psychological reality. Those data then become the raw material, so to speak, from which your physical events are formed.
quotes.translation: 你不断受到这类"异质入侵"的轰炸。在正常清醒状态下，你的意识焦点会屏蔽这些信息。例如，天空中到处都有流星坠落，尽管你只在夜空中看到其中一部分。白天使用筛选过程至关重要，这样才能维持你行动的精确性。然而，这种精微的精确性又依赖于源源不断的信息，这些信息冲击着你心理实相的其他层面。可以说，那些数据随后成为形成你物质事件的原始材料。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "I do not want to go into a history of culture here, but your organizations historically have largely been built upon your religious concepts, which have indeed been extremely rigid. The repressive nature of Christian thought in the Middle Ages, for example, is well known. Artistic expression itself was considered highly suspect if it traveled outside of the accepted precepts, and particularly of course if it led others to take action against those precepts. To some extent the same type of policy is still reflected in your current societies, though science or the state itself may serve instead of the church as the voice of authority.
quotes.translation: "我不想在此深入文化史，但你们历史上的组织大多建立在宗教观念之上，这些观念确实极为僵化。例如，中世纪基督教思想的压制性众所周知。艺术表达本身若超出公认教条，就会被高度怀疑，尤其当它引导他人采取违背这些教条的行动时。某种程度上，同样的政策仍反映在你们当前的社会中，尽管科学或国家本身可能取代教会成为权威之声。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth's comments of February 17 also reflect upon Jane's own ideas as she described them just 11 days ago; see the excerpts in Note 4. Then in this Chapter 9 of Dreams, see Note 8 for Session 920.

quotes.text: The inner self that knows its existence within action, has a firm foothold within reality. The ego can perform its function, fulfill its responsibilities within the physical field, and be free to know adequate joys and pleasures. But such an inner self must be renewed within action.
quotes.translation: 知晓自身存在于行动中的内在自我，在实相中拥有稳固的立足点。自我能在物质领域履行其功能、完成其责任，并自由体验充分的喜悦与欢愉。但这样的内在自我必须在行动中得到更新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: All That Is simultaneously and unendingly creates itself. Only within your particular frame of reference does there seem to be a contradiction between action that is simultaneous and yet unending. This has to do mainly with the necessary distortions arising from your time concept and the idea of duration; for duration to you presupposes existence continued within a time framework -- predisposing to beginnings and endings.
quotes.translation: 一切万有同时且无止境地创造自身。只有在你们特定的参照系中，同时性与无止境之间才看似存在矛盾。这主要源于你们的时间概念与持续性的扭曲认知——对你们而言，持续性预设了在时间框架内的存续，从而导向开端与终结的二元对立。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Everything within your three-dimensional system occurs simultaneously. Each action creates other possibilities of itself, or other actions from the infinite energy of the universe, which itself is never still. The answer is that the whole is more than the sum of its parts. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 你们三维系统内的一切都同时发生。每个行动都从宇宙永不静止的无限能量中，创造出自身的其他可能性，或衍生出其他行动。答案是：整体大于部分之和。（停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Many psychological intangibles, including dreams, have such an electric reality, and do exist as electric actions. They are to be reckoned with. The connections between the emotional climate and physical health have never been clearly understood, because emotions were not known to have such electrical reality. They were not known to directly affect the system. More is understood as far as the chemical relationships here.
quotes.translation: 包括梦境在内的许多心理无形体，都具有这种电性实相，并确实作为电性行动而存在。它们必须被认真对待。情绪氛围与身体健康之间的关联从未被清晰理解，因为人们不知道情绪具有如此电性实相，更不知道它们会直接影响系统。相比之下，人们对化学层面的关联理解得更多一些。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You however would view this in slow motion, so that eons of time would seem to have passed. And yet energy or action, which is consciousness, is always changing, and the shape of the flower and the blossom would constantly change. Energy can never be lost but only change its form.
quotes.translation: 然而你们会以慢动作看待这个过程，以至于看似经历了数不清的纪元。但能量或行动——即意识——始终在变化，花朵与蓓蕾的形态也会持续改变。能量永不消逝，只会转化形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Since perceiving an action is itself an action, the perceiving must because of its nature to some extent distort the object of perception.
quotes.translation: 由于感知行动本身即是一种行动，感知行为因其本质必然会在某种程度上扭曲被感知的对象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now when you understand that intellectually, then the intellect can take it for granted that its own information is not all the information you possess. It can realize that its own knowledge represents the tip of the iceberg. As you apply that realization to your life you begin to realize furthermore that in practical terms you are indeed supported by a greater body of knowledge than you consciously realize, and by the magical, spontaneous fountain of action that forms your existence. The intellect can then realize that it does not have to go it all alone: Everything does not have to be reasoned out, even to be understood.
quotes.translation: 当你在智性上理解这点时，理性便能理所当然地认识到：它自身的信息并非你拥有的全部信息。它能意识到自己的知识只是冰山一角。当你将这份领悟应用于生活，便会进一步发现：在现实层面，你确实被远超意识认知的庞大知识体系所支撑，被构成你存在的、魔法般的自发行动之泉所滋养。于是理性终将明白，它无需独自承担一切——即便为了理解，也并非所有事物都必须经过逻辑推演。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: Since action is not apart from structure, but is indeed the formulator of structure, then it is obvious that generally the type, nature, extent and scope of characteristic perception patterns of a consciousness will determine its physical structure, and not the other way around.
quotes.translation: 既然行动并非与结构分离，而实为结构的形成者，那么显然一般而言，一个意识之典型感知模式的类型、性质、范围与幅度，将决定其物理结构，而非反之。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: (8:49.) Many people might wish that I would add many more methods to help you study dreams and their nature. In such a manner also dreams suggest nature's spontaneous order throughout the centuries, and allow you to look at the species in a truer light. Your lives, for that matter, are dependent upon the curious relationships that are involved. Colon: You would not get by for one day if the conserving principles and the unexpected did not exist exactly as they do. There is so much you must learn and remember in life, and so much you must spontaneously forget--otherwise, action itself would be relatively meaningless.
quotes.translation: （8:49。）许多人或许希望我能增添更多方法，以助你们研究梦境及其本质。同样地，梦境也揭示了贯穿数个世纪的自然自发秩序，并使你们能以更真实的目光审视物种。就此而言，你们的生命依赖于那些奇妙的关联。冒号：若守恒原则与意外之事并非如其所是地存在，你们连一天都无法度过。生命中有太多必须学习与铭记之事，也有太多必须自发遗忘之事——否则，行动本身将相对失去意义。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: While the cells required future and past data, and used it to form from that invisible tension the body's present corporal reality, the same kind of information could be a threat then to the ego consciousness, which could be overwhelmed. Within the corporal structure, however, there are indeed messages that leap too quickly or too slowly2 from your viewpoint to allow for any physical response. In that way cellular comprehension is allowed its free flow; but the selectivity mentioned (in sessions 682-3) bypasses such information, so that it does not conflict with present sense data requiring physical action in time.
quotes.translation: 尽管细胞需要过去与未来的数据，并利用它们从那种无形的张力中形成身体当下的物质实相，但同样的信息对自我意识而言却可能构成威胁，使其不堪重负。然而，在物质结构内部，确实存在一些信息，从你们的视角来看，它们跃动得过快或过慢，以至于无法引发任何物理反应。如此，细胞的理解得以自由流动；但（第682-3节中）提及的选择性筛选绕过了此类信息，使其不与需要及时物理行动的当下感官数据产生冲突。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: They are the ghost, you see. Perhaps I did not put myself clearly. (In the last session) They are vanishing, in that they no longer have the power to frighten him in the same way that his physical symptoms had in the past. He can see, even in them, his way out of them. Physically speaking in your terms, they will be largely, and I mean largely, minimized as these actions of yours break up the cues. This week and next, in other words, if you follow your plans.
quotes.translation: 它们是幻影，你看。或许我上次没说清楚。它们正在消散，因为再也无法像过去肉体症状那样吓唬他了。他甚至能从这些幻影中看见出路。用你们的话来说，从肉体层面看，随着你这些行动打破线索，它们将大幅——我是指大幅——减少。换言之，如果你遵循计划，本周和下周就会见效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In private life and on the world stage, action is occurring all the time. It is easy to look at yourselves or at the world, comma, to see yourself and become so hypnotized by your present state that all change or growth seems impossible, or to see the world in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 在私人生活与世界舞台上，行动无时无刻不在发生。人们很容易审视自己或世界——逗号——因过于沉迷当下状态而陷入催眠，以致认为所有改变或成长皆不可能，或以同样方式看待世界。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It "sings" with the quality of its own life. It cooperates with other cells. It affiliates itself with the body of which it is part, but in a way it lends itself to that formation. (Pause.) The dreams of the species are highly important to its survival -- not just because dreaming is a biological necessity, but because in dreams the species is immersed in deeper levels of creativity, so that those actions, inventions, ideas that will be needed in the future will appear in their proper times and places. In the old terms of evolution. I am saying that man's evolutionary progress was also dependent upon his dreams.
quotes.translation: 它"吟唱"着自身生命的特质。它与其他细胞合作，与所属的身体联结，却又以某种方式将自己融入那个结构。（停顿）物种的梦境对其存续至关重要——不仅因为做梦是生理必需，更因在梦中，物种沉浸于更深层的创造力中，那些未来所需的行动、发明与理念，将在适当时空显现。以古老的进化论而言，我要说人类的进化进程同样依赖于梦境。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 867, JULY 23, 1979
9:28 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: These moment points, incidentally, serve as reference points often from one field of activity to another, as openings or entryways. Such a moment point has a peculiar molecular structure, that is a result of intensification of action, and basically has nothing to do with the moment point happening to coincide with what you call a physical moment.
quotes.translation: 这些瞬间点，顺便一提，常作为从一个活动领域到另一个领域的参考点，如同开口或入口。这样的瞬间点具有特殊的分子结构，这是行动强化的结果，且基本上与它恰好符合你们所谓的物理瞬间无关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your psychological life is dependent upon your ability to perceive and react to such action events. Your reaction, of course, creates new ones. Your identity, your inner self, is a main action event, forming other such events that are the various portions of your personality.
quotes.translation: 你的心理生活依赖于你感知和回应此类行动事件的能力。当然，你的回应会创造新的事件。你的身份、你的内在自己，是一个主要的行动事件，形成其他此类事件，即你人格的不同部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are also what I will call body dreams. No consciousness, to whatever degree, is fully manifested in matter. There is always constant communication between all portions of the body, but when the conscious mind is diverted that activity often increases. Cellular consciousness at its own level then forms a body dream. These do not involve pictures or words, but are rather like the formations of electromagnetic intent, anticipating action to be taken, and these may then serve as initiators of therapeutic dreams, in which "higher" levels of consciousness are psychologically made aware of certain conditions.
quotes.translation: 还有我称之为身体梦的现象。无论何种程度的意识，都无法完全显现在物质中。身体各部分之间始终存在持续沟通，但当意识心转移注意力时，这种活动往往增加。细胞意识在其自身层面会形成身体梦。这些不涉及图像或文字，而更像是电磁意图的构成，预判将要采取的行动，随后这些可能成为治疗性梦的启动者，在其中“更高”层次的意识在心理上意识到某些状况。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: When this solution fails the impeding action will then materialize as a physical illness, or as an undesirable psychological condition. The dream experience however is much more richly varied than you suppose. There are ways which we shall discuss that will enable a personality to deal more effectively with the dream situation, and to use it more effectively with the dream situation, and to use it more effectively.
quotes.translation: 当这个解决方案失败时，受阻的行动就会以身体疾病或不良心理状态的形式具体化。然而，梦境体验远比你所想象的更为丰富多彩。我们将讨论一些方法，使个体能够更有效地处理梦境情境，并更充分地运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Personalities are composed of action and of psychic components. This is what you are. It is what I am. There are at all times more various kinds of personalities than there are flower seeds--different varieties. Some mature and develop, some are in ways I have not yet explained, transitory. They merge into other gestalts, but what they are is never destroyed. They operate independently while part of other gestalts.
quotes.translation: 人格由行动和心灵成分构成。这就是你的本质，也是我的本质。任何时候都存在比花种更多样的人格类型——各种不同的变体。有些成熟发展，有些则以我尚未解释的方式呈现为过渡形态。它们融入其他完形，但其本质从未被摧毁。当它们成为其他完形的一部分时，仍能独立运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You do not understand the dimensions into which your thoughts drop, for they continue their own existence, and others look up to them and view them like stars. Now I am telling you that your own dreams and thoughts and mental actions appear to the inhabitants of other systems like the stars and planets within your own; and those inhabitants do not perceive what lies within and behind the stars in their own heavens.
quotes.translation: 你们不了解思想坠入的维度，因为思想会继续其自身的存在，而其他存在会仰望它们，如同仰望星辰。现在我告诉你们，你们自己的梦境、思想和心灵活动，在其它系统的居民眼中，就像你们系统中的星辰和行星；而那些居民也看不见他们自己天空中的星辰之内与背后的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The subconscious however is not so limited. If you consider the ego at the apex of the moment point, and imprisoned therefore within the realm of its own before-and-after, cause-and-effect experience, then you can imagine the subconscious reaching further outward and seizing upon many other moment points. It should be easy to see then why the focus of the ego is so sharp and brilliant. Within its limited scope there is intensity of stimuli and response. Indeed, the ego is that portion of the personality which is plunged into a specific and intense preoccupation with a given field of action or dimension.
quotes.translation: 然而潜意识并不受如此限制。若你将自我视为当下时刻点的顶端，因而被囚禁于自身的前因后果、因果经验的领域内，那么你可以想象潜意识向外延伸得更远，抓住许多其他时刻点。由此便不难理解为何自我的焦点如此锐利而鲜明。在其有限的范围内，刺激与反应具有强烈的强度。事实上，自我正是人格中投入特定且强烈专注的某一部分，专注于某个行动或维度的既定领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As a rule, secondary personalities are given their energy as a direct result, so to speak, of a too-rigorous and rejecting ego. In many, though not all instances, such a secondary personality may represent simply the whole personality's quite healthy attempts at expression that have been too long denied. You get a regrouping of unifying principle actions, and a division of energies about two different ego systems.
quotes.translation: 通常来说，次要人格的能量来源，可以说是过于严苛且排斥的自我直接导致的结果。在许多（虽非全部）情况下，这种次要人格可能仅仅代表整体人格长期被压抑的、相当健康的表达尝试。你会看到统一原则行动的重组，以及能量围绕两个不同自我系统的分裂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Action does not always move in what you would consider a straight line. Because you view action in narrow terms, usually seeing it in physical terms only, you are inclined to think of it, or any effort, as a straight line from one point to another. This is hardly the case.
quotes.translation: 行动并不总是以你所认为的直线方式移动。因为你以狭隘的视角看待行动，通常仅从物质层面理解，你倾向于认为行动或任何努力，是从一点到另一点的直线。事实远非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment.... Master events are those (long pause) whose main activity takes place in inner dimensions. (Long pause.) Such events are t-o-o (spelled) multidimensional to appear clearly in your reality, so that you see or experience only parts of them. They are source events. Their main thrust is in what you can call the vaster dimension of dreams, the unknown territory of inner reality. The terms you use make no difference. The original action, however, of such events is unmanifest--not physical. Those events then "subsequently" show themselves in time and space, with extraordinary results.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……主要事件是指那些（长停顿）其主要活动发生在内在维度的事件。（长停顿。）这类事件是（拼写）多维的，无法清晰显现在你们的现实中，因此你们只能看到或体验到它们的一部分。它们是源头事件。其主要推动力存在于你们所谓的更广阔的梦境维度——内在实相的未知领域。你们用什么术语无关紧要。然而，这类事件的原始行动是未显化的——非物质的。随后，这些事件“接着”在时间与空间中显现，带来非凡的结果。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Knowledge automatically changes the personality and the camouflage structure through which it flows. Knowledge, in other words, is action. There is of course such action taking place in these sessions.
quotes.translation: 知识会自动改变人格及其流经的伪装结构。换言之，知识即是行动。这些课程中当然也存在着这样的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. In much the same manner as these atoms behaved, so also do other units behave, including large ones such as various field universes. Remember, no systems are really closed, but only appear so. There is however a resistance about or around such units, large or small; and it is this resistance through which a mental action must appear, and within which the characteristics or camouflages of the units operate.
quotes.translation: 现在。与这些原子的行为方式极为相似，其他单元也是如此运作，包括像各种场宇宙这样的大型单元。记住，没有任何系统是真正封闭的，只是看起来如此。然而，在这些或大或小的单元周围或附近存在一种阻力；正是通过这种阻力，心智行动必须显现，并且单元的特性或伪装在其中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is in this area that such conflicts arise. The man, or ego, who has never really accepted such violence as a part of his action pattern, will usually have no conflicts in this particular line, simply because the inclination was never a strong part of the ego's inner image, and is more or less discarded automatically, along with all those other characteristics or inclinations which are not in his ego pattern.
quotes.translation: 正是在这个领域产生了这类冲突。从未真正接受这种暴力作为其行动模式一部分的人（或自我），通常不会在这一特定方向上产生冲突，原因很简单：这种倾向从未成为自我内在意象的强烈组成部分，并会与其他所有不属于自我模式的特质或倾向一起，或多或少地被自动摒弃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: However, a certain portion of the energy practically available to it is therefore spent in the maintenance of this impeding action. It is obvious therefore that less energy is available to the personality for actions more beneficial to the personality system as a whole.
quotes.translation: 然而，实际上可供其使用的部分能量因此被消耗在维持这种阻碍性行动上。显然，可用于人格系统整体更有利行动的能量便相应减少了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The basic personality would be fearful of such communications, knowing instinctively the weakness of the ego. The ego would be extremely insecure. On the other hand, the personality would almost welcome a strong organizing force, regardless of its source, and could tend to latch onto it as much as possible. A study of secondary personalities is most fascinating, since such a study would give you an excellent idea of the manner in which the ego in general is formed, for it is but a unity of energy under auspices of the strongest actions characteristic within the given personality system.
quotes.translation: 基本人格会本能地感知到自我的脆弱，从而畏惧这类沟通。自我将极度缺乏安全感。另一方面，人格几乎会欢迎任何强大的组织力量——无论其来源为何——并倾向于尽可能依附于它。对次级人格的研究极具启发性，因为这类研究能让你清晰了解自我通常的形成方式——它不过是特定人格系统内最强烈行动特征主导下形成的能量统一体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The events that you recognize as official have a unitary nature in time that precludes those probable versions of them, from which they arose -- versions that appeared to one extent or another in the dream state. Again, if you speak the English sentence "I am here," you cannot speak the Chinese version at the same time. In that regard, in your framework of action you choose to "speak" one event rather than another. Your formation of events, however, does not simply reside in your unique psychological properties, of course, but is possible because of the corporal alphabet of the flesh.
quotes.translation: 你视为正式的事件在时间中具有单一性，这排除了它们从中产生的那些可能版本——那些在梦境中或多或少显现的版本。再说一次，如果你说出英文句子"I am here"，就无法同时说出中文版本。就此而言，在你的行动架构中，你选择"说出"一个事件而非另一个。然而，你的事件形成并不仅仅取决于你独特的心理属性，当然，而是因为肉体字母表的存在才成为可能。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In this case you are yourself the programmer, and the true action is not where it appears to be -- in the exterior events -- but instead in the psyche, where you are writing and performing the drama. In the dream state, you are writing and performing many such dramas.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，你自己就是程序员，真正的行动并不在其表面所在之处——外在事件中——而是在心灵中，你在那里编写并演出这出戏剧。在梦境中，你正在编写并演出许多这样的戏剧。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When you leave the physical system after reincarnations, you have learned the lessons, and you are literally no longer a member of the human race in those terms, for you elect to leave it. Only the conscious self dwells within it in any case, and it is other portions of your personality who simultaneously dwell within the other training systems. In other more advanced systems, thoughts and emotions are automatically and immediately translated into action, into camouflage, into whatever approximation of matter there exists. Therefore the lessons must be taught and learned well.
quotes.translation: 当你历经转世后离开物质系统时，你已经学到了功课，从那些角度来看，你实际上不再是人类的一员，因为你选择离开它。无论如何，只有意识自我栖居其中，而你人格的其他部分同时栖居在其他训练系统中。在其他更先进的系统中，思想和情感会自动且立即转化为行动、转化为幻相、转化为任何近似物质的形态。因此，这些功课必须被好好教导和学习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Many of these dimensions cannot be discussed at this time. But you will see, indeed, that the nature of action, or the nature of any reality, is greatly colored by the viewpoint or dimension from which it is examined. It is my purpose here to examine for you reality from as many different aspects as possible, lifting you from the limitations of your own dimensions, and allowing you the advantage of others.
quotes.translation: 这些维度中有许多目前无法讨论。但你们将会明白，行动的本质或任何实相的本质，确实会因审视它的观点或维度而大为改观。我在此的目的是尽可能从不同面向为你们检视实相，使你们脱离自身维度的局限，并让你们得以运用其他维度的优势。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A nation which pursues this course is like one individual who primarily follows a strictly "objective, male," externally oriented path in terms of your Western understanding. Certain values have been stressed in your country, particularly in the recent present. These attributes were pursued at the expense of others for individual reasons and those en masse. The rest of the world agreed to such actions, however, and various portions of it took entirely different courses, so that in your experience global society would show a kaleidoscope of varying focuses and their results.
quotes.translation: 遵循此道的国家，就像以你们西方理解中主要遵循严格"客观、男性化"、外向路径的个体。在你们国家，尤其是近代，某些价值观被特别强调。这些特质因个体及集体原因而牺牲其他特质来追求。然而，世界其他地区也同意此类行动，并各自采取截然不同的路径，使得在你们的经验中，全球社会呈现出万花筒般多元焦点及其结果。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The urge between the child's desire to do so, the basically kind nature, and the inability to carry out any such actions in any case, led to an over guarding ego. The ego did not appear rigid, for the inner seethings made it impossible, and spontaneity constantly erupted, but in ways the whole personality felt were the least dangerous.
quotes.translation: 孩子想要如此做的冲动、其本质的良善，以及无论如何都无法执行此类行动的无能，导致了一个过度防卫的自我。这个自我看似并不僵化，因为内在的翻腾使其无法僵化，自发性不断爆发，但总是以整个人格认为最安全的方式呈现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is extremely difficult, but it is possible for the human system to close off, for all practical purposes, a channel that has been used for the flow of such an impeding action. The channel may automatically disappear, but the action itself can never be withdrawn.
quotes.translation: 人类系统极难但可能为了所有实际目的而关闭一条曾用于流动此类阻碍性行动的通道。该通道可能自动消失，但行动本身永远无法撤回。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: You can within them often perceive both your past and present simultaneously, but this has always been a characteristic of the whole self in any case. The whole self is not bound by any system. At various times more of the abilities of the whole self intrude, so to speak, upon the ego system. You then become conscious of action that escaped you earlier. This often occurs with the help of the dream state.
quotes.translation: 你常能在其中同时感知到自己的过去与现在，但这本就是全我始终具备的特性。全我不受任何系统束缚。在不同时刻，全我的更多能力会侵入自我系统，使你意识到先前错失的行动。这种情况常借助梦境状态发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This energy, incidentally, can be most effectively used for creative work. I could have given you much of this material earlier, but I wanted you to understand the basic reasoning behind the material, and for this a knowledge of the nature of action was necessary.
quotes.translation: 这种能量恰可最有效地用于创造性工作。我本可更早提供这些资料，但希望你能理解资料背后的基本逻辑，为此必须了解行动的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The idealizations themselves are made of "conscious" stuff. These are not inert data,1 then. The nature of probabilities determines the framework in which these fulfillments can take place, and "frames" living developments. The structure of probabilities provides on the one hand a system of barriers, in which practical growth is not chosen or significant; and on the other hand it insures a safe, creative, rich environment -- a reality -- in which the idealization can choose from an almost infinite variety of possible actions those best suited to its own fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 理想化本身是由“意识”材料构成的。它们并非惰性数据。概率的本质决定了这些实现得以发生的框架，并“框定”了活生生的演化。概率结构一方面提供了屏障系统，在此系统中实际成长不被选择或无关紧要；另一方面则确保了安全、丰饶、富有创造力的环境——一个实相——在此理想化可以从几乎无限多样的可能行动中，选择最适于自身实现的那些。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "Other species of consciousness gain their experience at different 'levels'; often we encounter such consciousnesses in the dream state, then interpret their actions in the wrong order of events ... according to our own camouflage3 system ... Our bodies are the focuses for only the physical part of our consciousnesses ... My latest dreams are giving me a picture of the nonphysical inner wonderworks ..."
quotes.translation: “其他种类的意识在不同的‘层面’获取经验；我们常在梦境状态遇到这类意识，随后根据我们自己的伪装系统，以错误的事件顺序解读它们的行动……我们的身体只是我们意识中物质部分的聚焦点……我最近的梦境正向我展现非物质的内心奇观……”
