quotes.text: This does not, however, mean that this is the only reality. It is simply the only reality that you perceive with the physical senses. In order to perceive other realities, you must therefore switch from your outer senses to the inner senses, for the inner senses are clearer, and are equipped to perceive action and reality as it exists independently of the distortions given to it by the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 然而这并不意味着这是唯一的实相。它只是你用物质感官感知到的唯一实相。因此，为了感知其他实相，你必须从外在感官切换到内在感官，因为内在感官更为清晰，且能够感知独立于物质感官扭曲之外的行动与实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The lag is partially the result of cues to action. These gradually lose their strength and as the personality, in a better state of mind, is no longer as sensitive to those cues. For a while it is still somewhat more sensitive, for example, to Moods or depressions that it would ordinarily sail through. The overall condition has indeed remarkably improved, as I told you, and there is no distortion here.
quotes.translation: 这个延迟部分源于行动线索。这些线索逐渐失去效力，而人格在较好的心智状态下，对这些线索也不再那么敏感。例如，在一段时间内，它仍会比平常更容易受到情绪或抑郁的影响——这些情绪或抑郁原本可以轻松度过。整体状况确实已显著改善，如我所言，这里并无扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The conditions of existence are largely determined by genetic structure. Free will must then of course function in accordance with genetic integrity. Genetic structure makes possible physical organisms through which life is to be experienced, and to a large extent that structure must determine the kind of action possible in the world, and the way or ways in which volition can be effectively expressed.
quotes.translation: 存在的条件很大程度上由基因结构决定。自由意志当然必须依据基因完整性来运作。基因结构使物理有机体成为可能，生命通过它们得以体验，而很大程度上，这种结构必须决定世界上可能采取的行动种类，以及意志得以有效表达的方式。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: While Jane has been enjoying many periods of ease and relaxation, she's also had bouts of blueness over her general stiffness and walking difficulties [her "symptoms"]. But she's finally dispensed with the last stages of her cold, which had turned out to be much heavier than mine, and is feeling a resurgence of energy for the sessions. Her own work has been going well for the most part, however--she expects to finish Chapter 12 of God of Jane tomorrow. Because of her concentration on that hook she hasn't done much on her book of poetry, If We Live Again, since late February; and as I mentioned in the Preface for Dreams, she laid aside her third Seven novel, Oversoul Seven and the Museum of Time, in May 1979 when she began God of Jane. As for myself, I've progressed to working with Session 860 [for June 13, 1979], which bridges chapters 8 and 9 in Mass Events.

quotes.text: This operates in individual and mass terms. Suppose that today your home was robbed. Yesterday, the theft was one of innumerable probable events. I chose such an example because more than one person would have to be involved -- the victim and the robber. (Pause.) Why was your home ransacked, and not your neighbor's? In one way or another, through your conscious thought you attracted such an event, and drew it from probability into actuality. The occurrence would be an accumulation of energy -- turned into action -- and be brought about by corollary beliefs.
quotes.translation: 这既在个体层面也在集体层面运作。假设今天你的家被抢劫了。昨天，这起盗窃案还是无数可能事件之一。我选择这样的例子是因为涉及不止一个人——受害者和抢劫者。（停顿。）为什么你的家被洗劫，而不是邻居的？以某种方式，通过你的有意识思想，你吸引了这样的事件，并将其从可能性中拉入现实。这个事件会是能量的积累——转化为行动——并由相应的信念所促成。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now he was told under Emotionally charged conditions, as you know, by his mother, that he could or would lose his mind. He tied this in with any strong spontaneous actions on his part, regardless of their nature. An example: once he found it thrilling to ride in an automobile at fast speeds. Now they frighten him. But to him any spontaneity carried the same danger that, say, speeding definitely does.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，如今他被告知，在情绪激动的状况下，他可能会或将会失去理智。他将此与他任何强烈的自发行为联系起来，不论其性质为何。举例来说：他曾觉得高速驾车很刺激，如今却感到恐惧。但对他而言，任何自发性都带有同样的危险——就像超速驾驶必然带来的危险一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I am going to go out rather far on the limb right here. Remembering what you now know about the nature of time, you should know that the apparent boundaries between past, present and future are only illusions, caused by the amount of action you can physically perceive. Therefore, it is more than possible to react in the past to an event that has not yet occurred, to be influenced by your own future.
quotes.translation: 在此我要大胆直言。记住你们现在对时间本质的了解，你们应当明白，过去、现在与未来之间的明显界限只是幻相，是由你们肉体所能感知的行动量所造成的。因此，对尚未发生的事件在过去做出反应，受到自己未来的影响，这不仅是可能的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: To hold your breath is to die. Breath, which represents the most intimate and most necessary of your physical sensations, must flow out from what you are, passing into the world that seems to be not you. Physically, portions of you leave your body constantly and intermix with the elements. You know what happens when adrenalin is released through the bloodstream. It stirs you up and prepares you for action. But in other ways the adrenalin does not just stay in your body. It is cast into the air and it affects the atmosphere, though it is transformed.
quotes.translation: 屏住呼吸就是死亡。呼吸代表你们肉体感受中最亲密、最必需的部分，必须从你所是之处流出，进入看似非你的世界。在肉体层面，你的一部分不断离开身体，与元素交融。你们知道肾上腺素通过血液释放时会发生什么——它会激发你，让你为行动做好准备。但以其他方式而言，肾上腺素并不只停留在体内，它被抛入空气中，虽然经过转化，却会影响大气。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I would like each of my readers to be a practicing idealist, and, if you are then you will automatically be tolerant of the beliefs of others. You will not be unkind in the pursuit of your own ideals. You will look upon the world with a sane compassion, with some humor, and you will look for man's basic good intent. You will find it. It has always been there. You will discover your own basic good intent, and see that it has always been behind all of your actions -- even in those least fitted to the pursuit of your private ideals (with gentle irony).
quotes.translation: 我希望每位读者都能成为实践中的理想主义者，若你如此，自然会对他人信念抱持宽容。你不会因追求自身理想而刻薄待人。你会以清醒的慈悲与幽默看待世界，寻找人类本善的意图。你终将寻得——它始终存在。你也会发现自身本善的意图，并明白它始终贯穿于你所有行动背后——即便是那些最不适合追求个人理想的行动（带着温和的讽刺）。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Over two years ago, in Note 2 for Session 801, and in the opening notes for Session 805, I described our decision to add the writing room to the house. All four of us involved in the moving were quite amused, then -- for the friends who helped Jane and me carry the furniture yesterday are the father-and-son contracting team that built the room in the first place.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The psyche is not male or female. In your system of beliefs, however, it is often identified as feminine, along with the artistic productions that emerge from its creativity. In that context, the day hours and waking consciousness are thought of as masculine, along with the sun -- while the nighttime, the moon, and the dreaming consciousness are considered feminine or passive. In the same manner, aggression is usually understood to be violent assertive action, male-oriented, while female elements are identified in terms of the nurturing principle.
quotes.translation: 心灵并无性别之分。然而在你的信念体系中，它常被认定为女性特质，连同其创造力所孕育的艺术作品。在此语境下，白昼与清醒意识被视为阳刚，与太阳同属；而夜晚、月亮与梦境意识则被视作阴柔或被动。同样地，攻击性通常被理解为暴力性的行动，属于男性导向；而女性元素则被定义为滋养原则。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Dogmas or systems of thought that tell you to rise above your emotions can be misleading -- even, in your terms, somewhat dangerous. Such theories are based upon the concept that there is something innately disruptive, base, or wrong in man's emotional nature, while the soul is always depicted as being calm, "perfect," passive and unfeeling. Only the most lofty, blissful awareness is allowed. Yet the soul is above all a fountain of energy, creativity, and action that shows its characteristics in life precisely through the ever-changing emotions.
quotes.translation: 那些教导你超越情绪的教条或思想体系可能具有误导性——甚至以你的标准而言有些危险。这类理论基于这样的概念：人类情感本质中存在着某种与生俱来的破坏性、卑劣或错误，而灵魂则总被描绘为平静、"完美"、被动且无感。唯有最崇高、极乐的觉知才被允许。然而灵魂首先是能量、创造力与行动的源泉，其特性恰恰通过不断变化的情绪得以展现。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When it is not allowed to flow unimpeded, following the patterns or channels for its expression that have been evolved by the personality, then various blockages of energy occur; with such lockups of inhibited action, small blockages occur frequently, and the blockages or impediments themselves must be understood, not as something apart from the personality, but a part of the changing personality.
quotes.translation: 当行动不被允许依循人格所发展的模式或渠道畅通无阻地流动时，便会产生各种能量的阻塞；在这种受抑制的行动的锁闭中，小阻塞频繁发生，而这些阻塞或障碍本身必须被理解——并非与人格分离的某物，而是变化中人格的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （Seth had some very interesting comments to make when the conversation turned to flying saucers, and the recent rash of reports on such craft in the newspapers. The craft do exist, Seth said, and the action of governments in relation to them leaves much to be desired. I believe he used the word pitiable in this connection. Also, government people cannot bear to admit something they cannot explain.
quotes.translation: （当话题转向飞碟，以及近期报纸上大量关于此类飞行器的报道时，赛斯发表了一些非常有趣的评论。赛斯说，这些飞行器确实存在，而各国政府对待它们的方式则令人遗憾。我相信他用了"可悲"这个词来形容。此外，政府人员无法忍受承认他们无法解释的事物。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （This past week Jane learned the editor of Topper magazine that they had bought a short story of hers, The Mission. She was of course greatly pleased by this news. Seth now told us that Jane would sell more stories out of that batch she had written up before starting the ESP book. It will be remembered that Seth had something to say about Jane's sales of short stories and books in the 104th session. The predictions given in that session 10 months ago are still working out. See Volume 3.

quotes.text: I tell you this, and at the same time remind you that your present personality is never lost. Now another word for the soul is entity. You see it is not a simple matter of giving you a definition of a soul or entity, for even to have a glimpse in logical terms you would have to understand it in spiritual, psychic, and electromagnetic terms, and understand the basic nature of consciousness and action as well. But you can intuitively discover the nature of the soul or entity, and in many ways intuitive knowledge is superior to any other kind.
quotes.translation: 我告诉你们这些，同时提醒你们：你们当前的人格永远不会失去。现在，灵魂的另一个说法是存有。你们看，给你们一个灵魂或存有的定义并非简单之事，因为即使要逻辑性地瞥见其本质，你们也必须从灵性、心灵和电磁的角度去理解它，同时还要理解意识与行动的基本性质。但你们可以直觉地发现灵魂或存有的本质，而在许多方面，直觉知识优于任何其他类型的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Within your particular plane of activity, and speaking practically, no one fully or completely can use all the energy available to them, or completely materialize the inner sensed identity that is multidimensional. This inner identity is the blueprint however against which you judge, ultimately, your physical actions. You strive to express as best you can the entire potential that is within you.
quotes.translation: 在你们特定的活动层面中，且实际来说，没有人能完全或彻底运用所有可用的能量，或完全物质化那多维的内在感知身份。然而，这个内在身份正是你们最终用以评判物质行动的蓝图。你们尽力去表达内在的全部潜能。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In dreams, then, you are involved in the inner process by which physical events are formed. You deal with the psychological components of actions which you will, awake, form into the consecutive corporal "language" that results in the action of your days.
quotes.translation: 因此，在梦境中，你们参与形成物质事件的内在过程。你们处理行动的心理成分，这些成分在清醒时会被你们形塑成连续的肉体"语言"，从而构成你们白日的行动。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Disease is not evil, for example. The murderer kills no one, yet if his intent is to do so then he must face the consequences of his intent. Crime after death is not punished. There is no crime to be punished, but between those last two statements lies a world of understanding, and knowledge that must be attained. And punishment enters in between those two statements as the individual takes the consequence for the action and the intent. By the time he realizes the truth of the second statement, neither crime nor punishment affect him.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，疾病并非邪恶。谋杀者并未杀死任何人，但如果他的意图是杀人，那么他必须面对其意图的后果。死后并无罪行受到惩罚。没有罪行需要被惩罚，但在这两句话之间，存在一个必须被理解的世界与知识。当个体为行动与意图承担后果时，惩罚便介于这两句话之间。当他领悟第二句话的真理时，罪行与惩罚便不再影响他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now, in so far as everything is basically action, the personality is affected by outside agencies, but in a most basic manner it chooses those actions which it will accept or reject.
quotes.translation: 既然一切事物本质上都是行动，人格确实会受到外界因素的影响，但最根本的是，它选择接受或拒绝哪些行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: For an exercise, keep notes for a day or so of all the times you find yourself thinking of probable actions,2 large or small. In your mind, try to follow "what might have happened" had you taken the course you did not take. Then imagine what might happen as a result of your chosen decisions. You are a member of the species. Any choice you make privately affects it biologically and psychically.
quotes.translation: 作为练习，请花一两天时间记录所有你发现自己正在思考可能行动的时刻，无论大小。在脑海中，试着追踪"如果当初选择了未曾走过的路，可能会发生什么"。然后想象你已做出的决定可能带来的结果。作为人类物种的一员，你私下做出的任何选择都会在生物学和心灵层面影响整个物种。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Earlier this evening I reminded Jane of the conversation about cells, versus their components, that we'd had because of Seth's material at 9:38 in Session 705. Some of tonight's book work refers to the questions growing out of our talk I think, as does Seth's brief clarification near the end of the session.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In such circumstances these perceptions may find their way to the ego, appearing as inspirations or intuitive thought. It is obvious that many such intuitions appear when the personality is in a dreaming state or in states of dissociation. The intuitions themselves, while seemingly mental, are action, and as such they produce changes in the physical organism, both chemical and electromagnetic.
quotes.translation: 在此类情况下，这些感知可能以灵感或直觉思维的形式抵达自我意识。显然，许多人处于梦境或解离状态时会出现这类直觉。这些直觉看似属于心智范畴，实则是行动本身，因此会在物质有机体中引发化学与电磁层面的改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Psychic action is being directed in a way not possible in the ordinary waking condition. Shared dreams present their own historic organization, for the shared memory of your race does not only include physical events, but reaches much further than this.
quotes.translation: 心灵行动正以平常清醒状态下不可能的方式被引导。共享梦境呈现其自身的历史组织，因为你们种族共享的记忆不仅包含物质事件，其范围远比这深远得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The word subjective, to you, implies immediately that which is not objective. However the events and actions of the probable system are indeed objective and concrete within their own field of reality. Your own physical system, you should remember, is only real and concrete within its own field. It is for this reason mainly that the physical system is so little perceived by you when you sleep.
quotes.translation: 对你们而言，"主观"一词立即暗示着非客观的事物。然而，可能系统的活动与行动在其自身的实相领域内确实是客观而具体的。你们应当记住，你们自己的物质系统仅在其自身领域内才是真实而具体的。这主要是你们在睡眠时如此难以感知物质系统的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You live in a physical community, but you live first of all in a community of thoughts and feelings. These trigger your physical actions. They directly affect the behavior of your body. The experience of the animals is different, yet in their own ways animals have both individual intent and purpose. Their feelings are certainly as pertinent as yours. They dream, and in their way they reason.
quotes.translation: 你们生活在物质社群中，但首先你们生活在思想与情感的社群中。这些触发你们的物质行动，直接影响你们身体的行为。动物的体验有所不同，但动物以其自身方式同样具有个体意图与目的。它们的情感无疑与你们的情感同样重要。它们做梦，并以它们的方式推理。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 802, APRIL 25, 1977
9:47 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: On your plane no action is really simultaneous and so time instantly enters in. You mentioned yourself Joseph--oh see, you can't hide anything from me--you mentioned earlier--I'm sorry, Ruburt needs a short break. A short one, Ruburt, should suffice.
quotes.translation: 在你们的层面上，没有任何行动是真正同时发生的，因此时间立即介入其中。你自己提到过约瑟——哦，你看，你什么都瞒不过我——你早些时候提到——抱歉，鲁柏需要短暂休息。鲁柏，短暂休息一下应该就够了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All actions in one way or another continue. It is only the outer senses which cannot perceive what does not fall into their own domain. When you perceive an action with your outer senses, you call it material if it is, or if it appears to be, static.
quotes.translation: 所有行动都以某种方式持续着。只有外在感官无法感知不属于其自身领域的事物。当你们用外在感官感知一个行动时，如果它是静止的，或看似静止的，你们就称之为物质性的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Their action is inhibiting at your end. The weather has also a connection here, and your moods are affected by both. The period should be over by three o'clock, approximately, tomorrow afternoon, when the conditions dissipate, or begin to dissipate.
quotes.translation: 他们的行动在你们这一端产生了抑制作用。天气与此也有关系，而你们的情绪受到两者的影响。大约到明天下午三点左右，当这些状况消散或开始消散时，这段时期就应该结束了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am not going to hold a very long session this evening. Rather than give you fairly frequent short vacations, I may at times close a session early. We still come out ahead in terms of time. We are heading here indeed, slowly but surely, toward a thorough discussion of the inner senses, which could not be given until you had a good background in the nature of action itself. For you should be able to see now that the inner senses allow a more faithful perception of basic reality than the outer senses could ever give.
quotes.translation: 今晚我不打算进行太长的课。与其频繁给你们短暂的休息，我有时可能会提前结束课程。从时间上来看，我们仍然有所进展。我们正缓慢而坚定地朝着对内感官的全面讨论迈进——这必须等到你们对行动本身的本质有了良好背景后才能进行。因为你们现在应该能明白，内感官比外感官更能忠实地感知基本实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is only because their realities are so distorted that the difficulty is discovered. I mentioned many sessions back that your physical universe, so taken for granted, is actually at least as diverse and multitudinous as the dream system. Within the physical universe you merely focus upon similarities and ignore the vast differences that exist. Each reality is completely unique for every individual, and through his own actions he attempts therefore to communicate the nature of this reality of his to his fellows.
quotes.translation: 正是因为它们的实相被严重扭曲，困难才得以显现。许多节课前我曾提到，你们视为理所当然的物质宇宙，实际上至少与梦境系统一样多样且繁复。在物质宇宙中，你们仅仅聚焦于相似之处，而忽略了其中存在的巨大差异。每个实相对每个个体而言都是完全独特的，而个体通过自身的行动试图向同伴传达自己实相的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You can "come awake" from your normal waking state, and that is the natural next step for consciousness to follow -- one for which your biology has already equipped you. Indeed, each person does attain that recognition now and then. It brings triumphs and challenges as well. In those areas of life where you are satisfied, give yourselves credit, and in those areas where you are not, remind yourselves that you are involved in a learning process; you are daring enough to accept the responsibility for your actions.
quotes.translation: 你们可以从正常的清醒状态"醒来"，这正是意识自然的下一个步骤——你们的生物构造早已为此做好准备。事实上，每个人都会不时达到这种认知。它既带来胜利也带来挑战。在你们感到满意的生活领域，请给予自己肯定；而在那些不尽如人意的领域，提醒自己你们正参与一个学习过程；你们有足够的勇气为自己的行动承担责任。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: As mentioned before (in Session 828), early man had such an identification of subjective and objective realities. As a species, however, you have developed what can almost be called a secondary nature -- a world of technology in which you also now have your existence, and complicated social structures have emerged from it. To develop that kind of structure necessitated a division between subjective and objective worlds. Now, however, it is highly important that you realize your position, and accomplish the manipulation of consciousness that will allow you to take true conscious responsibility for your actions and your experience.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The physical alteration was a strain on the entire system. The creative function and basis that has been distorted into the idea of aggression -- the urge to act -- was not understood. In a manner of speaking, breathing itself is a violence. The built-in inhibition resulted in a tied-up system of mutual controls in which the necessary thrusting-out of action became literally impossible.
quotes.translation: 身体上的改变对整个系统造成了压力。被扭曲为攻击性概念的创造功能与基础——即行动的冲动——未被理解。从某种角度来说，呼吸本身就是一种暴力。内在的抑制导致了一个相互控制的束缚系统，使得必要的行动外推几乎变得不可能。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Caution is always intelligent action in such matters. Ruburt has been in enough of a trance as it is. However, even the action of speaking for me this session is beneficial, as far as he is concerned. That is why I held the session to begin with.
quotes.translation: 谨慎在此类事务中总是明智的行动。鲁柏已经处于足够的出神状态。然而，就他而言，即使是为我进行这节课程的行动也是有益的。这就是我一开始就举行这节课程的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are gradations and fluctuations within its activity. It is far more flexible than you give it credit for. (Pause.) The ego can use the conscious mind almost entirely as a way of perceiving external or internal realities that coincide with its own beliefs. It is not that certain answers do not lie openly accessible, therefore, but that often you have set yourself on a course of action in which you believe, and you do not want to open yourself to any material that may contradict your current beliefs.
quotes.translation: 在其活动中有等级和波动。它比你认为的要灵活得多。（停顿。）自我几乎可以完全将意识心用作一种方式来感知与其自身信念相符的外在或内在实相。因此，并非某些答案无法公开获取，而是你常常已经设定了一条你深信不疑的行动路线，并且不愿向任何可能与你当前信念相矛盾的材料敞开自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Such a practice leads to feelings of helplessness and hopelessness, in which effective action seems impossible. Life possesses an exuberance. If this is cherished, nurtured, encouraged, then additional energy is generated that is not needed for the purposes of daily private life -- a superabundance, that can be effectively directed in those areas of the world where help is most needed.
quotes.translation: 这种练习会导致无助与绝望的感受，使有效行动看似不可能。生命本身充满蓬勃生机。若珍惜、滋养并鼓励这份生机，便会生发出超越日常私生活所需的额外能量——一种丰沛盈余，可有效导向世上最需要帮助的领域。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) The dream state, however, does operate as a rich web of communication between probable selves and probable existences. All probabilities spring from inner reality, from the psyche's own inner activity and structure. (Long pause.) The consciousness that you know can indeed now emerge into even greater realization of itself, but not by obsessively defending its old position. Instead it must recognize its power as the director of probable action, and no longer inhibit its own greater capacities.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）然而，梦境状态确实充当着可能自我与可能存在之间丰富的沟通网络。所有可能性皆源于内在实相，源于心灵自身的内在活动与结构。（长停顿。）你所知的意识确实能进一步实现更伟大的自我认知，但并非通过执拗地固守旧有立场。相反，它必须认识到自身作为可能行动导演的力量，不再抑制其更伟大的能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 687
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Playfully done, these exercises will set into action other creative events. These will involve the utilization of some of the inner senses, for which you have no objective sense-correlations. You will understand situations better in daily life, because you will have activated inner abilities that allow you to subjectively perceive the reality of other people in a way that children do.
quotes.translation: 以游戏心态进行这些练习，将启动其他创造性事件。这些事件会涉及某些内在感官的运用——这些感官没有客观的感官对应物。你将更透彻地理解日常生活中的情境，因为你已激活内在能力，得以像孩童般主观感知他人的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are some things that I do not believe you clearly understand. To me, a thought is an action. It is as valid a reality. There is no basic difference between telepathy and clairvoyance, as you term them. The Emotional feelings connected with an item are as real to me as the item itself. It is these Emotional charges that are interpreted, and finally translated into physical terms.
quotes.translation: 有些事我相信你并不清楚。对我而言，思想即是行动，它同样具有真实的实相。你们所称的心灵感应与天眼通，本质上并无差异。与某事物相关的情感感受，对我而言与该事物本身同样真实。正是这些情感电荷被解读，最终转化为物质形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Again, this is simply a rushing in of energy where it was most needed, once the barriers have been removed. This is a natural reaction. (Long pause.) Whenever the ego gains over control, or sets itself up to oppose deep and basic action within the whole personality, then in doing so it also blocks to some considerable extent the passage or use of the whole personality's vital energy.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，一旦障碍被移除，这不过是能量涌入最需要之处。这是自然反应。（长停顿）每当自我获得过度控制，或执意对抗整个人格中深层而根本的行动时，它便在相当程度上阻碍了整个人格生命能量的流通与运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: (11:00.) Some of the events that I see connected very clearly with these persons in the future may not, in your physical system, occur. They exist as probabilities, as potentials, actualized in thoughts but not turned into definite physical form. I told you that no events were predetermined. I would have to tune into a future date, in your terms, and probe it with all of its ramifications in order to ascertain which of the probable actions I saw in your earlier would be actualized in your later.
quotes.translation: （11:00）我清楚看见与这些人未来相关的某些事件，在你们的物质系统中可能不会发生。它们作为可能性与潜能而存在，在思想中得以实现，却未转化为明确的物质形态。我告诉过你们，没有任何事件是预定的。我必须调频至你们时间概念中的未来日期，探查其所有分支脉络，才能确定早先所见哪些可能行动会在你们后来的时间中实现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The investigation will allow you to probe into the realities of conscious wakefulness, extending your sensual perceptions so that you can probe further outward into physical reality. This is indeed an ambitious project. We shall proceed as we always do, slowly but steadily; and you shall change along the way, for the very actions involved will change you. I might add for the better.
quotes.translation: 这项探索将让你深入检视清醒意识中的实相，扩展你的感官知觉，使你得以进一步向外探触物质实相。这确实是个雄心勃勃的计划。我们将一如既往地稳步推进；而你们在过程中也将随之改变，因为所涉及的行动本身就会改变你们。容我补充一句，这是往更好的方向改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You know you can have more than one dream at a time. You can also experience versions of dreams of probable selves, but there will always be some point of contact--that is, there will always be a reason why you pick up such a dream. All of the dreams people have form a mass dream framework. Dreams exist at other levels, and physically of course they affect the body state. In such ways, the world's actions are worked out in mass dream communications that are at the same time public and private.
quotes.translation: 你知道自己可以同时拥有多个梦境。你也能体验可能自体的梦境版本，但总会存在某个接触点——也就是说，你之所以会接收到这样的梦境，必然有其原因。人类所有的梦境共同构成一个庞大的梦境架构。梦境存在于其他层面，当然也会在物质层面影响身体状态。通过这种既公开又私密的大众梦境交流，世界的行动得以在集体层面展开。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All of your physical, mental and spiritual abilities are focused together, then, in the brilliant concentration of "present" experience. You are not at the mercy of the past, or of previous convictions, unless you believe that you are. If you fully comprehend your power in the present, you will realize that action at that point also alters the past, its beliefs and your reactions.
quotes.translation: 因此，你所有身体、心智与灵性的能力都聚焦于"当下"经验的璀璨凝聚中。你并非受制于过去或先前的信念，除非你相信自己受其支配。若你充分理解自己在当下的力量，便会明白此刻的行动同样能改变过去、过去的信念以及你当时的反应。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You cannot say that such animals came out ahead of the bargain, but you can say that the species of man and certain species of animals together formed an arrangement ... that did have benefits for both. Man is more a part of nature than he realizes, and in the greater realm of activity he cannot take any ... actions with which the rest of nature does not agree for its own reasons.
quotes.translation: 你不能说这类动物在交易中占了上风，但可以说人类物种与某些动物物种共同形成了一种安排……这对双方都有益处。人类比自己所意识到的更是自然的一部分，在更广阔的活动领域中，他无法采取任何……自然因其自身理由所不同意的行动。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: And from Session 613 for September 11, 1972: "Interactions with others do occur, of course, yet there are none that you do not accept or draw to you by your thoughts, attitudes, or emotions. This applies in each area of life. In your terms, it applies both before life and after it. In the most miraculous fashion you are given the gift of creating your experience."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: There are such manipulations within various systems that change other systems. Your own behavior and action within the dream universe definitely affects the physical universe. From one field of activity then you have changed another, and without ever knowing, in many cases, that you have done so. In the same manner do the activities of the physical universe alter the dream system.
quotes.translation: 不同系统内部存在着改变其他系统的操控。你在梦境宇宙中的行为和行动确实会影响物质宇宙。于是你从一个活动领域改变了另一个领域，而在许多情况下，你完全不知道自己已经这样做了。同样地，物质宇宙的活动也会改变梦境系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These dream personalities or fragments indeed have their own consciousness. They are as unaware, and as aware, of you as you are of them. They exist once you have created them. No action can be ？？2withdrawn. It must complete its nature according to the dimensions in which it exists, and so the dream personalities or fragments continue to exist whether or not you are aware of them.
quotes.translation: 这些梦境人格或片段确实拥有自己的意识。它们对你的无知与知晓程度，正如你对它们的无知与知晓程度一样。一旦你创造了它们，它们便存在了。没有任何行动可以被撤回。它必须根据其存在的维度完成其本性，因此无论你是否意识到它们，这些梦境人格或片段都会继续存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A consciousness is characterized by the particular ways in which it views or perceives available action. It is characterized by the type of action which it is more likely to perceive. It is characterized by the pattern of perception itself.
quotes.translation: 意识以其观照或感知可用行动的特定方式为特征。它以其更可能感知的行动类型为特征。它以其感知模式本身为特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now give us time. (Pause at 10:11.) There were also men called "Little Popes," those in training of an ambitious nature, and catered to. If they were seriously in the running, you see, the rewards would be great to their followers. These men, incidentally, were no worse, particularly, in their actions than the rest of the populace. Their positions simply gave them greater leeway.
quotes.translation: 现在请给我们时间。（10点11分停顿。）也曾有被称为"小教皇"的人，那些野心勃勃接受训练且备受奉承者。你瞧，若他们认真参与角逐，其追随者将获得丰厚回报。这些人的行为，特别而言，并不比普通民众更恶劣。只是他们的地位给予了更大自由度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A small note here: my candle effect was quite legitimate the other evening. This sort of thing will almost always occur without Ruburt's conscious knowledge for a long time to come. The reason is simply that conscious knowledge of such an effect would inhibit him, regardless of his best intentions, and the energy used would block the action or effect that I was trying to deliver.
quotes.translation: 此处附注：前晚我的蜡烛效应完全合理。这类现象在很长一段时间内几乎都会在鲁柏无意识状态下发生。原因很简单：对此类效应的有意识认知会抑制他——无论其初衷多么良好——而所耗用的能量将阻碍我试图传递的行动或效应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Consciousness or action forms all realities. What is not simply represents a possibility which consciousness may bring to life. (Long pause.) Consciousness then formed out of itself a new dimension which was the physical one. The formation, the explosion, of energy, shattered consciousness into an infinity of parts, each with all the abilities in here within consciousness itself.
quotes.translation: 意识或行动形成了所有实相。未显化者仅代表一种可能性，意识可将其赋予生命。（长停顿）意识随后从自身形成了物理维度这一新维度。能量的形成与爆发将意识粉碎成无数部分，每个部分都具备意识本身内在的全部能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This physical room and this particular moment within this room all exist simultaneously in other systems, though they may or may not appear in the same form. The energy generated in sparking a given action event.is never lost. Some is retained by the initial materialization, and by the succeeding ones. The term succeeding is used as a matter of simplicity. You know what is meant.
quotes.translation: 这个物理房间及其中此刻的特定瞬间，在其他系统中同时存在，尽管它们可能以不同形式显现。触发特定行动事件所激发的能量永不消逝。部分能量被初始物化及其后续物化所保留。使用"后续"一词仅为简便起见，你明白其含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These probabilities are realities, regardless of which decision you make. Say, for example, that you have three choices and it is imperative that you select one. Using this state, you take the first choice. The alternative present is the moment in which you make that choice. Having made it the present is changed, and quite clearly you perceive exactly the way it is changed and what actions and events will flow from the change into the future that belongs to that particular alternate present.
quotes.translation: 无论你做出何种决定，这些或然性都是实相。举例而言，假设你有三个选择且必须择一。在此状态下你选择了第一个选项。替代性当下即是你做出该选择的时刻。做出选择后当下已然改变，你清晰感知其改变方式，以及从该改变流向属于那个特定替代性当下的未来之行动与事件。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Wisdom and foolishness would be seen as aspects, one of the other. Religion and science would each be unhampered by dogma in such an individual. In the same way, following your own "trace" experiences and characteristics, you can discover those "probable" abilities that are yours, and uncover to some degree the nature of probable actions open to you for physical materialization.
quotes.translation: 智慧与愚昧将被视为彼此的一体两面。在这样的个体中，宗教与科学都不会受到教条的束缚。同样地，跟随你自己的"痕迹"经验与特性，你就能发现那些属于你的"可能性"能力，并在某种程度上揭示那些可供你进行物质具体化的可能行动的本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: For most people this censoring process is valuable, since it prevents the personality from being snowed under by data it is not equipped to handle. The ability to retain experience gained within other fields is the trend of further development. You are at least however to some extent familiar with this field of dream action, and every man intuitively knows his involvement here.
quotes.translation: 对大多数人而言，这种筛选过程是有价值的，因为它防止人格被其尚未准备好处理的数据所淹没。保留在其他领域获得的经验的能力，是进一步发展的趋势。然而，你至少在一定程度上熟悉这个梦行动领域，并且每个人直觉上都知道自己在此处的参与。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Definite electromagnetic actions will therefore occur between the two dreamers, and there may be a spilling over of data, or dream information, before the circuit is closed. You must realize that I am not speaking symbolically. I am speaking in very practical terms. The electromagnetic systems do indeed exist, and when they are open telepathic communications can travel through.
quotes.translation: 因此，两个做梦者之间会发生明确的电磁行动，在回路关闭之前，可能会有数据或梦信息的溢出。你必须明白，我并非在象征性地说话。我是在非常实际的层面上说话。电磁系统确实存在，当它们开启时，心灵感应的通讯便能穿越其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The dream state provides you with a trial framework in which you explore probable actions and decide upon the ones you want to physically materialize. Not only nightmares, as mentioned earlier (in the last session), but many other dreams follow rhythms of a therapeutic nature far more effectively than any that are drug-induced. Sleeping pills can interfere with this activity.
quotes.translation: 梦境状态为你提供了一个试验框架，在其中你探索可能的行为，并决定哪些是你想要在物质世界中具体化的。不仅噩梦（如前一次课程所述），许多其他梦境也遵循着远比任何药物诱导更有效的疗愈性节奏。安眠药会干扰这种活动。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The distortions are then creative. The nature of action itself is such that tension is one of its positive characteristics, and the tension is the element that causes action to seek expansion in terms of an attempt to duplicate itself.
quotes.translation: 这些扭曲因此具有创造性。行动本身的本质使得张力成为其积极特征之一，而张力正是促使行动通过试图复制自身来寻求扩张的元素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The resulting thoughts and images in turn are expressed and affect others, and not only symbolically. As you should know, mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self. For the inner self is, after all, composed of mental actions, and the entity itself is ever-changing.
quotes.translation: 由此产生的思想和意象反过来被表达并影响他人，且不仅限于象征层面。如你所知，心智行为具有电磁实相，直接塑造内在自我，直接形成内在自我不断变化的本质。毕竟内在自我由心智行动构成，而存有本身也在永恒变化中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I will then give you my best regards, and my very best wishes to you all. I will also add that this session is then itself action, and since it is action, it changes both those who attend it, Ruburt who delivers it, and I who give it.
quotes.translation: 我将向你们致以最诚挚的问候，并献上对各位最美好的祝福。我还要补充说明，本堂课本身就是行动，既然是行动，它既改变了参与其中的你们、传递它的鲁柏，也改变了给予它的我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is true that it is difficult for you to take me at my word when I suggest action in the practical world, particularly when such suggested action may seem neither practical nor possible. I know this. I should be more understanding.
quotes.translation: 确实，当我建议在现实世界中采取行动时，你们很难相信我的话语，尤其是当这些建议看似既不实际又不可能实现时。我明白这一点，我应当更体谅你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I realize that this is somewhat difficult, but when you reread the last two sessions you will understand this material completely. Ruburt is now the result of the Seth that I once was, for I have changed since then. Ruburt represents, and is, a personality formed by that Seth which was myself, by focusing upon and using a peculiar set of attributes and abilities. To make it simpler, perhaps, we split, this being necessary always so that various possibilities can be brought into action.
quotes.translation: 我意识到这有些困难，但当你们重读最近两堂课的内容时，就会完全理解这些材料。鲁柏现在正是我过去所是的赛斯的结果，因为自那时起我已发生改变。鲁柏代表并成为由那个曾是"我"的赛斯所形成的人格，通过聚焦并运用一组特定的特质与能力。或许更简单地说，我们分裂了，这种分裂始终是必要的，以便各种可能性能够被带入行动之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This first dilemma results in action, and from actions own working upon itself we have seen that identity was formed, and that these two are inseparable. We will discuss the second dilemma after your break. I suggest your break now.
quotes.translation: 这第一个困境导致了行动，而从行动作用于自身的过程中，我们已看到身份的形成，且这两者密不可分。休息后我们将讨论第二个困境。我建议你现在休息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such developments would mean the releasing and availability of added energy into your field, that would have endless possibilities in all directions. Ideas and concepts are nonphysical actualities that attract unaligned energy, direct and concentrate it. The dream world exists more closely in that spacious present of which the inner self is so aware. It is not as involved with camouflage constructions as your own universe, and its actions are somewhat limited within its own framework.
quotes.translation: 此类发展意味着额外能量被释放并进入你的场域，这将产生向各个方向延伸的无限可能性。思想与概念是非物质性的实相，它们吸引未定向的能量，引导并凝聚之。梦境世界更贴近内在自我所深刻觉察的那个广袤当下，它不像你的宇宙那样深陷于伪装建构中，其行动在其自身框架内也受到一定限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As we progress and pick up the study of our dream universe once more, we will be involved also with the study of mental events as they occur within both systems. And because I am presently uninvolved within your system, it is possible for me to give instances as they occur of such mental actions, as they are perceived in both the universe of matter and the dream universe.
quotes.translation: 随着我们继续推进并重新开始研究我们的梦境宇宙，我们也将涉及对两个系统中同时发生的心智事件的研究。由于我目前未涉入你们的系统，我有可能在物质宇宙与梦境宇宙中同时被感知到的心智行动发生时，提供这些实例。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such a remark may appear so simple that it is not worth saying, but it is extremely important that it be understood. In like manner, there is indeed no particular boundary or line of demarcation between the dream universe and the physical universe. Any seeming barrier is artificial, for all these realities merge one into the other, and an action in one affects the other.
quotes.translation: 这种说法看似简单得不值一提，但理解它却极为重要。同样地，梦境宇宙与物质宇宙之间确实没有特定的界限或分界线。任何看似存在的障碍都是人为的，因为所有这些实相都相互融合，一个实相中的行动会影响另一个实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The whole self not only perceives these limitless moment points, but being a part of action, each whole self projects fragments and personalities from itself to all these points, creating therefore other egos, other intense focus points which are independent, which work out their own destinies and experiences, which in turn perceive any given moment point in slow motion.
quotes.translation: 整体自己不仅感知这些无限的时刻点，而且作为行动的一部分，每个整体自己都会从自身投射出片段和人格到所有这些点上，从而创造出其他独立自主的自我、其他强烈的焦点点，它们各自发展自己的命运和经历，进而以慢动作感知任何给定的时刻点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I have spoken often of consciousness also as being merely the direction of focus. Action implies infinite possibilities of focus. Action never happens along a straight line, although at times you may perceive it in such a fashion.
quotes.translation: 我常谈到意识也仅仅是焦点的方向。行动意味着无限的焦点可能性。行动从不沿着直线发生，尽管有时你可能会以这种方式感知它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For all my humor concerning the particular communication to Philip, I wanted him to be conscious of hearing me. Actually this caused an interruption of action, in order to make the source of the communication stand out in his mind. Otherwise he would have merely automatically recorded my warning, and reacted to it smoothly without any realization on the part of the ego.
quotes.translation: 尽管我对与菲利普的那次特定沟通带有幽默色彩，但我希望他能有意识地听到我的声音。实际上这造成了行动的中断，目的是让沟通的来源在他心中凸显出来。否则他只会自动记录我的警告，并顺畅地做出反应，而自我毫无察觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The thought may be rejected, but there will be something to reject. The thought may be relatively meaningless to any given probable self and it may be very fleeting. The probable selves in one way or another will react, forming other action events. Constant creativity applies to every system, then, and what you create in one system has its effects in other systems also.
quotes.translation: 思想可能被拒绝，但总会有东西可供拒绝。思想对任何特定的可能自己而言可能相对无意义，也可能转瞬即逝。这些可能自己会以某种方式做出反应，形成其他行动事件。持续的创造力适用于每一个系统，因此你在一个系统中所创造的东西，也会在其他系统中产生影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Action basically can never complete itself. Inner vitality, materializing in any form whatsoever, at once multiplies the possibilities of further materialization. At the same time, because inner vitality is self-generating, only a minute fraction of inner vitality is needed to seed a whole universe.
quotes.translation: 行动本质上永远无法完成自身。内在活力以任何形式具体化时，会立刻倍增进一步具体化的可能性。同时，由于内在活力是自我生成的，只需极小一部分内在活力就能播下整个宇宙的种子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have been speaking of your present system only, yet there is always progression to other systems. The growth of each(underlined) seed requires a separate act of creation. There is no mass creative act, for all portions of consciousness have their part to play in creativity. This is the meaning of action, of consciousness, and of individuality: the freedom to create.
quotes.translation: 我一直只谈论你们当前的系统，然而始终存在着向其他系统的演进。每颗种子的成长都需要一个独立的创造行为。没有所谓的集体创造行为，因为所有意识部分都在创造力中扮演着自己的角色。这就是行动、意识与个体性的意义：创造的自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: For a psychic communication to take place the communication must fall within the particular range of electromagnetic reality that can be picked up by the receiver, and by that particular level of the receiver's self that is able to translate it into meaningful terms. If, that is, you want any kind of proof. Otherwise the communication is simply received and acted upon automatically without leaving a trace. It merely becomes part of a new action, giving no evidence of its source.
quotes.translation: 若要发生心灵沟通，该沟通必须落在接收者能捕捉到的特定电磁实相范围内，并且必须符合接收者自我中能够将其转化为有意义术语的特定层次。也就是说，如果你想要任何形式的证据。否则，这种沟通只会被自动接收并付诸行动，不留痕迹。它仅仅成为新行动的一部分，不显露其来源的任何证据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Again, by looking where nothing seems to be, you will find much. And by exploring that which you cannot touch, you will discover that which is even closer to you than touch, for the outer sense of touch is one of the most close counterparts of direct experience that you have. And it contains dimensions and gradations and varieties that cannot be recorded by scientific instruments, and this comes near in its own way to the infinite varieties present within one electrical action.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，通过观察看似空无之处，你将发现丰饶。通过探索你无法触及之物，你将发现比触觉更贴近你的存在——因为外在的触觉是你所拥有的最接近直接体验的对应物之一。它包含着科学仪器无法记录的维度、层次与变化，以其独特方式接近单一电性活动中蕴含的无限多样性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I want to stress some points mentioned in our last session, to the effect in particular that you perceive only a small portion of any given action even when that action has some of its origins within your own physical field.
quotes.translation: 我想强调上一节课提到的几点，特别是：即使某个行动部分起源于你们自己的物质场域，你们也只能感知到该行动的极小一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We find in the present personality knots, whereby action is not allowed freedom, particularly in terms of expansion. There is strong concentrated energy turned inward, but it is not turned inward far enough to be effective.
quotes.translation: 我们在当前人格中发现许多症结，使得行动无法获得自由，尤其是在扩展方面。存在强烈集中的能量向内转向，但转向得还不够深入，因此未能产生效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you were as knowledgeable and crafty when you were awake, then you would put all religions and sciences out of business, for you would understand the greater reality of your psyche. You would know "where the action is."
quotes.translation: 如果你们在清醒时能像梦中那样博学而机巧，那么你们将使所有宗教和科学都失去用武之地，因为你们会理解自己心灵的更大实相。你们会知道"行动在哪里"。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Session 757 was devoted to other matters that Jane and I were interested in.)

quotes.text: To some important degree, cells possess curiosity, an impetus toward action, a sense of their own balance, and a sense of being individual while being, for example, a part of a tissue or an organ. The cell's identification biologically is highly connected with this [very] precise knowledge of its own shape, or sometimes shapes. Cells, then, know their own forms.
quotes.translation: 在相当重要的程度上，细胞具有好奇心、朝向行动的驱力、对自身平衡的感知，以及作为个体同时又是组织或器官一部分的觉知。细胞在生物学上的认同与其对自身形状（有时是多种形状）的这种精确认知高度相关。因此，细胞知晓自己的形态。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: What do I mean by such attention? Attention to the moment as it is presented. Attention to the table of rich reality as it appears before you. Attention to the kind of person you are, and to the loving appreciation of your own uniqueness. To attend to your life in such a fashion brings you into a clearer communication with the inner action of your own existence.
quotes.translation: 我所谓的这种关注是什么意思？关注当下此刻如其所是地呈现。关注丰盛实相之桌在你面前展开的模样。关注你自身是何种人，以及对你独特性的珍爱欣赏。以这样的方式关注你的生命，将使你与你自身存在的内在行动达成更清晰的沟通。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane had noted on the 15th that she wanted to finish Seth's book soon. She made no more entries in her journal over the next ten days. She did more painting. Rather than intensify, her voice tremors lessened on some occasions and disappeared on others. The slowdown in her speech was more persistent, although it didn't become more pronounced in any manner. Following our own suggestions, we did fairly well at not dwelling upon those vocal challenges; we sent out no signals to Seth, asking him to discuss them. And Jane did have the energy to firmly begin dictating Session 939 for Chapter 12 of Dreams at 9:48 P.M. on Monday evening, January 25:)

quotes.text: In those terms (underlined), it is quite as truthful to say -- as I have said before -- that man's intellect is also instinctive. He begins thinking at once. He cannot help but use his intellect. The intellect, again, operates magically, spontaneously, automatically. Its most keen reasoning processes rise as a result of that natural magical action (deliberately.
quotes.translation: 用那些术语（强调）来说，正如我之前所言——说人类的智力也是本能性的，同样真实不虚。人立即开始思考。他无法不使用自己的智力。智力同样以神奇、自发、自动的方式运作。它最敏锐的推理过程正是源于那种自然的魔法性行动（刻意强调）。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: Dreams do express a personality's basic reality. Negative dreams tend to reinforce the negative aspects of the personality, helping to form vicious circles of unfortunate complications. Upon suggestion dream actions can be turned toward fulfilling constructive expectations, which can themselves effect a definite change for the better in the personality involved.
quotes.translation: 梦境确实表达了一个人格的基本实相。负面梦境往往会强化人格的负面面向，助长不幸纠葛的恶性循环。通过暗示，梦中的行动可以被导向实现建设性的期望，而这些期望本身就能对相关人格产生明确的改善效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Very well. Your idea of time is false. Time as you experience it is an illusion caused by your own physical senses. Your physical senses force you to perceive action in certain terms, but this is not the nature of action.
quotes.translation: 很好。你们的时间观念是错误的。你们所体验的时间，是由你们自己的肉体感官造成的幻相。你们的肉体感官迫使你们以特定方式感知行动，但这并非行动的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (And once again, as she'd done for the session of last December 28, she wanted tonight's material to be presented as part of regular Session 393. I was glad to do it--and note that Jane's class sessions usually are in marked contrast to those we hold for ourselves, for books or whatever in the future. As would be expected of a gathering, class sessions were full of energy and repartee and questions and serious thinking both with and without Seth.

quotes.text: In such a case, begin imaginatively, following through with the other decision or decisions that you might have made. At one point a shadowy effect -- grayness, or other characteristics just mentioned -- will occur. One or several of these may be involved, but again your subjective feeling is the most important clue. Imagination may bring you a clear picture, for example, that may then become fuzzy, and in that case the blurred quality would be your hint of probable action.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，请运用想象力，跟随你本可能做出的其他决定。在某个节点，会出现一种模糊效应——灰暗感，或刚才提到的其他特征。可能涉及其中一种或多种特征，但你的主观感受仍是最重要的线索。例如，想象力可能会为你带来清晰的画面，随后变得模糊，在这种情况下，模糊的特质就是你感知可能行动的线索。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 687
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The exterior dimensions are replicas of interior personal ones. The accomplishments, wars, difficulties and institutions are all "after the event" -- that is, they are outward actions of an inward existence. Under certain conditions water turns into ice. In the same way, interior events can appear in physical reality in a quite different form than the original.
quotes.translation: 外在维度是内在个人维度的复制品。成就、战争、困境与制度皆是"事后产物"——它们是内在存在的外显行动。如同特定条件下水会结冰，内在事件能以与原始形态截然不同的形式显现在物质实相中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: We have here an excellent focus of energy, an excellent use of action, that of itself propels itself onward; I might say, somewhat sarcastically: Oh, ye of little faith. Nevertheless, that which is obvious to me is not obvious, often, to you, and it is not too difficult for me to see why at times you appear to be lacking in faith when such predictions are made.
quotes.translation: 我们在此拥有绝佳的能量聚焦点，绝佳的行动运用，它自身便能推动自身前进；我或许会略带讽刺地说：嗐，你们这些信心薄弱的人。然而，对我而言显而易见之事，对你们却往往并非如此，而我也不难理解为何当此类预言被提出时，你们有时会显得缺乏信心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When massive doses of LSD are used, you are artificially creating a disaster area from which you hope to salvage an efficient working self. It is true that the old interactions between an associative pattern of thought and its habitual action may be broken down, but it is also true that the inner-ordered structure has been shocked psychically and biologically.
quotes.translation: 当使用大剂量LSD时，你们正在人为制造一个灾难区域，并期望从中拯救出高效运作的自我。诚然，联想性思维模式与其习惯性行动之间的旧有互动可能被打破，但同样真实的是，内在有序结构已在心灵与生理层面遭受冲击。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Distortion, in this respect, has a different meaning than the sort of distortion arising from a misreading of information. Yet in some respects it is similar. An original action can never repeat itself in an identical fashion. Its attempts to do so, never successful, result in a kind of distortion, and this distortion then becomes the basis for a new reality.
quotes.translation: 在此意义上，扭曲与信息误读所产生的扭曲含义不同，但在某些方面又相似。原始行动永远无法以完全相同的方式重复自身。它试图重复却从未成功，由此产生某种扭曲，而这种扭曲便成为新现实的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You make your own reality, Man's "evil" exists because of his misunderstanding of his own ideals, because of the gap that seems to exist between the ideal and its actualization. Evil actions, in other words, are the result of ignorance and misunderstanding. Evil is not a force in itself.
quotes.translation: 你创造自己的实相。人类的"恶"源于对自身理想的误解，源于理想与其实现之间看似存在的鸿沟。换言之，邪恶行为是无知与误解的结果。邪恶本身并非一种力量。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These three dilemmas represent three areas of reality within which inner reality, or inner vitality, can experience itself. And here we have also the reason, or one of the reasons why, inner vitality can never achieve complete materialization. The very action involved in vitality's attempt to materialize itself adds to the inner dimension of inner vitality.
quotes.translation: 这三重困境代表了内在实相或内在活力得以体验自身的三个现实领域。此处我们也找到了内在活力永远无法完全物质化的原因之一。活力试图物质化自身时所涉及的行动本身，反而增加了内在活力的内在维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You must also realize that the entity who became her son also chose the circumstances, knowing of them in advance, for his own purposes. There are many character aspects to be considered here. For if each personality is an energy gestalt, then also each family group is also an energy gestalt. The actions and interactions form its characteristics and nature.
quotes.translation: 你也必须明白，那个成为她儿子的存有同样预先知晓这些境况，并出于自身目的选择了它们。这里有许多性格面向需要考虑。因为如果每个人格都是一个能量完形，那么每个家庭群体同样也是一个能量完形。其行动与互动构成了它的特性与本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: But the personality is always in a state of becoming, and forever changes. The personality is an excellent example of action in one aspect. It is important here also to realize that while the personality is always in motion, the motion involved here is not one of mobility in space as you know it. It is most definitely motion in terms of value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 但人格始终处于"成为"的状态，并且永远在变化。人格是行动在某方面的绝佳范例。此处同样重要的是要认识到，虽然人格始终处于运动之中，但这里所涉及的运动并非你们所认知的空间移动。它绝对是价值完成层面的运动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Action, having of itself, and because of its nature, formed identity, now also because of its nature would seem to destroy identity, since action must involve change. And any change would seem to threaten identity.
quotes.translation: 行动，因其自身本质而形成了身份认同，如今同样因其本质，似乎又要摧毁身份认同——因为行动必然包含改变。而任何改变似乎都会威胁到身份认同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Love can be expressed quite legitimately through the arts. This does not mean that such a person is repressing sexuality in any given case, and stealing its energy for creative production -- though, of course, this may be the case. Many natural artists in any field normally express love through such creative endeavors, rather than through sexual actions.
quotes.translation: 爱可以通过艺术形式得到完全正当的表达。这并不意味着此人在任何情况下都在压抑性欲，并窃取其能量用于创作——尽管确实可能存在这种情况。任何领域的天生艺术家通常通过这类创造性努力而非性行为来表达爱。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Joy is the muscle of action, and without it there would be no action. If I speak strongly to you at times, it is because this tendency, while much less now than formerly, must be kept very well in control, Joseph.
quotes.translation: 喜悦是行动的力量，没有它就不会有行动。约瑟，若我有时对你说话严厉，是因为这种倾向虽已远不如从前，但仍需严加控制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying, again, that these communications follow in the lines of emotional attraction. For one thing, there are also individual differences which operate, so that any given personality will be more open to particular influences, and will tend to ignore others. For while there are no boundaries as such about the self, for practical purposes the self is a core of characteristic actions and reactions with which all environment is manipulated and handled.
quotes.translation: 无需赘言，这些沟通遵循情感吸引的轨迹。一方面，个体差异也在运作，使得特定人格会对某些影响更为开放，而倾向于忽略其他影响。因为虽然自我本身并无明确界限，但从实际运作来看，自我是一组特征性行动与反应的核心，所有环境都通过这个核心被操纵和处理。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Like the mountain, therefore, you have a history in terms of the present that is yours, and yet not yours. It does not control you, for you alter it with each thought and action, even as each motion at the mountain's top affects its base. The layers at the bottom, however, are also constantly changing, so that the whole area is a gestalt of relatedness.
quotes.translation: 因此，如同山岳，你拥有一个属于当下却又非你独有的历史。它并不控制你，因为你以每个念头与行动改变它，正如山顶的每一次运动都会影响其基底。然而底部的岩层也在不断变化，使得整个区域成为关联性的完形。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In this case action forces change, and by the very nature of action no such duplications can occur. It may be said, for practical reasons, that A and B have identical thoughts. But the thoughts are not identical.
quotes.translation: 在此情况下，行动迫使改变发生，而基于行动的本质，不可能出现完全相同的复制。为实用起见，可以说A与B拥有相同的念头，但这些念头并不等同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They desire to be strong, then, while believing in a lack of personal strength. They have been conditioned, and furthermore have conditioned themselves, to believe that they must fight for any benefits. Aggression becomes a method of survival. Since they believe so strongly in the power of others, and in their own relative powerlessness, they feel forced into aggressive actions almost as preventative measures against greater violence that will be done against them.
quotes.translation: 他们渴望强大，却同时相信自身缺乏力量。他们被制约，更自我制约，认定必须为任何利益而战。攻击性成为生存手段。由于他们强烈相信他人的力量，并深信自身相对无力，便被迫采取攻击性行动，几乎将其视为预防更严重暴力的措施——那些他们认定会施加于自身的暴力。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now, while it is basically true that the personality is composed of action, and that its very awareness and identity is a result of action--
quotes.translation: 基本上，人格确实由行动所组成，其觉知与身份认同也是行动的结果——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The reasoning mind is highly necessary, effective, and suitable for physical existence, and for the utilization of free will, which is very dependent upon perception of clearly distinguishable actions. In the larger framework of existence, however, it is simply one of innumerable methods of organizing data. A psychological filing system, if you prefer.
quotes.translation: 理性心智对物质存在及自由意志的运用极为必要、有效且适宜，而自由意志又高度依赖于对清晰可辨行动的感知。然而在更广大的存在架构中，它不过是组织资料的无数方法之一——若你愿意，可称之为心理归档系统。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I could indeed continue now along other lines. However I think it best that you retire for the evening. I did not neglect you, either, while you were ill, but the circumstances did not warrant a direct action on my part. I was here. I kept an inquiring, sometimes severe, sometimes amused, sometimes concerned, but always watchful eye upon the household.
quotes.translation: 我确实可以继续探讨其他主题。但我想你今晚最好就寝休息。你生病期间我也未曾疏忽，只是当时情况不适合我直接介入。我始终在此，以探究、时而严厉、时而莞尔、时而关切的目光，始终警醒地注视着这个家。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Thought cannot be seen or touched. Thought is action. A thought within your field must vanish, be terminated, disappear, before it can be replaced by another. The identical thought will not return. A very similar thought may return, but the two thoughts will not be identical, although you may perceive them as identical. This is an error of perception.
quotes.translation: 思想无法被看见或触摸。思想即是行动。你场域内的一个思想必须先消失、终结、消散，才能被另一个思想取代。完全相同的思想不会重现。极其相似的思想或许会重现，但这两个思想绝不会完全相同，尽管你可能认为它们相同——这是感知上的错误。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Herein also lies the freedom of each self: not being limited. We have spoken in the past of capsule comprehension. It is indeed a characteristic of action, indivisible from action, equally interwoven within it.
quotes.translation: 每个自我的自由也在于此：不受限制。我们过去曾谈到过胶囊式理解。这确实是行动的一个特性，与行动不可分割，同样交织其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In his normal condition Augustus thought of his own powerlessness -- for he had denied himself normal aggressive action -- and felt this weak. The beliefs activated the body's cellular memory, weakening the body and impeding its function. Yet for a time, while performance was dulled it was steady. A balance was maintained that suited his purposes.
quotes.translation: 在正常状态下，奥古斯都认为自己无能为力——因为他否定了自己正常的攻击性行动——并感到自己软弱无力。这些信念激活了身体的细胞记忆，削弱了身体并阻碍其功能。然而有一段时间，虽然表现变得迟钝，却保持稳定。一种符合他目的的平衡得以维持。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Once more -- (humorously:) that will save you from scratching out another "again," "however," or whatever -- your body is mobilized when you want to move. It responds to your intent and purpose. It is your private inner environment, psychically speaking. Your psychological intents instantly mobilize your energies on a psychic level. You have what I will call for now "a body of thought," and it is that "body" that constantly springs into action at your intent.
quotes.translation: 再说一次——（幽默地：）这能省得你再划掉一个“再次”、“然而”或别的什么——你的身体在你想要移动时便会被动员起来。它回应你的意图与目的。从心灵角度而言，它是你私密的内在环境。你的心理意图会立即在心灵层面动员你的能量。你拥有我暂且称之为“思想之体”的东西，正是这个“体”不断因你的意图而跃入行动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 833, JANUARY 31, 1979
9:21 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The dream's happening affects your entire physical condition, and so has this constant therapeutic effect. This result stems from the psychic situation set up within any dream drama (pause), and in it the problems or challenges of your existence are worked out. Many probable actions are taken; these are then projected into the probable future.
quotes.translation: 梦的发生会影响你整个身体状况，因此具有这种持续的治疗效果。这一结果源于任何梦境戏剧中建立的心灵情境（停顿），在其中，你存在的难题或挑战得以解决。许多可能的行动被采取；这些行动随后被投射到可能的未来中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It should be fairly easy to understand now how the second dilemma evolved from the first. I have said that the second dilemma resulted in, and constantly results in, consciousness of self. Now. Consciousness of self is not the same thing as consciousness of ego self. Consciousness of self is still consciousness directly connected with action.
quotes.translation: 现在应该相当容易理解第二个困境是如何从第一个演变而来的。我曾说过，第二个困境导致了、并持续导致着自我意识。现在。自我意识与自我本位的意识并非同一回事。自我意识仍是直接与行动相连的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Which you? Which world? If you are lonely it is because you believe in your loneliness in this present point that you acknowledge as time. From what seems to be the past you draw only those memories that reinforce your condition, and you project those into the future. Physically, you are overwhelming your body as it responds to a state of loneliness through chemical and hormonal reactions. You are also denying your own point of action within the present.
quotes.translation: 哪一个你？哪一个世界？如果你感到孤独，那是因为你相信此刻——你认定为时间的当下——中的孤独。从看似是过去的事物中，你只汲取那些强化你处境记忆，并将它们投射到未来。在身体层面，当你的身体通过化学与荷尔蒙反应回应孤独状态时，你正在压垮它。你也在否认自己在当下中的行动点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In time's reference, the private purposes of each individual appear also in the larger historical context, so that each person forms his corner of his civilization--and all individuals within a given time period have private and overall purposes, challenges that are set, probable actions that they will try to place within history's context.
quotes.translation: 就时间参照而言，每个个体的私人目的也出现在更大的历史脉络中，因此每个人都在塑造其文明的角落——而特定时期内的所有个体都拥有私人与整体目的、设定的挑战，以及他们试图置于历史脉络中的可能行动。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Within their happening there may be a distorted -- to it -- grotesque duration in which action may be seemingly impossible. No separation between self and experience may be allowed. Even an exalted experience can be an assault upon consciousness if it is forced. The price paid is much too high as far as the entire personality is concerned.
quotes.translation: 在其发生过程中，可能存在一种扭曲的——对其而言——怪诞的持续状态，其中行动看似不可能。自我与经验之间不容许任何分离。即使是崇高的经验，若被强行施加，也会成为对意识的攻击。就整个人格而言，付出的代价实在太高了。

quotes.text: This is to some extent of the same nature. That feeling of abundance and trust will in itself bring you plenty and abundance. It will attract intuitive ideas on your part, and intuitive actions on the part of others. Indeed Ruburt read an article this afternoon on brain waves, but I tell you that you send out messages of abundance or want.
quotes.translation: 这在某种程度上属于同一性质。那种丰盛与信任的感受本身就会为你带来丰盛与富足。它会吸引你产生直觉性的想法，也会吸引他人采取直觉性的行动。确实，鲁柏今天下午读到一篇关于脑电波的文章，但我告诉你，你发送的是丰盛或匮乏的讯息。

quotes.text: There are certain manners that are more advantageous than others in the giving of such suggestions, and we will go into these at another session. We may also, indeed, begin at least a partial study of the framework of the personality as it is related to action, for such a discussion will follow along well with our material on suggestion.
quotes.translation: 在给予这类暗示时，某些方式比其他方式更为有利，我们将在另一次课中深入探讨。我们或许也可以开始对人格架构进行至少部分的研究，探讨其与行动的关系，因为这样的讨论将与我们关于暗示的资料相辅相成。

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: In essence you see the past can be changed. Present actions can change future events that would otherwise occur. But when this is admitted, then we must admit also that present events can alter the past, for there is no element in the past that has a different structure or composition or characteristic, that is not present in the future.
quotes.translation: 从本质上说，你看，过去是可以改变的。当下的行动可以改变原本可能发生的未来事件。但一旦承认这一点，我们就必须同时承认：当下的事件也能改变过去，因为过去中没有任何元素具有与未来不同的结构、组成或特性。

quotes.text: The inner ego is indeed the "I" of your dreams, having somewhat the same sort of position within the inner self as the ego itself has to the physical self. Actions however merge within the inner ego. The scope of awareness is more complex. We will at a later time discuss this inner ego in connection with the dream situation and health.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实是你们梦境中的"我"，它在内在自我中的位置，某种程度上类似于自我在物质自我中的位置。然而，行动在内在自我中融合。觉知的范围更为复杂。我们稍后将讨论这个内在自我与梦境情境及健康的关系。

quotes.text: The slightest perception to some extent alters every atom within your physical structure, and this in turn sends out its ripples, so that as you know the most minute action is felt everywhere.
quotes.translation: 最细微的感知在某种程度上都会改变你物质结构中的每一个原子，而这又会向外发出它的涟漪，因此如你所知，最微小的行动都会在处处被感受到。

quotes.text: This attempt forms the ego, and is itself action. If illness were thrust upon action, or upon the personality from the outside, then the personality would be at the mercy of outside agencies.
quotes.translation: 这种尝试形成了自我，而它本身就是行动。如果疾病是强加于行动之上，或从外界强加于人格之上，那么人格就会受制于外在因素。
