quotes.text: The emotions come closer than anything else to the vividness of inner data. There are of course more differences than similarities. However because of the intense quality of emotional experience this is still a good comparison. With the emotions however, there is in many cases a stimulus to action in the outside camouflage pattern.
quotes.translation: 情感比其他任何事物都更接近内在数据的生动性。当然，差异远多于相似之处。然而，由于情感体验的强烈特质，这仍是一个不错的比较。不过，在许多情况下，情感会刺激外在伪装模式中的行动。

quotes.text: Probabilities expand in terms of value fulfillment. One given act does not necessarily then lead to act B and C, and hence to a concluding action. Instead it has offshoots in infinite directions, and these offshoots have offshoots. Sessions on the creative dilemmas and the sessions dealing with relative nonbeing will help you here.
quotes.translation: 或然性会以价值完成的方式扩展。一个特定行为未必会导向行为B和C，进而得出一个结论性行动。相反，它会衍生出无限分支，而这些分支又会衍生出更多分支。关于创造性困境的课程以及涉及相对非存在的课程将对此有所帮助。

quotes.text: It does not carry with it any built-in connection with punishment as you think of it. Once more, it was meant as a preventive measure. Any violation against nature would bring about a feeling of guilt so that when a like situation was encountered in the future, man would, in that moment of reflection, not repeat the same action.
quotes.translation: 它并不带有你所认为的与惩罚的内在关联。再次强调，它本意是一种预防措施。任何违背自然的行为都会引发内疚感，这样当未来遇到类似情境时，人类在反思的那一刻便不会重复同样的行为。

quotes.text: Aggressive action conveniently forgotten by Augustus was now recalled with exuberant glee by Augustus Two. As a result the chemical nature of the body was instantly revitalized. Muscular tone was greatly improved. There were changes in the amount of sugar in the blood and an alteration in the flow of energy throughout the body.
quotes.translation: 奥古斯都二号兴高采烈地回忆起奥古斯都曾刻意遗忘的侵略性行动。结果身体化学性质立即获得更新。肌肉张力大幅改善。血液含糖量发生变化，全身能量流动也随之改变。

quotes.text: Hate is unreasoning fear. Fear is caused by lack of understanding, by a lack of value fulfillment. Hate is that which is not love. Love is fulfilled, or fulfilling, value fulfillment. It is action that knows itself, and that glorifies in its parts, that is separated to know itself, and in knowing itself is no longer separated.
quotes.translation: 恨是无理性的恐惧。恐惧源于缺乏理解，源于价值实现不足。恨即非爱。爱是已实现或正在实现的价值实现。它是自知其性的行动，在自身各部分中彰显荣耀，为认识自身而分离，并在认识自身时不再分离。

quotes.text: In many respects actions within the dream universe are indeed more direct than in your own. It is because you remember but vague glimmerings and disconnected episodes that dreams appear, sometimes, chaotic or meaningless, particularly to the ego, which censors rigidly much of the information that the subconscious does retain.
quotes.translation: 在许多方面，梦宇宙中的行动确实比你们自己的世界更为直接。正因为你们只记得模糊的微光与零散的片段，梦境有时显得混乱或毫无意义——尤其对自我而言，它严格审查潜意识确实保留的许多信息。

quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is almost impossible to explain clearly, through the use of words, this massive complexity, for all fields of activity are self-generating. Even the dream field is self-generating. No consciousness can bring itself to destruction. It can only cease experiencing a certain portion of action. This is a rather important point.
quotes.translation: 几乎不可能通过语言清晰解释这种庞大的复杂性，因为所有活动场域都是自我生成的。就连梦境场域也是自我生成的。没有任何意识能将自己导向毁灭。它只能停止体验行动的特定部分。这是相当重要的一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. Take for example probable event X. This so-called probable event or action will be experienced by the various portions of the self in their own way. When it is experienced by the ego you call it an actual physical event. When the event is perceived or experienced by other layers of the self, the ego does not know of it.
quotes.translation: 现在。以可能事件X为例。这个所谓可能的事件或行动，将被自我的各个部分以各自的方式体验。当自我体验它时，你们称之为实际的物质事件。当事件被自我的其他层面感知或体验时，自我对此一无所知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is difficult here to do more than simply give you the statement. If you will, at your leisure, consider the makeup of your own dreams, you may partially and intuitively understand what I mean, for the distance in dreams is endless, though you may go but a little way; yet this distance as we have said, does not take up space. This comes close to evoking an understanding of distance as it occurs electrically, existing within an action.
quotes.translation: 在此处，我所能做的远不止是简单地向你陈述这个说法。若你愿意，在闲暇时思考一下自己梦境的构成，或许能凭直觉部分理解我的意思——因为梦中的距离虽看似有限，实则无穷无尽；然而正如我们所说，这种距离并不占据空间。这已接近唤起对"距离"在电性层面如何存在的理解——它存在于一个行动之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. One: Energy and action are basically the same, although neither must necessarily apply to physical motion.
quotes.translation: 现在。其一：能量与行动本质相同，尽管两者都不必然等同于物理运动。

quotes.text: In one sense meeting with you costs me little energy, it is true. On the other hand the effort to communicate explanations does involve very real effort on my part. And so you are not the only ones who grow weary in this respect. As I have said, feeling is action, and in my communications to you feeling plays a strong part.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度说，与你们会面几乎不消耗我的能量，这倒是真的。但另一方面，为传达解释而付出的努力确实需要我投入真实的精力。因此，在这方面感到疲惫的并非只有你们。如我所说，感受即是行动，而在与你们的沟通中，感受扮演着重要角色。

quotes.text: We must to some extent consider Ruburts own personality, and all protection that is possible should be given here. Doctor Instream can act in this behalf, and I will consider such actions as a gesture of his faith; though the word faith is not meant as any alternative to the word science, it is quite possible to have both.
quotes.translation: 我们必须在某种程度上考虑鲁柏自身的人格，此处应给予一切可能的保护。因斯特罗姆博士可代为执行此事，我将视此类行动为他信念的体现；尽管"信念"一词并非作为"科学"的替代词，但两者完全可以并存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There is, again, depth which is a depth of intensity; and yet within this depth of intensity there exists distances in terms of action, which is a fairly new idea in these sessions.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，存在一种强度层面的深度；然而在这强度深度之中，又存在着以行动为尺度的距离——这在本次课程中是个相当新颖的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The conscious mind as you normally think of it directs your overall action, and its ideas determine the kind of selectivity you use. It is for this reason that I am trying to expand your conscious ideas, so that you become better equipped to choose your line of physical experience from all those probable ones open to you.
quotes.translation: 你们通常所认知的意识心主导着整体行动，其观念决定了你们所运用的选择性。正因如此，我正试图扩展你们意识心的观念，使你们能更妥善地从所有向你们敞开的可能性经验中，选择自己的物质体验路线。

quotes.text: Without dreams the outer camouflaged self would lose all touch with inner realities, or would be in danger of thus denying its own heritage; and therefore the physical body is so constructed that excess chemicals must be discharged and transformed into human action, or the physical mechanism would be clogged with poisons.
quotes.translation: 没有梦境，外在伪装的自我会失去与内在实相的所有联系，或可能因此否认自身传承；因此肉体被构造为必须将过剩化学物质释放并转化为人类行动，否则身体机制将被毒素堵塞。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Creative distortion, in its relationship with action, affects therefore the creation of thoughts. The principle of creative distortions is mainly responsible for the fact that no identical thought is ever transmitted from one individual to another. Here the material that I have given you on telepathy should be considered.
quotes.translation: 创造性扭曲在与行动的关系中，因此影响思想的创造。创造性扭曲原则主要负责解释为何没有完全相同的思想能在个体间传递。此处应参考我此前关于心电感应所给的材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: An action has reality, as you know, within every possible field of activity. An emotion has an electrical and chemical structure. This is extremely important. It is not a structure that takes up space as you know it, obviously, but it is a structure nevertheless, and could be compared to the appearance of dream locations.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，行动在每个可能的活动场域中都具有实相。情绪具有电性与化学结构，这点极为重要。这结构显然不占据你所认知的空间，但确实是种结构，可比拟为梦境地点的显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Emotions are a quite natural portion of action, and left to themselves are fluid. They have electrical validity, and shape. When an attempt is made to reject an emotion, this does not affect the emotion half as much as it affects the individual involved. The act of rejection in itself is detrimental and doomed to failure.
quotes.translation: 情绪是行动相当自然的一部分，任其自然流动时具有流动性。它们具有电性的真实性与形状。当试图拒绝某种情绪时，这种拒绝行为对情绪本身的影响远不及对当事人自身的影响。拒绝行为本身具有破坏性且注定失败。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The two lads involved may very well cause an accident in any case, unless actions of their own alter their reactions. There is no connection between them and your friends however, a priori, and there are other elements that could interfere, preventing even an accident to them. They would have been the aggressors, you see.
quotes.translation: 除非这两个年轻人自身的行动改变了他们的反应模式，否则他们很可能在任何情况下引发意外。但你们的朋友与他们之间并无先验关联，且存在其他可能干预的因素，甚至能阻止他们遭遇意外。要知道，他们本应是主动攻击者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It can then build upon these, willingly submerge part of itself, and emerge with a more vigorous identity. In other words it can accept larger portions of action, and adapt itself in ways not possible when it was connected with the physical organism.
quotes.translation: 随后它可以在此基础上构建，自愿将自身部分沉潜，并以更强大的身份浮现。换言之，它能接纳更大范围的行动，并以与物质有机体相连时不可能的方式调整自身。

quotes.text: We have this evening been somewhat led astray, indeed, ourselves, from the main nature of the subjects at hand. We will however closely examine the nature of action for a brief time further. You have for now a sufficient basis in its characteristics so that we can begin with other discussions, and shortly we will do so.
quotes.translation: 今晚我们确实有些偏离手头主题的主要性质。不过我们将再花些时间仔细探讨行动的本质。你们目前对其特性已有足够基础，可以开始其他讨论，我们很快便会进行。

quotes.text: Science likes to think that it deals with predictable action. It perceives such a small amount of data, however, and in such a limited area, that the great inner unpredictability of any molecule, atom, or wave is not apparent. Scientists perceive only what appears within your system, and that often appears predictable.
quotes.translation: 科学喜欢认为自己处理的是可预测的行动。然而它感知的数据量如此之小，范围如此有限，以至于任何分子、原子或波的内在巨大不可预测性都未能显现。科学家只感知到你们系统内显现的事物，而它们往往显得可预测。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: It has not occurred to you, you see, to attempt to look over this boundary, so to speak, because you have taken it for granted that nothing exists on the other side. I am not here speaking necessarily of death, though this is the obvious instance of course. I am speaking of something much more subtle. I am speaking of any small, seemingly insignificant action that you perform during an ordinary day, and here we are coming close.
quotes.translation: 你们从未想过要尝试越过这个边界，因为你们理所当然地认为另一边空无一物。我此处未必指涉死亡——尽管这当然是最明显的例子。我指的是更微妙的事物：你们在寻常日子里所做的任何微小、看似无关紧要的行动。我们正在接近核心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now, in physical terms it may take some time before your conscious mind accepts or recognizes a diagnosis given in a dream. It may come to you later in altered form as a hunch or sudden intuition, or an urge for action. If you do not trust yourself you may ignore such impetuses and not take advantage of the answers.
quotes.translation: 就物质层面而言，你的意识心智可能需要一段时间才能接受或认出梦中给出的诊断。它可能稍后以预感、突发的直觉或行动的冲动等变形形式来到你面前。若你不信任自己，便可能忽略这些驱动力，无法善用这些答案。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The body will seek its release, and so will the mind. Dreams, or even daydreams of a frightening nature, can fulfill that purpose. The mind's creative play often serves up symbolic events that result in therapeutic physical reactions, and also function as postdream suggestions that offer hints as to remedial action.
quotes.translation: 身体会寻求释放，心智亦然。具有恐怖性质的梦境甚至白日梦，都能达成此目的。心智的创造性游戏常会呈现象征性事件，引发治疗性的生理反应，同时作为梦后暗示，提供关于补救行动的线索。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Behind all of these issues are far deeper considerations. The nature of creativity itself is involved, and the characteristics of energy, without which no action is possible.
quotes.translation: 所有这些议题背后，存在着更深层的考量。这涉及创造力本身的本质，以及能量的特性——没有能量，任何行动皆不可能发生。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: An awareness of the existence of the supraselfis in itself of great benefit. The author of Ruburt's new book calls this God, and I am simply telling you what it is. The supraselfis indeed a portion of a higher gestalt, which is part of yet another higher consciousness-gestalt. This is true. But this supraselfis you in a highly personal way, and it is superior in many aspects. It controls and organizes larger portions of action.
quotes.translation: 对超我存在性的觉知本身就大有裨益。鲁柏新书的作者称之为神，而我仅向你们说明其本质。超我确实是更高层完形的一部分，而该完形又隶属于另一个更高层意识完形。事实确是如此。但这个超我以极具个人性的方式呈现，它在诸多层面都更为优越，掌控并组织着更大范围的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It feels the concentration of energy that has collected to form the rejected action patterns, and indeed it may feel that this unified rejection pattern is then even an enemy to its own superiority. It may, with more force than ever, attempt to hold back the expression of these impulses, and its fear of them grows.
quotes.translation: 它感知到凝聚成被拒行动模式的能量集中，甚至可能将这种统一的拒斥模式视为自身优越性的敌人。它会以比以往更强大的力量试图压制这些冲动的表达，对其恐惧也与日俱增。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, it can be said that you have reincarnational civilizations as well as reincarnating individuals. Each entity who is born in flesh works toward the development of those abilities that can be best nurtured and fulfilled within the physical environment. He has a responsibility to and for the civilization in which he has each existence, for he helps form it through his own thoughts, emotions, and actions.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度而言，可以说你们既存在转世文明，也存在转世个体。每个以肉身降生的实体都致力于发展那些能在物质环境中获得最佳培育与实现的能力。他对自身存在的每个文明都负有责任，因为他通过自己的思想、情感与行动参与塑造了该文明。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is as if you could consciously come to terms with each of your own cells and become aware, in your terms, of their future and their past. This traveling- through obviously changes the nature of the moment points. It is, again, action working within itself. The time element, as you understand it, hardly exists.
quotes.translation: 仿佛你能有意识地与自己的每个细胞达成协议，并依你们的角度觉察它们的未来与过去。这种穿越显然改变了瞬间点的本质。这又是行动在自身内部运作。你们所理解的时间要素几乎不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is much involved here that a reading of past sessions on matter will make plain. You realize of course that the atoms and molecules within the physical image continually change during existence on the physical field. Openings, so to speak, for the influx of new material into the physical form, are made possible by the inner self. When it abdicates it closes up the possibility of this repairing type of molecular action.
quotes.translation: 这里涉及许多内容，阅读过去关于物质的相关章节将使其清晰。你们当然明白，物理形象内的原子与分子在物质场存在期间持续变化。可以说，内在自体为新材料涌入物理形态创造了开口。当它退位时，便关闭了这种修复型分子行动的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is one point from our previous discussion that should be added to. It is in terms of a clearer definition. You call matter living or dead according to quite arbitrary designations. We have a step further here to take. In our last session, I mentioned that you considered live matter to be action in motion.
quotes.translation: 我们先前讨论中有一点需要补充。这涉及更清晰的定义。你们根据相当武断的指定来称物质为有生命或无生命。我们在此需更进一步。在上次课程中，我提到你们认为有生命物质是运动中的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Our material on the fifth dimension seemed almost infinite to you at the time. That is, the fifth dimension appeared infinite in its complexity, but you see that it is but one dimension within an infinite number of dimensions. For there are infinite possibilities in the patterns which action can of itself form.
quotes.translation: 我们关于第五维度的资料当时对你们而言几乎是无限的。也就是说，第五维度在其复杂性上看似无限，但你们要明白它只是无限维度中的一个维度。因为行动本身所能形成的模式中存在着无限的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Again, this is not symbolic. Only by the use of the inner senses can you obtain a viewpoint that is to some extent free of your own system. The inner self realizes the nature of its own reality, is sure of its identity and well aware of its power in the creation of actions which it projects outward from itself.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这并非象征性的说法。只有通过运用内在感官，你才能获得某种程度脱离自身系统的视角。内在自体明白自身实相的本质，确信自己的身份，并清楚知道自己在向外投射的行动中所拥有的创造力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Some personalities are prone to this sort of activity. Until they realize the nature of such actions, two or three personalities may join as partners in such a endeavor, in which case the situation is more difficult to untangle. Here there is simply an arrangement and rearrangement of a time already dealt with.
quotes.translation: 某些人格倾向于这类活动。除非他们认清此类行动的本质，否则两三个人格可能以伙伴关系共同参与这种尝试，这种情况下局面会更难厘清。这不过是针对已被处理过的时间进行重新排列组合罢了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The body, responding to his thoughts, feelings, and beliefs, has much more data to deal with, therefore, and must have a clear area in which concise action is possible.
quotes.translation: 身体回应他的思想、情感与信念，因此必须处理更多数据，并需要一个清晰的领域，以便进行简洁的行动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 804, MAY 9, 1977
9:44 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: It is not quite as simple a matter as just deciding what events you want to materialize as reality, since you have, in your terms, a body of probabilities of one kind or another already established as the raw materials for the coming year. It would be quite improbable for you, Joseph (as Seth calls me), to suddenly turn into a tailor, for example, for none of your choices with probabilities have led toward such an action.
quotes.translation: 这并非单纯决定你想将哪些事件具体化为现实那么简单，因为以你们的时间观而言，你们已拥有某种或多种可能性的集合体，作为来年的原始素材。例如，约瑟（赛斯对我的称呼）突然变成裁缝的可能性极低，因为你与可能性相关的选择从未导向此类行动。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When the ego impedes such expression, then the emotions are translated into other actions, and can turn into impediments. It is only because the ego blocks freedom of the emotional expression, out of fear, that it appears to the ego that emotions are indeed fearful characteristics. Dammed up, they are indeed.
quotes.translation: 当自我阻碍这种表达时，情感便会转化为其他行动，并可能成为障碍。正是由于自我出于恐惧而阻挠情感的自由表达，才使自我认为情感确实是可怕的特质。被压抑的情感，确实如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Complications are far too intricate to explain to you. You form your image and the physical matter of your environment, and these, being action, are perceived as reality in other systems. They may not be perceived as physical objects, but as reality that conforms to the particular camouflage structure within.
quotes.translation: 这些复杂性过于错综复杂，难以向你解释。你形成自己的形象与环境中的物质实体，而由于这些本身即是行动，在其他系统中会被视为实相。它们可能不被感知为物质对象，而是作为符合特定内在伪装结构的实相存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: An ego could be compared to a small dam in this respect. However, action constantly forms perceptual patterns in which it can view itself. Again, these patterns are formed one within the other, and they could be said to form that imaginary structure which we called the fifth dimension, so many sessions ago.
quotes.translation: 从这个角度看，自我可比作一座小型水坝。然而，行动持续形成可供自身观照的感知模式。这些模式再次层层相嵌，可以说构成了我们许多节前所称的第五维度那个虚构结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If they cannot be overwhelmed they are assimilated, and faithfully reproduced. There are methods whereby you can indeed help your own system, and to a large measure determine the constructive nature of action as it operates within the system, and protect the organism from such distortions before they occur.
quotes.translation: 若无法被压倒，它们就会被同化并忠实再现。确实存在某些方法，使你能真正协助自身系统，并在相当程度上决定行动在该系统内运作时的建设性本质，在扭曲发生前保护有机体免受其害。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We go back to our fundamentals: You create reality through your feelings, thoughts, and mental actions. Some of these are physically materialized, others are actualized in probable systems. You are presented with an endless series of choices, it seems, at any point, some more or less favorable than others.
quotes.translation: 我们回到基本要义：你通过自己的感受、思想和心智行动创造实相。其中一些以物质形式具体化，另一些则在可能性系统中实现。在任何一个时间点，你似乎都面临无穷无尽的选择序列，有些选择比其他选择更有利或更不利。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In exploring these non intervals however （smile） you also create that which you explore, for none of this exists without creative consciousness. This evening's material, read along with the discussions concerning the nature of action, will give you a more comprehensive idea of what I am trying to tell you.
quotes.translation: 然而在探索这些非间隔时（微笑），你也同时创造你所探索的对象，因为没有创造性的意识，这一切便不存在。今晚的材料，配合关于行动本质的讨论一起阅读，将让你更全面地理解我试图传达的内容。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: All That Is is itself evolving. It is not aware of all of its own purposes, for some of these are ever new. In some respects therefore, there are no cut and dried answers. As far as your own system is concerned, I have told you that the past ever changes, and here we enter the realm of probabilities; for at any point in any man's life, where a decision was made, the other probable alternative actions were also taken.
quotes.translation: 一切万有本身正在进化中。它并非全然知晓自身所有目的，因为其中一些目的永远崭新。就你们自己的系统而言，我曾告诉过你过去永远在改变，此刻我们进入了可能性的领域；因为在任何人生命中的任何决策点上，未被选择的替代行动同样被实际执行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Thought and emotion then, is not only generally related to the physical mechanism, but as electrical actions, thoughts and emotions act directly upon the system. Again here you see, however, that it is the individual himself who initiates his own emotional climate, and then suffers or enjoys the results.
quotes.translation: 那么，思想与情绪不仅与身体机制大致相关，而且作为电性作用，思想和情绪会直接影响整个系统。然而，你在这里再次看到，正是个体自己引发了自己的情绪氛围，然后承受或享受其结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The thyroid gland operates strongly in regard to expectations, hormonal balances being maintained at rather normal levels normally. It is sensitive however to panic and fear, and, affecting other glands working with inner subconscious mechanisms, it becomes overly stimulated and causes subconscious mechanisms to actually create, in matter, the object of the fears which have themselves caused the initial over action.
quotes.translation: 甲状腺与期望密切相关，通常荷尔蒙平衡维持在相当正常的水平。但它对恐慌和恐惧非常敏感，并影响与其他内在潜意识机制协同工作的腺体，从而过度受刺激，导致潜意识机制在物质中实际创造出引发最初过度反应的恐惧对象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Jane's Jan. 10/64 trance is described in Session 14, Vol. 1.）

quotes.text: When the ego is a very rigid one however, it will not accept the reality of these rejected patterns so easily, and according to the nature of its rigidity it may restrict so many areas of activity that the inside action, or the inside impetus for expression, almost equally balances the ego force itself.
quotes.translation: 然而，当自我非常僵化时，它不会轻易接受这些被排斥模式的实相，根据其僵化的性质，它可能会限制如此多的活动领域，以至于内在行动或内在表达的动力几乎与自我力量本身相平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: While each person generally follows a given strand of consciousness, and identifies with it as "myself," there are other alternate lines beneath the surface. They are also quite as legitimately the same identity, but they are not focused upon because the body must have one clear, direct mode of action.
quotes.translation: 虽然每个人通常遵循一条特定的意识线索，并认同它为"我自己"，但在表面之下还有其他交替的路线。它们同样合理地属于同一个身份，但由于身体必须有一个清晰、直接的行动模式，这些路线并未被聚焦。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: You will never find a first action, and only within your system does such a search have any meaning. You form the reality, the shape, of thoughts, for they have shape, in much the same way that you breathe; and you have as little control of them, once you have created them, as you have of your breath.
quotes.translation: 你永远找不到第一个行动，只有在你自己的系统内，这种寻找才有意义。你形成思想——它们确实具有形状——的现实与形态，其方式与你呼吸大致相同；而一旦你创造了它们，你对它们的控制力就与你对呼吸的控制力一样微乎其微。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Our next session then will be concerned further with the nature of action, and I will speak concerning the complexity of what may appear to be a single action.
quotes.translation: 我们的下一节课将进一步探讨行动的本质，届时我将谈论一个看似单一的行动可能具有的复杂性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other words, there is in the psyche constant interaction between all of the stations, and marvelous, literally unlimited creativity -- in which, in your terms, all actions in one station affect all others in the other stations.
quotes.translation: 换言之，在心灵中，所有站点之间存在着持续的互动，以及奇妙而真正无限的创造力——用你们的话来说，一个站点中的所有行动都会影响其他站点中的所有行动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: On a very basic level, as consciousness with a self （but no conscious "I" exists in the most minute division of consciousness）, all action and all sensations and all stimuli are instantly and automatically and joyfully accepted, regardless of their nature. At this level no knowledge of threat exists.
quotes.translation: 在最基本的层面上，作为具有自我意识（但在最细微的意识划分中并不存在有意识的“我”），所有行动、所有感觉和所有刺激，无论其性质如何，都会立即、自动且喜悦地被接受。在这个层面上，不存在对威胁的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: For many people, a natural calamity provides their first personal experience with the realities of creaturehood's connection with the planet. Under such conditions men who feel a part of nothing, of no structure or family or country, can understand in a flash their comradeship with the earth, their place upon it and its energy; through suddenly recognizing that relationship they feel their own power for action.
quotes.translation: 对许多人来说，自然灾害是他们首次亲身经历生物性与地球相连的现实。在这种情况下，那些感觉自己不属于任何事物、任何结构、家庭或国家的人，能够瞬间理解他们与地球的伙伴关系、他们在地球上的位置以及地球的能量；通过突然认识到这种关系，他们感受到自己行动的力量。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Physically the structure of a cell retains its identity, even while the matter that composes it is continually altered. The cell rebuilds itself in line with its own pattern of identity, yet is always a part of emerging action, alive and responding even in the midst of its own multitudinous deaths.
quotes.translation: 从物质层面而言，细胞的结构维持着其身份认同，即使构成它的物质不断更迭。细胞依据自身身份模式重建自身，却始终是涌现性行动的一部分，在自身无数次的死亡过程中依然鲜活且持续回应。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: （A curved line may be a complicated thought, a crooked or incomplete one--and a straight line may be a more simple, direct action or thought. It follows that there are more curved lines than straight ones, both in our art on this plane, in our lives on this plane, and in our habitat on this plane.
quotes.translation: （一条曲线可能代表复杂的思绪，或扭曲不完整的意念——而直线则可能是更简单直接的行动或思想。由此可知，无论在此层面的艺术创作、生活轨迹，还是栖息环境中，曲线都远多于直线。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It cannot be considered separately. It may appear in many guises, due to the nature of the particular reality of which it is part, and it involves much more than motion. Action may be considered also simply as the spontaneous nature of the inner vitality toward various expressive materializations.
quotes.translation: 它无法被单独考量。因其所属特定实相的本质，它可能以多种面貌呈现，且其内涵远不止于运动。行动亦可单纯视为内在生命力朝向各种表达性物质化的自发本质。

quotes.text: （She reported that at the end of the session she received a strong emotional feeling from Seth. It was directed toward us and was to this effect: "Through action, see how I'm a part of you both now, and how foolish it is of you to worry about identities, when all identities are so bound together."
quotes.translation: 她报告说，在课程结束时，她接收到来自赛斯强烈的情感。这情感是针对我们的，大意是：“透过行动，看我现在如何成为你们俩的一部分，而你们担忧身份认同是多么愚蠢，因为所有身份都如此紧密相连。”
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is materialized action, a self, part of other selves, as you are part of other selves. The intensity here is different. You, any human being, represent a capability, an attraction, an electrical field of great intensity that is capable of efficiently acting as a unit within the physical field.
quotes.translation: 这是物质化的行动，一个自体，是其他自体的一部分，正如你是其他自体的一部分。这里的强度不同。你，任何人类，代表一种能力、一种吸引力、一个高强度的电场，能够在物质场域内有效地作为一个单位运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: All of this highly hidden of course. The sexual charge was always used in transformed nature by Miss Price, and turned into the propelling action of many beneficial deeds, for she helped literally hundreds of students, forcing their best from them. She had a military background in two past lives.
quotes.translation: 当然，这一切都高度隐晦。性电荷始终被普莱斯小姐以转化后的性质运用，并转化为许多善行的推进动力，因为她实际帮助了数百名学生，迫使他们发挥出最佳状态。她在两世前生中曾有军事背景。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now, both of you have particularly strongly-developed latent abilities as far as the inner senses are concerned. Otherwise these sessions would not be possible. It is true that at the present time your abilities vary in direction, yet they complement each other in action and therefore in result.
quotes.translation: 就内在感官而言，你们两人都拥有特别强烈发展的潜在能力，否则这些课程便不可能进行。确实，目前你们的能力在方向上各有不同，但在行动中却相辅相成，因此也体现在结果上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The Christ drama did splash over into historical reality. Man's fears of not achieving brotherhood, of not achieving a secure state of consciousness, or a workable morality, result in his dreams of destruction, however they are expressed. And indeed, the present physical event as it exists now at the energy plant near Harrisburg can easily be likened to -- and is -- a warning dream to change man's actions.
quotes.translation: 基督戏剧确实溅入了历史现实。人类对无法实现手足之情、无法达到安全的意识状态或可行的道德的恐惧，导致了他们的毁灭之梦，无论这些梦以何种方式表达。而事实上，目前存在于哈里斯堡附近能源厂的那个物理事件，很容易被比作——并且确实是——一个警示之梦，旨在改变人类的行为。

quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You and Ruburt had of course been in close relationships in past life existences in the physical system. It was hardly any coincidence that you met. This follows the nature of action beautifully. Patterns in your personalities had already been activated and were ready for use and development.
quotes.translation: 你和鲁柏在物质系统中的前世存在中，当然有过密切的关系。你们的相遇绝非巧合。这完美地遵循了行动的本质。你们人格中的模式早已被激活，并准备就绪以供使用和发展。

quotes.text: Time is merely the effect caused within a given system by the system itself, operating upon a mental action as the action enters within its framework.

quotes.text: On your plane the action of the mental enzyme would appear to be more or less inflexible, more or less static, irreversible, and permanent. This of course is not the case. It is a view caused by the difficulty of getting any perspective about the particular plane which you happen to inhabit.
quotes.translation: 在你们的层面上，心智酶的作用看似或多或少缺乏弹性、近乎静止、不可逆转且永恒不变。这当然并非实情。这种观点源于难以对你们恰好栖居的特定层面获得任何透视角度。

quotes.text: I have said often that any action changes that which acts, and that which is acted upon; and so in the sort of experiments that are now being carried on to study dreams. The acts of the investigators are changing the conditions in such a way it is easy to find that which you are looking for.
quotes.translation: 我常言任何行动都会改变行动者与被作用者；当前进行的梦境研究实验正是如此。研究者的行动正在改变条件，使得你们更容易找到所追寻之物。

quotes.text: This is what I am leading to. Outer constructions are always translations of actions from inner reality into material. Their validity is dependent upon the individuals ability to receive inner data, to translate inner data, to manipulate energy, and to construct it onto the material field.
quotes.translation: 这就是我要引导的方向。外在建构永远是内在实相行动向物质的转译。其有效性取决于个体接收内在资料、转译内在资料、操控能量并将其建构到物质场域的能力。

quotes.text: There is, in no circumstance, any closed system. Action therefore flows within all systems and realities. Your physical senses are therefore adapted to deal with a particular camouflage system. They are therefore only equipped to perceive the realities within the physical camouflage field.
quotes.translation: 在任何情况下都不存在封闭系统。因此行动在所有系统与实相中流动。你们的肉体感官因此适应于处理特定伪装系统，它们仅能感知物质伪装场域内的实相。

quotes.text: His senses are extremely acute, his inner senses perfectly attuned. Even now he senses my presence. However as he grows more familiar with me his strange actions will altogether cease. My presence alternates between you both and this leads to confusion on Willy's part. Watch him even now.
quotes.translation: 他的感官极为敏锐，内在感官完美调谐。即便此刻他也能感知我的存在。然而随着他对我日渐熟悉，那些怪异举动将完全停止。我的存在在你们两人之间交替显现，这导致威利产生困惑。此刻请观察他。

quotes.text: If ideals are merely mouthed, and the idea of peace not seriously strived for, then this is an inferior state, even if there is no war. These men are showing the nation the difference between ideals and actions. Their deaths point the way and will give the impetus that was sorely needed.
quotes.translation: 若理想仅止于空谈，和平理念未被认真追求，即便没有战争，这也是一种低劣的状态。这些人正以自身向国家昭示理想与行动之间的差距。他们的死亡指明了方向，并将提供迫切需要的推动力。

quotes.text: So while you operate in a one reality field psychological structure, you do not on a conscious level even perceive its entire reality, nor your place in it. The word progression is a poor one, and again however I must use it. (Pause; smile.) Seth's material on action will help you here.
quotes.translation: 因此，当你们在一个实相场心理结构中运作时，你们甚至在意识层面都无法感知其完整实相，也无法感知自己在此结构中的位置。"进展"一词并不恰当，但我仍不得不使用它。（停顿；微笑。）赛斯关于"行动"的资料将在此处帮助你们。

quotes.text: The dates 325 and 375 come to mind in connection with my own life at that time. Again, the names and dates have little meaning to me now. In that life I learned to understand the interplay between men and their ambitions, the gulf that often exists between ideals and practical action.
quotes.translation: 325年和375年这两个年份浮现在我的脑海中，与当时我自己的那一世有关。同样，这些名字和年份如今对我已无甚意义。在那世中，我学会了理解人类与其野心之间的相互作用，以及理想与实际行动之间常常存在的鸿沟。

quotes.text: The half-hour schedule will allow for a disciplined, smooth and automatic self-discovery which will not drain your energies. You have indeed additional energy at your command, but the focus in the personal subconscious prevents you from using it. You will find that your condition is now improving and will continue to do so. And all of this also involves a practical lesson in the nature of action.
quotes.translation: 半小时的日程安排将带来一种有纪律、顺畅且自动的自我发现，这不会耗尽你的精力。你确实有额外的能量可供调遣，但个人潜意识中的焦点阻止了你使用它。你会发现你的状况正在改善，并将持续如此。而这一切也涉及关于行动本质的一堂实际课程。

quotes.text: Their lack of knowledge and techniques and methods then become quite plain. By concentrating too deeply upon the world of newspapers and the negative reports of man's actions, it is truly easy to lose sight of what I tell you (louder) is each man's and each woman's basic good intent.
quotes.translation: 他们缺乏知识、技巧与方法，这一点变得相当明显。若过度专注于报纸世界与对人类行为的负面报道，便极易忽略我告诉你们的（提高音量）——每个男人与每个女人内在的基本善意。

quotes.text: Emotional charged feeling immediately sets up what you may think of as a tangent. It is expressed in some reality system. This is the inner nature of action. Those inner thoughts or desires, impulses not made physically real in your terms, will be made real within other systems.
quotes.translation: 充满情感的感受会立即建立起你们可视为切线的东西。它在某个实相系统中被表达。这是行动的内在本质。那些内在思想或欲望、冲动——在你们看来未在物质层面实现的——将在其他系统中成为实相。

quotes.text: We shall have to consider, later, color as it appears in dreams, but this is not the time for such a discussion. Identities exist within dreams also, and here the same nature of identities applies, as those given earlier. The laws of action also apply here in the dream reality.
quotes.translation: 我们稍后必须探讨梦境中出现的色彩，但此刻并非讨论此事的时机。身份认同同样存在于梦境中，且此处身份认同的本质与先前所述相同。行动法则在梦境实相中同样适用。

quotes.text: This is an extremely fascinating area of study, and one that we shall pursue rather vigorously. The whole personality must be led to choose those actions which are of the most benefit to itself as a whole, and its integrity as a unit is determined by its choices in this matter.
quotes.translation: 这是一个极其引人入胜的研究领域，我们将以相当积极的态度进行探讨。整体人格必须引导自身选择那些对整体最有利的行动，而个体作为统一体的完整性，正是由其在相关事务中的选择所决定的。

quotes.text: Now, the process does not cease at the physical boundaries of the self however. The data thus far has been seen as traveling from the inner self outward, as being translated from pure knowledge into thermal pictures, inner images and thoughts. Obviously words and action follow.
quotes.translation: 然而，这个过程并不会止于自我的物质边界。截至目前，我们观察到数据从内在自我向外流动，从纯粹知识转化为热像、内在意象与思想。显然，言语与行动随之而来。

quotes.translation: 这种失联仅适用于自我，并不适用于自己的其他部分。正是通过内在自我、通过内在意识，行动的本质才能在一定程度上显现自身。而当它显现时，人们将会看到——

quotes.text: The physical environment can be seen in many ways as direct extensions from the physical self. Physical formations of other images, you see, radiating outward; these subject to continual change, as is the physical image, and all of this reflecting the inner and basic action.
quotes.translation: 物质环境在许多方面可被视为物质自我的直接延伸。你看，其他影像的物质形态向外辐射，这些形态如同物质影像般持续变化，而这一切都反映着内在的基本行动。

quotes.text: Also, your actions now can affect the future personality as well as the past one. You must try to stretch your imagination and feel these realities, because the intellect alone cannot comprehend them. Psychological time is your best method for perceiving these actualities.
quotes.translation: 此外，你现在的行动既能影响未来的人格，也能影响过去的人格。你必须尽力伸展想象力去感受这些实相，因为仅凭理智无法理解它们。心理时间是感知这些实相的最佳方法。

quotes.text: We ourselves will be concerned for a while with the nature of suggestion in its relationship to action. It should be most beneficial material, practically speaking, and will also add to your knowledge and carry our discussions toward certain directions that I have in mind.
quotes.translation: 我们自身将暂时关注暗示与行动之间的本质关联。就实际层面而言，这应是最有益处的资料，既能增进你的知识，也能将我们的讨论导向我心中设想的某些方向。

quotes.translation: 所有行动都将被表达。因此，在某种程度上你拥有一个根源本性，你的许多梦境也会相似。你与这些可能的自己远非同一，但若遇见他们，你会立即意识到自己找到了未知的自我部分。

quotes.translation: 在此之前，这个广义维度根本不存在，是一个意识尚未充填的真空。由于意识或行动永远无法完全物质化自身，因此确实存在无数此类不存在的领域，新的维度可从其中涌现。

quotes.translation: 这完全合理。我们将尝试另一种方式。玛莲诺十五岁左右时发生了一个事件，这个事件与她后来的选择和行动密切相关。她的母亲虽然后来被牵连其中，但并非事件的始作俑者。

quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I will have more to say along these lines, for we shall shortly be considering the psychological structures in terms of action, and in their relationship to time. We will first relate them to this emerging self that you can sense personally, and then we shall go further.
quotes.translation: 关于这点我还会进一步说明，因为我们很快就要从行动的角度来探讨心理结构，以及它们与时间的关系。我们会先将这些结构与你们个人能感知到的这个新兴自我联系起来，然后再深入探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Our material on the nature of action will be helpful here. The ego, the physically-oriented ego, is a convenient figurehead. It represents only an imperfect glimpse of a given momentary appearance--the portion of the self that happens in any given instant to show itself.
quotes.translation: 我们关于行动本质的资料在此会有帮助。自我，这个以物质为导向的自我，是个方便的象征性代表。它仅代表某个特定瞬间显现的不完美一瞥——即自我在任一特定时刻恰好展现出来的那部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: To perceive more of action immediately involves mobility, and I am not speaking in terms of space. The act of perception itself involves mobility through intensities, and the many facets of consciousness can only be experienced as a direct result of this inner mobility.
quotes.translation: 要感知更多行动必然涉及流动性，我并非在空间层面谈论。感知行为本身涉及通过强度的流动，而意识的诸多面向只能作为这种内在流动性的直接结果被体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now this is the difference between repression and positive action. In repression the resentment is shoved beneath and ignored. With our method it is recognized, imaginatively plucked out as being undesirable, and replaced by the thought of peace and constructive energy.
quotes.translation: 这便是压抑与积极行动的区别。在压抑中，怨恨被压制并忽视。而采用我们的方法时，它被识别出来，通过想象力作为不受欢迎之物被剔除，并以和平与建设性能量的念头取而代之。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The event is actual all the same, and is experienced in variation. The whole self therefore perceives and is affected by probabilities, and experiences these as action, regardless of whether or not the ego has chosen to accept any given event as a physical occurrence.
quotes.translation: 事件本身仍然是真实的，并以变化的形式被体验。因此，整体自我感知并受到可能性的影响，将这些可能性作为行动来体验，无论自我是否选择接受任何特定事件为物理现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The pulsations were caused by the action of your emotional state. And you, my dear Joseph, literally frightened him away. You on your part translated what was inner data into a form that you could, or hoped to, understand. The eyes were the first images that you saw.
quotes.translation: 这些脉动是由你情绪状态的作用引起的。而你，我亲爱的约瑟夫，确实把他吓跑了。你这边则将内在数据转化为你能理解或希望理解的形式。眼睛是你最初看到的影像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Yet each outward thrust turns again inward; and of itself, because of the nature of action, is the creation of new action.
quotes.translation: 然而每一次向外的推进都会再次转向内在；而它本身，由于行动的本质，就是新行动的创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: （A drawing is solidified action. In the process of drawing I am solidifying emotion or feeling. There is distortion present, but still I put down something that my obvious senses can perceive. It is an attempt to get to the heart, the mind's heart, of the matter.
quotes.translation: （画作是固化的行动。在绘画过程中，我正将情感或感受固化。虽然存在扭曲，但我仍将某种显意识感官能感知的东西记录下来。这是试图触及事物的核心——心灵的核心。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Spirits can go elsewhere. Violence only ur plane. Problems worked out （tr no） thru action are bound to lead to violence.
quotes.translation: 灵体可以去别处。暴力只存在于你们的层面。问题若不以行动解决（而非逃避），必然导向暴力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: And what meaning you give it is there, and part of it, since you who project the meaning are yourselves part of it. The inner self is, therefore, that inner portion of action which forms the egos, and the selves, through the dilemmas of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 你赋予它的意义就在那里，并成为它的一部分，因为投射意义的你本身就是它的一部分。因此，内在自体便是行动的内在部分，它通过我提及的那些困境，形成了自我与诸自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The field of probable events exists as a reality. From it the self chooses those actions which shall become a part of physical reality. Here indeed free will enters into the matter. This is a pun. I would be disappointed if it were missed. It is a good one.
quotes.translation: 可能性事件的场域作为实相存在。自体从中选择那些将成为物质实相一部分的行动。在此，自由意志确实介入其中。这是个双关语——若被忽略我会失望。这是个绝妙的双关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You may not be able to make sense from what appears to be a chaotic jumble of disconnected images and actions. The main reason for your confusion is your inability as an egotistical identity to perceive an order that is not based upon continuity of moments.
quotes.translation: 你或许无法从看似混乱无序、支离破碎的意象与行动中理出头绪。你困惑的主因在于，作为自我本位意识，你无法感知一种不基于片刻连续性的秩序。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: From the outside, such systems would seem meaningless to you even if you were able to perceive them. You would not be able to observe the pivot points about which actions occurred. The very definite rules of that system then would be quite obscure to you.
quotes.translation: 从外部来看，即便你能感知这类系统，它们对你而言也毫无意义。你无法观察到行动发生的枢轴点。该系统中极为明确的规则，对你而言将相当隐晦难解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All of these forms, however, are you understand spontaneous and instantaneous. In the same way that an idea may appear within your system as a thought, a mental image, a dream picture or as a physical object, so does any action event appear in many forms.
quotes.translation: 然而，所有这些形式，你需明白都是自发且瞬间产生的。正如一个念头可能以思想、心像、梦境画面或实体物品的形式出现在你的系统中，任何行动事件也会以多种形态显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In The Nature of Personal Reality I stated that the point of action occurs in the present.10 In Adventures in Consciousness Ruburt said, quite properly, that time experience actually splashed out from the present to form an apparent past and future.11
quotes.translation: 在《个人实相的本质》中我曾指出，行动的发生点就在当下。10 在《意识探险》中，鲁柏恰当地指出，时间体验实际上是从当下向四周溅射，形成看似存在的过去与未来。11
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 741
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The conditions of our sessions allow us, on the one hand, more freedom, and on the other hand more control. Also they add to the value of the sessions themselves. We will have much more to say concerning the limitless self, in connection with action.
quotes.translation: 我们课程的条件一方面赋予我们更多自由，另一方面也带来更多掌控。同时，这些条件也提升了课程本身的价值。关于与行动相关的无限自性，我们还有更多要阐述的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In any fairly normal personality the intellect will indeed stand guard. There is no need to fear identity's complete immersion into emotional sensation. Such emotional experience actually strengthens not only the ego, but it opens communications between the ego and the subconscious, and allows for a much greater flow of energy from the primary source of action.
quotes.translation: 在任何相当正常的人格中，智性确实会担任守卫。无需担心身份会完全沉浸于情绪感受中。这种情绪体验不仅会强化自我，更能开启自我与潜意识之间的沟通，让来自行动本源的能量得以更充沛地流动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Right now Dr. Instream has several choices of action available. I mean in this general period of time, not this instant. He is in a period in which he is trying to make decisions of a major nature, concerning the future and his own circumstances.
quotes.translation: 目前英斯特林博士面前有几个可行的行动选择。我指的是这段大致的时间范围内，而非当下这一刻。他正处在一个需要做出重大决定的时期，这些决定关乎未来与他自身的处境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now this program if faithfully followed will bring results. It will initiate intuitive concepts, ideas in your work which will automatically attract others to possess them. It will initiate other actions that will result in financial betterment.
quotes.translation: 这个计划若能忠实遵循，必将带来成果。它将激发你工作中的直觉性概念与创意，这些概念会自动吸引他人去拥有它们。它还将启动其他行动，最终带来经济状况的改善。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. (Pause.) Any perception immediately blends, then, with the entire system of the individual. Any perception is action, and it changes that upon which it acts, and in so doing it is itself changed (underlined.) This applies to any perception.
quotes.translation: 现在。（停顿。）任何感知都会立即与个体的整个系统融合。任何感知都是行动，它会改变它所作用的对象，而在此过程中，它自身也被改变了（下划线强调）。这适用于任何感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You cannot escape action. The ego attempts to so order events as to direct action along its own lines.
quotes.translation: 你无法逃避行动。自我试图安排事件，以便将行动导向其自身的轨道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The chemical changes propel consciousness outward, or far inward. This is aside: A small dose of salt, regular salt, taken with the drugs would help maintain a certain stability. It has a binding action on consciousness and acts as a cohesive.
quotes.translation: 化学变化将意识向外推进，或向内深入。附带一提：少量食盐，普通食盐，与药物一同服用有助于维持某种稳定性。它对意识具有凝聚作用，并充当粘合剂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Energy is action. It must act and move. It constantly seeks to know itself, and to expand. It cannot remain static. Its survival is dependent upon change. Its very permanency is determined by its nature, and its nature demands constant change.
quotes.translation: 能量即行动。它必须行动与运动。它不断寻求认识自身，并扩展自身。它无法保持静止。其存续依赖于变化。其永恒性由其本质决定，而其本质要求持续的变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: For we will be involved here with a definite classification as to when an illness is beneficial and when it is detrimental. This will be most important. An illness is almost always the result of another action that cannot be carried through.
quotes.translation: 因为我们将在此明确分类，何种疾病有益、何种有害。这点至关重要。疾病几乎总是另一项无法完成的行动所导致的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is a self materialized in physical form. It is conscious of itself as belonging to action. The fact that it may be part of a larger gestalt self in no way belittles its own identity. It is conscious of the gestalts of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 它是物质形态中的自我。它自觉属于行动的一部分。它可能属于更大整体自性的一部分，但这绝不贬低其自身身份。它意识到自己所隶属的种种整体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Within that vast form is your own, which is briefer, yet is not lost, not limited and not predetermined. You form your corner of the universe, which is itself a part of another one. Within this the actions and beliefs of one affect all.
quotes.translation: 在那浩瀚形态中存在着你的形态——虽较短暂，却不会消失、不受限制、也非预先注定。你塑造着宇宙中属于你的角落，而这角落本身又是另一个宇宙的组成部分。在此之中，每个个体的行动与信念都会影响全体。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: All portions of All That Is are constantly changing and enfolding and unfolding. All That Is, seeking to know itself, constantly creates new versions of itself. For this seeking itself is a creative activity, and the core of all action.
quotes.translation: 一切万有的所有部分都在不断变化、展开与收拢。一切万有为了认识自身，不断创造自己的新版本。因为这种追寻本身就是一种创造性活动，也是一切行动的核心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (With a smile:) Probable dictation: What you must understand is this: Each of the events in each of your lives was "once" probable. From a given field of action, then, you choose those happenings that will be physically materialized.
quotes.translation: （微笑地）可能的听写：你必须明白这一点：你们每个人生命中的每个事件"曾经"都是可能的。因此，从给定的行动场域中，你选择了那些将具体化为物质实相的事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Mass and form may seem synonymous, but they are not. Mass is not dependent upon weight. We may say however that dream images have a density which is formed of electrical intensities, that are partially the result of chemical actions.
quotes.translation: 质量与形态看似同义，实则不然。质量并不依赖于重量。然而我们可以说，梦境影像具有一种由电磁强度构成的密度，这种密度部分源于化学作用的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You are dealing with the transformation of emotional energy into action and form. You then manipulate within the system which you have yourselves created, and by its effects learn where you have succeeded and where you have failed.
quotes.translation: 你们正在处理将情绪能量转化为行动与形态的过程。随后你们在自己创造的体系内运作，并通过其效应学习何处成功、何处失败。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is not generated from the objective world. The objective world is the end result of inner action. You can indeed manipulate the objective world from within, for this is the means and the definition of manipulation.
quotes.translation: 它并非源自客观世界。客观世界是内在行动的结果。你们确实可以从内在操控客观世界，因为这才是操控的方式与定义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The relationship between you was a basis for this communication. Your own existence after your future deaths (smile) is of course dependent upon your actions now, but already you can be sure that I will be with you.
quotes.translation: 你们之间的关系是这次沟通的基础。你们在未来的死亡之后（微笑）的存续，当然取决于你们现在的行动，但你们已经可以确信我将与你们同在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: All action is generated behind and yet within all that you seem to see.
quotes.translation: 所有行动都生成于你似乎所见的一切背后，却又在其内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I may use the word future, but I use it only to express that which is beyond my present perceptive limits. It is almost impossible to speak of a single, simple action, though I may do so for conveniences sake.
quotes.translation: 我或许会使用“未来”一词，但仅用以表达超越我当前感知界限之物。几乎不可能谈论单一、简单的行动，尽管为方便起见我可能如此表述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality itself therefore, as a mental action, is responsible for the point or mid-plane, for without the personality or mental act, this particular reference point or mid-plane would have no meaning.
quotes.translation: 因此，人格本身作为一种心智行动，负责那一点或中平面——若无人格或心智行动，此特定参照点或中平面便毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is therefore impossible to consider an impeding action, such as an illness, without taking into consideration the particular structure-unifying devices, subconscious and conscious personality tendencies.
quotes.translation: 因此，不可能在不考虑特定结构统一机制、潜意识与显意识人格倾向的情况下，去审视诸如疾病这类阻碍性行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your seasons, and the physical nature of your universe, is that part of action which is instantly renewing, and which automatically lets even ego feel its relation to that reality of which it is a part.
quotes.translation: 你们的季节，以及宇宙的物质本质，正是行动中即时更新的部分，它自动让自我也能感受到自身与所从属的那个实相之间的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Jack Kennedy himself had a premonition of events and even in the midst of action he was prepared for death. His subconscious mind always knew the true nature of death and flirted with it consciously.
quotes.translation: 杰克·肯尼迪本人对事件早有预感，甚至在行动过程中已对死亡有所准备。他的潜意识始终知晓死亡的真实本质，并在显意识层面与之调情。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I want here, Joseph, to make one note for our own benefit, that should be included with our material on the nature of action, if indeed our two visitors will for a moment forgive me. Are you ready?
quotes.translation: 约瑟，我想在此为自己记下一笔，这段内容应纳入我们关于行动本质的资料中——如果两位访客能暂时原谅我的打断。你准备好了吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As we mentioned in our last session, the personality cannot be considered alone, but it must be thought of in its relationship to action and to all those aspects of reality of which it is a part.
quotes.translation: 正如我们上次课所提，人格不能孤立看待，而必须在其与行动及所有实相面向的关系中加以思考——人格本就是这些实相的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I would like to continue with our discussion concerning the nature of the human personality in its relationship to action, and in connection with the matter of illness and health in general.
quotes.translation: 我想继续探讨人类人格与行动的关系本质，并联系疾病与健康的一般性问题展开讨论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Action is a dimension arising out of existence.
quotes.translation: 行动是源于存在的一个维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Each person chooses for himself the individual patterns within which he will create this personal reality. But inside these bounds are infinite varieties of actions and unlimited resources.
quotes.translation: 每个人为自己选择创造个人实相时所遵循的个别模式。但在这些界限之内，存在着无限多样的行动与无穷的资源。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Consciousness therefore is not a thing in itself. It is a dimension of action. It is an almost miraculous state, made possible by what I choose to call a series of creative dilemmas.
quotes.translation: 因此，意识本身并非一个事物。它是行动的一个维度。它是一种近乎奇迹的状态，由我称之为一系列创造性困境的条件所促成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is a given characteristic of life, regardless of the beliefs that may lead you to misinterpret the actions of nature, casting some of its creatures in a reprehensible light.
quotes.translation: 这是生命的一项既定特性，无论何种信念可能引导你误解自然的行为，将其中的某些生物置于可谴责的境地。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Any action is violence, after all.
quotes.translation: 毕竟，任何行动都是暴力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I will now end the session, but it will indeed serve as a basis for many discussions, concerning the relationship between action, suggestion, personality, illness and health.
quotes.translation: 我现在将结束此节，但它确实将作为许多讨论的基础，涉及行动、暗示、人格、疾病与健康之间的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The nature of action causes depths in terms of intensities that you do not understand, but these intensities build up to the appearance of physical matter within your system.
quotes.translation: 行动的本质会以你们不了解的强度层次引发深度，但这些强度逐渐累积，最终在你们的系统中显现为物质实体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: But such a mere annoyance becomes indeed a form of torture. There is no longer any need for this. In other ways, through constructive action, he has more than made his way.
quotes.translation: 但这种微不足道的烦恼确实会演变成一种折磨。如今已不再需要如此。通过建设性的行动，他已在其他方面充分证明了自己的价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is the ego which fears death so strongly. And yet the stability which ego so urgently seeks would, indeed, result in a death, since no further action would be allowed.
quotes.translation: 正是自我如此强烈地恐惧死亡。然而自我如此迫切寻求的稳定，实际上会导致死亡，因为不再允许任何进一步的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You understood, when we were done, that you perceive but a very brief glimpse of a small part of action as it exists. On a conscious level you perceive less than this.
quotes.translation: 当我们的讨论结束时，你已明白自己仅能感知到行动存在中极为短暂的一瞥。在意识层面，你感知到的甚至比这更少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: For your identity is dependent upon primary reality, which is a certain kind of action, and all of this will lead to heightened consciousness under all circumstances.
quotes.translation: 因为你的身份认同依赖于原初实相——那是一种特定的行动——这一切终将在所有情境中导向更高层次的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Each child's birth changes the world, obviously, for it sets up an instant psychological momentum that begins to affect action in Framework 1 and Framework 2 alike.
quotes.translation: 每个孩子的诞生显然都会改变世界，因为它会立即建立起一种心理动能，开始同时影响框架一与框架二中的行动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 827, MARCH 13, 1978
9:59 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You realize that in order to speak of action it is necessary that it be discussed as though some aspects were isolated from others. But this is not the case.
quotes.translation: 你明白，若要谈论行动，就必须将其视为某些方面与其他方面相分离来讨论，但事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Since this is obviously impossible, since no consciousness or identity can exist without action, because they are inseparable, we have our third dilemma.
quotes.translation: 既然这显然不可能，因为没有行动，任何意识或身份都无法存在，因为它们是不可分割的，于是我们遇到了第三个难题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: He is beginning to come together again. It is necessary now that he see through endeavors, and face the consequences of his own psychological action.
quotes.translation: 他开始重新整合。现在他必须看穿种种努力，并面对自己心理行动的后果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now, it directs and organizes this action, as for example your physical personality directs and organizes large portions of your physical image.
quotes.translation: 现在，它引导并组织这个行动，就像你们物质人格引导并组织你们物质形象的大部分一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: On a limited scale, very limited, this process is hinted at in the material having to do with moment points, action and personality.
quotes.translation: 在有限的范围内，非常有限，这个过程在涉及瞬间点、行动和人格的资料中有所暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned that any action has an electromagnetic reality, and so thoughts and dreams as well form this identity system.
quotes.translation: 我曾提到，任何行动都具有电磁实相，因此思想和梦境也构成了这个身份系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner voice does not need to be listened to. It is instantly translated into action and experience. It is known directly.
quotes.translation: 内在声音无需倾听。它即刻转化为行动与经验，被直接了知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: --this is not meant to imply any negation of psychological or psychic values, although these are also actions.
quotes.translation: ——这并非意在否定心理或灵性价值，尽管这些本身也是行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Dictation: Now let us return again to our discussion of impulses, in connection with probable actions.
quotes.translation: 口述：现在让我们再次回到关于冲动的讨论，探讨其与可能行动的关系。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 860, JUNE 13, 1979
9:19 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: When you perceive merely the present personality, you are simply perceiving a small portion of action.
quotes.translation: 当你只感知到当前的人格时，你仅仅是在感知行动的一小部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The nature of any given probable action does not lead to any particular inevitable concluding act.
quotes.translation: 任何特定或然行动的本质，并不会导向任何必然的最终行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: What you choose to call suggestion operates unceasingly within all aspects of action.
quotes.translation: 你称之为暗示的东西，在行动的所有面向中持续运作着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We spent many sessions in the past discussing the nature of action.
quotes.translation: 过去我们花了许多课节讨论行动的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The nature of action cannot be altered.
quotes.translation: 行动的本质无法改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: --you perceive it or not, is action.
quotes.translation: ——无论你感知与否，它都是行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json
